sections.description: Global and China-facing headlines from public RSS feeds.

title.original: SPCA hit with backlash after wading into mainland Chinese dog-killing case
title.en: SPCA hit with backlash after wading into mainland Chinese dog-killing case
title.zh: SPCA介入中国大陆虐狗案后遭遇抵制
title.es: SPCA enfrentó críticas tras involucrarse en caso de maltrato animal en China continental

summary.original: The Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (SPCA) in Hong Kong apologized after receiving backlash for asking the Hong Kong police to help remove videos showing a dog and its puppies being killed in mainland China. Social media users criticized the request, saying removing the videos would suppress evidence and undermine efforts to raise public awareness of the case. The footage depicts at least four boys, all under 14 years old according to authorities, beating a nursing stray dog and her puppies in Jieyang, Guangdong province, before setting the mother dog alight. The SPCA initially expressed sadness and outrage, called for stronger animal protection laws and education, and reported the matter to Hong Kong police. Although outside their jurisdiction, the police responded by asking platforms like Threads and YouTube to remove the videos. The SPCA welcomed any measures preventing the spread of violent content and expected relevant platforms to act responsibly. This summary is based solely on the sourced article and makes no inferences beyond the provided text.
summary.en: The Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (SPCA) in Hong Kong apologized after receiving backlash for asking the Hong Kong police to help remove videos showing a dog and its puppies being killed in mainland China. Social media users criticized the request, saying removing the videos would suppress evidence and undermine efforts to raise public awareness of the case. The footage depicts at least four boys, all under 14 years old according to authorities, beating a nursing stray dog and her puppies in Jieyang, Guangdong province, before setting the mother dog alight. The SPCA initially expressed sadness and outrage, called for stronger animal protection laws and education, and reported the matter to Hong Kong police. Although outside their jurisdiction, the police responded by asking platforms like Threads and YouTube to remove the videos. The SPCA welcomed any measures preventing the spread of violent content and expected relevant platforms to act responsibly. This summary is based solely on the sourced article and makes no inferences beyond the provided text.
summary.zh: 香港防止虐待动物协会因请求警方协助删除中国大陆虐狗视频而道歉，遭社交媒体批评。视频显示广东揭阳四名14岁以下男孩殴打一只哺乳中的流浪狗及其幼犬并放火烧母狗。SPCA呼吁加强动物保护法并报案，警方虽越权，但要求平台删除视频。SPCA支持防止暴力内容传播的措施，期待平台负责任地行动。
summary.es: La Sociedad para la Prevención de la Crueldad hacia los Animales (SPCA) en Hong Kong se disculpó tras recibir críticas por solicitar a la policía eliminar videos que muestran el maltrato y asesinato de un perro y sus cachorros en China continental. Usuarios en redes sociales opinaron que eliminar los videos suprimiría evidencia y obstaculizaría la concienciación pública. Los videos muestran a al menos cuatro niños menores de 14 años golpeando y quemando a una perra callejera y sus cachorros en Jieyang, provincia de Guangdong. La SPCA inicialmente expresó tristeza e indignación, pidió leyes más fuertes y reportó el caso. La policía, fuera de su jurisdicción, pidió a plataformas como Threads y YouTube remover el contenido. La SPCA aplaudió medidas para evitar la difusión de contenido violento y espera responsabilidad de las plataformas.

title.original: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
title.en: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
title.zh: 阿根廷因福克兰群岛横幅面临处罚
title.es: Argentina enfrenta acciones por pancarta sobre las Islas Malvinas

summary.original: Following Argentina’s World Cup semi-final win against England, the team celebrated by displaying a banner with the phrase "Las Malvinas son Argentinas" ("The Falklands are Argentine"), which has led to the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa for violating rules against political gestures. The semi-final took place in Atlanta, where Argentina came from behind to win 2-1 and reach the final against Spain. This banner reignited the sovereignty dispute between Britain and Argentina over the Falkland Islands, a British overseas territory, which were also the cause of a war between the two countries in 1982. Argentina’s vice-president Victoria Villarruel posted on social media emphasizing the significance of the issue, while UK officials have called the gesture inappropriate and expect Fifa to investigate thoroughly. Argentina’s manager Lionel Scaloni had said before the match that he would not mix politics and football, describing the event as just a game. This summary is based on the provided evidence and does not include information beyond the article.
summary.en: Following Argentina’s World Cup semi-final win against England, the team celebrated by displaying a banner with the phrase "Las Malvinas son Argentinas" ("The Falklands are Argentine"), which has led to the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa for violating rules against political gestures. The semi-final took place in Atlanta, where Argentina came from behind to win 2-1 and reach the final against Spain. This banner reignited the sovereignty dispute between Britain and Argentina over the Falkland Islands, a British overseas territory, which were also the cause of a war between the two countries in 1982. Argentina’s vice-president Victoria Villarruel posted on social media emphasizing the significance of the issue, while UK officials have called the gesture inappropriate and expect Fifa to investigate thoroughly. Argentina’s manager Lionel Scaloni had said before the match that he would not mix politics and football, describing the event as just a game. This summary is based on the provided evidence and does not include information beyond the article.
summary.zh: 阿根廷在世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰后，队伍展示写有“Las Malvinas son Argentinas”（“福克兰群岛属于阿根廷”）的横幅，可能因此违反国际足联反政治表态规定而遭受纪律处分。比赛在亚特兰大举行，阿根廷2比1逆转胜出，将对阵西班牙争冠。该横幅再次引发英阿对福克兰群岛主权争议。阿根廷副总统在社交媒体强调此议题重要性，英方官员则认为此举不当，期望国际足联彻查。阿根廷主教练赛前表示比赛仅是体育赛事，不掺政治。
summary.es: Tras la victoria de Argentina sobre Inglaterra en la semifinal del Mundial, el equipo mostró una pancarta con la frase "Las Malvinas son Argentinas", lo que podría derivar en una acción disciplinaria de la FIFA por violar las reglas contra gestos políticos. El partido se jugó en Atlanta, donde Argentina remontó para ganar 2-1 y llegar a la final contra España. La pancarta reavivó la disputa de soberanía entre Reino Unido y Argentina sobre las Islas Malvinas, territorio británico de ultramar y causa del conflicto bélico de 1982. La vicepresidenta argentina Victoria Villarruel resaltó la importancia del tema en redes sociales, mientras funcionarios británicos calificaron el gesto de inapropiado y esperan una investigación exhaustiva de la FIFA. Antes del partido, el entrenador Lionel Scaloni afirmó que no mezclaría política y fútbol.

title.original: FrightFest Reveals Lineup, Sets Abner Pastoll’s ‘Nervous’ as Opening Film (EXCLUSIVE)
title.en: FrightFest Reveals Lineup, Sets Abner Pastoll’s ‘Nervous’ as Opening Film (EXCLUSIVE)
title.zh: FrightFest发布阵容，Abner Pastoll的《Nervous》定为开幕片（独家）
title.es: FrightFest revela su programación y elige 'Nervous' de Abner Pastoll como película inaugural (EXCLUSIVO)

summary.original: The U.K.'s largest horror and fantasy film festival, Tubi FrightFest, announced the lineup for its 27th edition, claiming it to be the biggest in its history. The event will showcase 82 feature films over five days, from August 27 to 31, at the Odeon Luxe Leicester Square and Odeon Luxe West End in London. The selection includes 24 world premieres and features movies from 16 countries across four continents. The opening film of the festival will be Abner Pastoll’s "Nervous." This summary is limited to the information provided in the source article.
summary.en: The U.K.'s largest horror and fantasy film festival, Tubi FrightFest, announced the lineup for its 27th edition, claiming it to be the biggest in its history. The event will showcase 82 feature films over five days, from August 27 to 31, at the Odeon Luxe Leicester Square and Odeon Luxe West End in London. The selection includes 24 world premieres and features movies from 16 countries across four continents. The opening film of the festival will be Abner Pastoll’s "Nervous." This summary is limited to the information provided in the source article.
summary.zh: 英国最大恐怖奇幻电影节Tubi FrightFest公布第27届阵容，号称历史上最大规模。活动将于8月27日至31日在伦敦Odeon Luxe Leicester Square和Odeon Luxe West End上演82部剧情片，涵盖16个国家和四大洲，包括24部全球首映。开幕影片为Abner Pastoll导演的《Nervous》。
summary.es: El mayor festival de cine de terror y fantasía del Reino Unido, Tubi FrightFest, anunció la programación de su 27ª edición, considerada la más grande de su historia. El evento presentará 82 largometrajes del 27 al 31 de agosto en Odeon Luxe Leicester Square y Odeon Luxe West End en Londres. La selección incluye 24 estrenos mundiales y películas de 16 países de cuatro continentes. La película inaugural será "Nervous" de Abner Pastoll.

title.original: NBC Sports Uses World Cup Fever to Spark Interest in Premier League Return
title.en: NBC Sports Uses World Cup Fever to Spark Interest in Premier League Return
title.zh: NBC体育利用世界杯热潮推动英超回归
title.es: NBC Sports aprovecha la fiebre del Mundial para impulsar el regreso de la Premier League

summary.original: NBC Sports is leveraging the strong interest generated by its World Cup telecasts on Telemundo and Peacock to promote the return of the English Premier League for the 2026-2027 season. In collaboration with the league, NBC launched "Find Your Match," an interactive 11-question quiz designed to connect fans, from die-hard to casual, with Premier League clubs based on personality and cultural interests. Participants can receive information about viewing options for their matched teams on NBC, Peacock, and USA Network, where the season will be broadcast starting this fall. This briefing is sourced exclusively from the provided article and contains no additional information.
summary.en: NBC Sports is leveraging the strong interest generated by its World Cup telecasts on Telemundo and Peacock to promote the return of the English Premier League for the 2026-2027 season. In collaboration with the league, NBC launched "Find Your Match," an interactive 11-question quiz designed to connect fans, from die-hard to casual, with Premier League clubs based on personality and cultural interests. Participants can receive information about viewing options for their matched teams on NBC, Peacock, and USA Network, where the season will be broadcast starting this fall. This briefing is sourced exclusively from the provided article and contains no additional information.
summary.zh: NBC体育借助其在Telemundo和Peacock的世界杯转播引发的强烈关注，推广2026-2027赛季英超联赛回归。联合英超推出“找到你的契合”互动测验，通过11道问题将球迷从铁杆到休闲者与符合个性和文化兴趣的俱乐部匹配。参与者可获得NBC、Peacock及USA Network的观看信息，赛季将于秋季开始转播。
summary.es: NBC Sports está aprovechando el interés generado por sus transmisiones de la Copa Mundial en Telemundo y Peacock para promover el regreso de la Premier League inglesa para la temporada 2026-2027. En colaboración con la liga, NBC lanzó "Find Your Match", un cuestionario interactivo de 11 preguntas para conectar a los fans—desde fervientes hasta ocasionales—con clubes de la Premier según personalidad e intereses culturales. Los participantes reciben información sobre opciones de visualización en NBC, Peacock y USA Network, donde se emitirá la temporada a partir de este otoño.

title.original: 4 Greek MPs charged over multimillion EU farm fraud scandal
title.en: 4 Greek MPs charged over multimillion EU farm fraud scandal
title.zh: 4名希腊议员因数百万欧元欧盟农场诈骗案被起诉
title.es: Cuatro diputados griegos acusados por escándalo multimillonario de fraude agrícola de la UE

summary.original: The European Public Prosecutor’s Office (EPPO) indicted 22 people, including four acting members of Greece’s parliament, in connection with a large-scale farm fraud investigation. The case involves accusations that Greek stockbreeders falsified grazing land ownership and exaggerated their farm animal numbers to fraudulently claim European Union subsidies. The alleged scheme reportedly involved assistance from state employees and conservative politicians, with some subsidy recipients having no connection to agriculture. EPPO estimates the EU suffered losses exceeding €19.6 million (about US$22.5 million), while Greek authorities estimated damages of at least €23 million. The scandal has led to ministerial resignations and inconclusive parliamentary inquiries. Additionally, the EU fined Greece over misuse of funds between 2016 and 2023 by the government agency responsible for handling subsidies and payments.
summary.en: The European Public Prosecutor’s Office (EPPO) indicted 22 people, including four acting members of Greece’s parliament, in connection with a large-scale farm fraud investigation. The case involves accusations that Greek stockbreeders falsified grazing land ownership and exaggerated their farm animal numbers to fraudulently claim European Union subsidies. The alleged scheme reportedly involved assistance from state employees and conservative politicians, with some subsidy recipients having no connection to agriculture. EPPO estimates the EU suffered losses exceeding €19.6 million (about US$22.5 million), while Greek authorities estimated damages of at least €23 million. The scandal has led to ministerial resignations and inconclusive parliamentary inquiries. Additionally, the EU fined Greece over misuse of funds between 2016 and 2023 by the government agency responsible for handling subsidies and payments.
summary.zh: 欧洲公共检察院（EPPO）起诉包括4名现任希腊议员共22人，涉及大规模农场诈骗案。指控包括虚报牧场土地和夸大养殖动物数量，骗取欧盟补贴。案件涉及部分政府雇员和保守派政客协助，一些受补贴者与农业无关。损失估计超过1960万欧元（约2250万美元），希腊当局估计损失至少2300万欧元。该丑闻已导致部级辞职和无果的议会调查，欧盟也因2016-2023年补贴资金管理不当罚款希腊。
summary.es: La Fiscalía Pública Europea (EPPO) imputó a 22 personas, incluidos cuatro diputados en activo de Grecia, por una gran investigación sobre fraude agrícola. Se acusa a ganaderos griegos de falsificar la propiedad de tierras de pastoreo y exagerar la cantidad de animales para reclamar fraudulentamente subsidios de la Unión Europea. El esquema habría contado con asistencia de empleados estatales y políticos conservadores, con algunos beneficiarios sin relación con la agricultura. La EPPO estima pérdidas en la UE de más de 19,6 millones de euros (22,5 millones de dólares), mientras que las autoridades griegas calculan daños por al menos 23 millones de euros. El escándalo provocó renuncias ministeriales e investigaciones parlamentarias inconclusas. Además, la UE multó a Grecia por mal uso de fondos entre 2016 y 2023 por la agencia gubernamental responsable.

title.original: Raindance Film Festival, Israeli AI Platform IMGN Launch New Film Fund and Development Hub for Indie Filmmakers (EXCLUSIVE)
title.en: Raindance Film Festival, Israeli AI Platform IMGN Launch New Film Fund and Development Hub for Indie Filmmakers (EXCLUSIVE)
title.zh: Raindance电影节与以色列AI平台IMGN推出独立电影发展基金（独家）
title.es: Raindance Film Festival e IMGN, plataforma israelí de IA, lanzan fondo y centro de desarrollo para cineastas independientes (EXCLUSIVO)

summary.original: At the 34th Raindance Film Festival in London, the festival announced a partnership with Israeli AI creative development platform IMGN. Together, they launched the IMGN/Raindance Film Fund, starting with an initial fund of £10,000 (approximately $13,394) to support independent filmmakers. The fund is aimed at emerging indie writers and filmmakers and is linked to the Raindance Script Competition. Festival director David Martínez described the initiative as providing practical production-planning support that saves time and money without compromising creative ownership. Organizers expect positive reception despite differing views on the use of AI in filmmaking. The fund is expected to grow in future editions as the partnership expands.
summary.en: At the 34th Raindance Film Festival in London, the festival announced a partnership with Israeli AI creative development platform IMGN. Together, they launched the IMGN/Raindance Film Fund, starting with an initial fund of £10,000 (approximately $13,394) to support independent filmmakers. The fund is aimed at emerging indie writers and filmmakers and is linked to the Raindance Script Competition. Festival director David Martínez described the initiative as providing practical production-planning support that saves time and money without compromising creative ownership. Organizers expect positive reception despite differing views on the use of AI in filmmaking. The fund is expected to grow in future editions as the partnership expands.
summary.zh: 伦敦第34届Raindance电影节宣布与以色列AI创作平台IMGN合作，联合推出IMGN/Raindance电影基金，起始资金为1万英镑（约1.34万美元），支持独立电影创作者。该基金面向新兴独立编剧和电影人，关联Raindance剧本大赛。电影节导演David Martínez称此举提供实用制作规划支持，节省时间和成本，同时保障创作所有权。尽管对电影制片中的AI使用存在不同看法，参与者预期反响积极。随着合作扩大，基金未来预计增长。
summary.es: En el 34º Raindance Film Festival en Londres, el festival anunció una asociación con la plataforma creativa de inteligencia artificial israelí IMGN. Juntos lanzaron el Fondo de Cine IMGN/Raindance, comenzando con un fondo inicial de £10,000 (aproximadamente $13,394) para apoyar a cineastas independientes. El fondo está dirigido a escritores y cineastas indie emergentes y está vinculado a la Competencia de Guiones de Raindance. El director del festival, David Martínez, describió la iniciativa como un soporte práctico para la planificación de producción que ahorra tiempo y dinero sin comprometer la propiedad creativa. A pesar de las diferentes opiniones sobre el uso de IA en el cine, se espera una recepción positiva. El fondo se prevé crecer en futuras ediciones conforme se expanda la alianza.

title.original: Hong Kong urged to position Greater Bay Area as equine hub, grow racing tourism
title.en: Hong Kong urged to position Greater Bay Area as equine hub, grow racing tourism
title.zh: 香港被敦促将大湾区定位为马匹中心，发展赛马旅游
title.es: Instan a Hong Kong a posicionar el Área de la Gran Bahía como centro ecuestre y fomentar el turismo de carreras

summary.original: The Hong Kong Jockey Club has proposed that Hong Kong should position the Greater Bay Area (GBA) as a major equine hub as part of the city’s first five-year development plan. In a submission to the government, the club suggested forming a distinctive racing circuit targeting both mainland Chinese and international tourists. It highlighted that the equine industry has been recognized as a strategic economic driver in national planning. The club specifically proposed leveraging the Conghua Racecourse in Guangzhou to promote deeper cooperation between Hong Kong and mainland China. Combined with Hong Kong’s Happy Valley and Sha Tin racecourses, these venues could support world-class racing and equine events, helping establish the GBA as a global hub. The Hong Kong government is currently conducting a two-month public consultation on its development blueprint aligned with the national plan from 2026 to 2030.
summary.en: The Hong Kong Jockey Club has proposed that Hong Kong should position the Greater Bay Area (GBA) as a major equine hub as part of the city’s first five-year development plan. In a submission to the government, the club suggested forming a distinctive racing circuit targeting both mainland Chinese and international tourists. It highlighted that the equine industry has been recognized as a strategic economic driver in national planning. The club specifically proposed leveraging the Conghua Racecourse in Guangzhou to promote deeper cooperation between Hong Kong and mainland China. Combined with Hong Kong’s Happy Valley and Sha Tin racecourses, these venues could support world-class racing and equine events, helping establish the GBA as a global hub. The Hong Kong government is currently conducting a two-month public consultation on its development blueprint aligned with the national plan from 2026 to 2030.
summary.zh: 香港赛马会建议香港应将大湾区定位为主要马匹中心，打造独特的赛马线路吸引内地及国际游客，利用广州从化赛马场促进与内地合作，结合香港的跑马地及沙田赛马场，推动世界级赛事，助力大湾区成为全球马业中心。香港政府正进行2026至2030年发展蓝图的两个月公众咨询。
summary.es: El Hong Kong Jockey Club propone que Hong Kong posicione el Área de la Gran Bahía (GBA) como un importante centro ecuestre, creando un circuito de carreras distintivo para turistas chinos continentales e internacionales. Se sugiere aprovechar el hipódromo de Conghua en Guangzhou para fortalecer la cooperación con China continental, junto con los hipódromos de Happy Valley y Sha Tin en Hong Kong. Esto apoyaría eventos ecuestres de clase mundial y convertiría la GBA en un centro global. El gobierno de Hong Kong realiza una consulta pública de dos meses sobre su plan de desarrollo para 2026-2030.

title.original: ‘Romería,’ ‘The Blood Countess,’ ‘Resurrection’ Set for Costa Rica Film Festival as Event Focuses on Afro-Caribbean Cinema and Female Filmmakers
title.en: ‘Romería,’ ‘The Blood Countess,’ ‘Resurrection’ Set for Costa Rica Film Festival as Event Focuses on Afro-Caribbean Cinema and Female Filmmakers
title.zh: 《朝圣》、《血色伯爵》、《复活》亮相哥斯达黎加电影节，聚焦非洲加勒比电影及女性导演
title.es: ‘Romería’, ‘The Blood Countess’, ‘Resurrection’ presentes en festival de cine de Costa Rica con enfoque en cine afrocaribeño y directoras

summary.original: The 14th Costa Rica Film Festival will be held in San Jose from July 23 to August 1. The festival’s program features notable films such as Carla Simón’s "Romería," Bi Gan’s "Resurrection," Diego Céspedes’s "The Mysterious Gaze of the Flamingo," Ulrike Ottinger’s "The Blood Countess" starring Isabelle Huppert, and Lucrecia Martel’s "Landmarks." The event will open with Allan Deberton’s "Gugu’s World," which won an award at the Berlin festival, and include the world premiere of Andrés Madrigal Alvarado’s "Lost Men." This edition of the festival places particular emphasis on Afro-Caribbean cinema and female filmmakers.
summary.en: The 14th Costa Rica Film Festival will be held in San Jose from July 23 to August 1. The festival’s program features notable films such as Carla Simón’s "Romería," Bi Gan’s "Resurrection," Diego Céspedes’s "The Mysterious Gaze of the Flamingo," Ulrike Ottinger’s "The Blood Countess" starring Isabelle Huppert, and Lucrecia Martel’s "Landmarks." The event will open with Allan Deberton’s "Gugu’s World," which won an award at the Berlin festival, and include the world premiere of Andrés Madrigal Alvarado’s "Lost Men." This edition of the festival places particular emphasis on Afro-Caribbean cinema and female filmmakers.
summary.zh: 第14届哥斯达黎加电影节将于7月23日至8月1日在圣何塞举行，放映《朝圣》、《复活》、《火烈鸟的神秘凝视》、《血色伯爵》（伊莎贝尔·于佩主演）及《地标》等作品。开幕片为柏林电影节获奖作品《古古的世界》，还将全球首映《迷失者》。本届电影节特别强调非洲加勒比电影和女性导演。
summary.es: La 14ª edición del Festival de Cine de Costa Rica se realizará del 23 de julio al 1 de agosto en San José, con películas destacadas como ‘Romería’ de Carla Simón, ‘Resurrection’ de Bi Gan, ‘The Mysterious Gaze of the Flamingo’ de Diego Céspedes, ‘The Blood Countess’ con Isabelle Huppert y ‘Landmarks’ de Lucrecia Martel. El evento abrirá con ‘Gugu’s World’ de Allan Deberton, premiada en Berlín, e incluirá el estreno mundial de ‘Lost Men’ de Andrés Madrigal Alvarado. Esta edición resalta el cine afrocaribeño y a directoras.

title.original: US Stock Futures Today: AtaiBeckley, GE Aerospace, UnitedHealth
title.en: US Stock Futures Today: AtaiBeckley, GE Aerospace, UnitedHealth
title.zh: 今日美国股指期货：AtaiBeckley、GE Aerospace、UnitedHealth
title.es: Futuros de acciones de EE.UU. hoy: AtaiBeckley, GE Aerospace, UnitedHealth

summary.original: S&P 500 Index futures were down 0.2% as of 7:47 a.m. in New York. The US intensified strikes against Iran, including hitting an oil tanker near Iran’s main export terminal, marking the first such incident since the blockade of Iran’s ports resumed. This development appears to be contributing to market movements. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.en: S&P 500 Index futures were down 0.2% as of 7:47 a.m. in New York. The US intensified strikes against Iran, including hitting an oil tanker near Iran’s main export terminal, marking the first such incident since the blockade of Iran’s ports resumed. This development appears to be contributing to market movements. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.zh: 截至纽约时间早上7:47，标普500指数期货下跌0.2%。美国加大对伊朗打击，包括袭击接近伊朗主要出口港口的油轮，这是自伊朗港口封锁恢复以来首次此类事件，影响市场波动。简报信息来源有限。
summary.es: A las 7:47 a.m. en Nueva York, los futuros del índice S&P 500 bajaron 0.2%. EE.UU. intensificó ataques contra Irán, impactando un petrolero cercano al principal terminal de exportación iraní, el primer incidente así desde la reanudación del bloqueo de puertos iraníes, lo que influye en el mercado. El informe tiene fuente limitada.

title.original: Diesel Prices Hit $5 a Gallon Again, Up 33% Since Start of Iran War
title.en: Diesel Prices Hit $5 a Gallon Again, Up 33% Since Start of Iran War
title.zh: 柴油价格再次达到每加仑5美元，自伊朗战争以来上涨33%
title.es: Los precios del diésel alcanzan nuevamente los $5 por galón, suben 33% desde inicio de guerra con Irán

summary.original: U.S. diesel prices surpassed $5 a gallon again amid renewed conflict in the Persian Gulf and reduced refinery capacity. Diesel prices have increased by 33% since the start of the Iran war. The increase in prices is linked to ongoing fighting and supply constraints. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.en: U.S. diesel prices surpassed $5 a gallon again amid renewed conflict in the Persian Gulf and reduced refinery capacity. Diesel prices have increased by 33% since the start of the Iran war. The increase in prices is linked to ongoing fighting and supply constraints. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.zh: 在波斯湾战事升级及炼油产能下降背景下，美国柴油价格再次超过每加仑5美元，自伊朗战争开始以来上涨了33%。价格上涨因持续的冲突和供应限制所致。简报信息来源有限。
summary.es: Los precios del diésel en EE.UU. superaron nuevamente los $5 por galón debido al renovado conflicto en el Golfo Pérsico y la reducción de la capacidad de refinación. Desde el inicio de la guerra con Irán, el precio ha subido un 33%. Este aumento se vincula con los combates en curso y restricciones de suministro. El resumen tiene fuente limitada.

title.original: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
title.en: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
title.zh: 伊朗袭击美军基地 美国发动新一轮空袭
title.es: Irán ataca bases militares mientras EE.UU. lanza oleada de ataques

summary.original: Iran launched attacks on U.S. military bases in neighboring Gulf states, including Jordan, Kuwait, and Bahrain, amid ongoing hostilities. The U.S. responded with a six-hour wave of strikes targeting multiple locations in Iran to degrade its ability to threaten maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. Explosions and air defense activations were reported across Iran, including Tehran. The U.S. disabled a Curacao-flagged oil tanker attempting to enter a blockaded Iranian port, and the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that other export routes serving U.S. interests could be closed. Despite hostilities, Iran freed an American detainee, which the U.S. appreciated. The briefing is based directly on the supplied detailed report.
summary.en: Iran launched attacks on U.S. military bases in neighboring Gulf states, including Jordan, Kuwait, and Bahrain, amid ongoing hostilities. The U.S. responded with a six-hour wave of strikes targeting multiple locations in Iran to degrade its ability to threaten maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. Explosions and air defense activations were reported across Iran, including Tehran. The U.S. disabled a Curacao-flagged oil tanker attempting to enter a blockaded Iranian port, and the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that other export routes serving U.S. interests could be closed. Despite hostilities, Iran freed an American detainee, which the U.S. appreciated. The briefing is based directly on the supplied detailed report.
summary.zh: 伊朗对邻近海湾国家的美国军事基地发动攻击，包括约旦、科威特和巴林。美国随即进行六小时空袭，打击伊朗多处目标，削弱其威胁霍尔木兹海峡海运能力。伊朗多地包括德黑兰报告爆炸和防空活动。美国击停一艘试图进入被封锁伊朗港口的库拉索旗油轮，霍尔木兹海峡仍关闭。伊朗革命卫队警告可能封闭更多出口通道。尽管冲突，伊朗释放一名美国被拘者，美国表示感谢。简报基于详细报告。
summary.es: Irán lanzó ataques contra bases militares estadounidenses en estados vecinos del Golfo, incluyendo Jordania, Kuwait y Baréin. EE.UU. respondió con una oleada de ataques de seis horas contra múltiples objetivos en Irán para reducir su capacidad de amenazar el tráfico marítimo en el Estrecho de Ormuz. Se reportaron explosiones y activaciones de defensa aérea en varias áreas, incluida Teherán. EE.UU. detuvo un petrolero con bandera de Curazao que intentaba entrar a un puerto iraní bloqueado; el estrecho permanece cerrado. La Guardia Revolucionaria iraní advirtió sobre posibles cierres de otras rutas de exportación. A pesar del conflicto, Irán liberó a un detenido estadounidense, acción valorada por EE.UU. El informe se basa en un reporte detallado.

title.original: Ukraine’s Minister of Defense, a Proponent of Drone Warfare, Is Forced Out
title.en: Ukraine’s Minister of Defense, a Proponent of Drone Warfare, Is Forced Out
title.zh: 乌克兰国防部长，无人机战争支持者被迫辞职
title.es: Ministro de Defensa de Ucrania, defensor de la guerra con drones, obligado a salir

summary.original: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving his position as Ukraine’s Minister of Defense following conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry, including drone warfare. The episode title suggests tensions regarding the use of new technologies in the military. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.en: Mykhailo Fedorov announced he was leaving his position as Ukraine’s Minister of Defense following conflicts with generals and military contractors over the role of innovative weaponry, including drone warfare. The episode title suggests tensions regarding the use of new technologies in the military. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.zh: 乌克兰国防部长Mykhailo Fedorov因与将军及军方承包商在创新武器，尤其是无人机战争角色上的分歧宣布辞职。一则标题显示军事中对新技术使用存在紧张局势。简报信息来源有限。
summary.es: Mykhailo Fedorov, ministro de Defensa de Ucrania, anunció su salida tras conflictos con generales y contratistas militares sobre el papel de armas innovadoras, incluyendo la guerra con drones. El título subraya tensiones respecto al uso de nuevas tecnologías en el ejército. El resumen tiene fuente limitada.

title.original: Abbott Boosts 2026 Profit Guidance as Sales Across Business Rise
title.en: Abbott Boosts 2026 Profit Guidance as Sales Across Business Rise
title.zh: 雅培上调2026年利润预期，业务销售增长
title.es: Abbott aumenta la previsión de beneficios para 2026 ante el aumento de ventas en sus negocios

summary.original: Abbott Laboratories has raised its profit guidance for 2026 following a stronger-than-expected second quarter. This improved outlook is attributed to better performance across most of its business lines, as stated in the Bloomberg Markets article dated July 16, 2026.
summary.en: Abbott Laboratories has raised its profit guidance for 2026 following a stronger-than-expected second quarter. This improved outlook is attributed to better performance across most of its business lines, as stated in the Bloomberg Markets article dated July 16, 2026.
summary.zh: 雅培实验室在2026年第二季度表现好于预期后，上调了2026年的利润预期。彭博市场2026年7月16日报道称，这一改善预期归因于其大多数业务线的更佳表现。
summary.es: Abbott Laboratories ha elevado su previsión de beneficios para 2026 tras un segundo trimestre mejor de lo esperado. Esta mejora se atribuye a un mejor desempeño en la mayoría de sus líneas de negocio, según un artículo de Bloomberg Markets del 16 de julio de 2026.

title.original: Five Below-the-Line Talents to Track in Colombia
title.en: Five Below-the-Line Talents to Track in Colombia
title.zh: 哥伦比亚电影行业不可忽视的五大幕后人才
title.es: Cinco talentos detrás de cámara para destacar en Colombia

summary.original: The Variety article highlights Colombia's film crews as exceptional assets to the country's film industry. These crews are recognized for their depth of experience, strong work ethic, and problem-solving skills. Having gained experience through various productions including feature films, commercials, television series, and documentaries, Colombia's film talent benefits from both on-set experience and formal training. The briefing is source-limited as it mainly focuses on these aspects.
summary.en: The Variety article highlights Colombia's film crews as exceptional assets to the country's film industry. These crews are recognized for their depth of experience, strong work ethic, and problem-solving skills. Having gained experience through various productions including feature films, commercials, television series, and documentaries, Colombia's film talent benefits from both on-set experience and formal training. The briefing is source-limited as it mainly focuses on these aspects.
summary.zh: 《综艺》杂志报道，哥伦比亚电影摄制组被誉为该国影视行业的重要资产，以丰富经验、敬业精神和解决问题的能力著称。通过参与电影、广告、电视剧和纪录片制作，哥伦比亚人才兼具实战经验与专业培训。报道主要聚焦这些方面。
summary.es: Un artículo de Variety destaca a los equipos de filmación en Colombia como activos excepcionales para la industria cinematográfica del país. Reconocidos por su experiencia, ética laboral y habilidades para resolver problemas, estos talentos se han formado tanto en set como mediante entrenamiento formal, tras trabajar en películas, comerciales, series y documentales. El resumen se limita a estos aspectos.

title.original: US Power Grid Faces Defining Test for AI Boom
title.en: US Power Grid Faces Defining Test for AI Boom
title.zh: 美国电网面临人工智能浪潮的关键考验
title.es: La red eléctrica de EE.UU. enfrenta una prueba decisiva por el auge de la IA

summary.original: The Bloomberg Markets report indicates that the operator of America’s largest electricity network is initiating an emergency process to address a projected shortfall in power supply. This situation is connected to the challenges posed by the AI boom, as detailed on July 16, 2026.
summary.en: The Bloomberg Markets report indicates that the operator of America’s largest electricity network is initiating an emergency process to address a projected shortfall in power supply. This situation is connected to the challenges posed by the AI boom, as detailed on July 16, 2026.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，美国最大电网运营商已启动紧急程序应对电力供应短缺，挑战与人工智能浪潮相关。报道日期为2026年7月16日。
summary.es: El informe de Bloomberg Markets indica que el operador de la red eléctrica más grande de EE.UU. está iniciando un proceso de emergencia para hacer frente a una posible escasez de suministro eléctrico, situación vinculada a los retos generados por el auge de la inteligencia artificial, según detalles del 16 de julio de 2026.

title.original: Zelenskyy fires Ukraine's tech-savvy defense minister in government reshuffle
title.en: Zelenskyy fires Ukraine's tech-savvy defense minister in government reshuffle
title.zh: 泽连斯基在政府改组中解雇乌克兰技术型国防部长
title.es: Zelensky despide al ministro de Defensa tecnológico de Ucrania en reforma gubernamental

summary.original: According to NPR News, Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has dismissed the country's defense minister amid a government reshuffle. The defense minister was known for promoting innovation on the battlefield through the use of drones that reportedly shifted dynamics against Russia. The article notes that this dismissal has drawn intense criticism. The summary is based on the information provided in the NPR News piece dated July 16, 2026.
summary.en: According to NPR News, Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has dismissed the country's defense minister amid a government reshuffle. The defense minister was known for promoting innovation on the battlefield through the use of drones that reportedly shifted dynamics against Russia. The article notes that this dismissal has drawn intense criticism. The summary is based on the information provided in the NPR News piece dated July 16, 2026.
summary.zh: NPR新闻报道，乌克兰总统泽连斯基在政府改组中解除了国防部长职务。该部长因推动无人机创新改变对俄战局而闻名，此举引发强烈批评。报道时间为2026年7月16日。
summary.es: Según NPR News, el presidente ucraniano Volodymyr Zelensky ha destituido al ministro de Defensa en medio de una reestructuración gubernamental. El ministro era conocido por promover la innovación militar mediante drones que habrían cambiado la dinámica contra Rusia. La destitución ha generado críticas intensas, según el artículo del 16 de julio de 2026.

title.original: Dozens Are Rescued in Texas Flash Floods as Rain Intensifies
title.en: Dozens Are Rescued in Texas Flash Floods as Rain Intensifies
title.zh: 德州暴雨成灾，数十人获救
title.es: Decenas son rescatadas en Texas por inundaciones repentinas mientras la lluvia se intensifica

summary.original: According to the New York Times, more than 75 people have been rescued amid intensifying flash floods in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott issued a disaster declarations covering 59 counties as heavy rains continue to impact the state. The article highlights ongoing emergency responses but does not provide further details on duration or damage. This briefing is source-limited to the information in the article.
summary.en: According to the New York Times, more than 75 people have been rescued amid intensifying flash floods in Texas. Governor Greg Abbott issued a disaster declarations covering 59 counties as heavy rains continue to impact the state. The article highlights ongoing emergency responses but does not provide further details on duration or damage. This briefing is source-limited to the information in the article.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》报道，德州暴雨加剧，超过75人获救。州长格雷格·阿博特对59个县发布灾难声明，紧急响应持续。报道未披露持续时间及损失细节。
summary.es: Según The New York Times, más de 75 personas han sido rescatadas ante la intensificación de inundaciones repentinas en Texas. El gobernador Greg Abbott declaró desastre en 59 condados mientras continúan las lluvias fuertes. El artículo resalta la respuesta de emergencia sin detallar duración o daños.

title.original: ‘La Puta Vida,’ Starring ‘One Hundred Years of Solitude’ Lead Claudio Cataño, Commences Filming in Chile (EXCLUSIVE)
title.en: ‘La Puta Vida,’ Starring ‘One Hundred Years of Solitude’ Lead Claudio Cataño, Commences Filming in Chile (EXCLUSIVE)
title.zh: 《La Puta Vida》开拍，主演是《百年孤独》领衔克劳迪奥·卡塔诺（独家）
title.es: ‘La Puta Vida’, protagonizada por Claudio Cataño de ‘One Hundred Years of Solitude’, inicia filmación en Chile (EXCLUSIVO)

summary.original: Variety reports that filming has begun on "La Puta Vida," a new international feature film starring Colombian actor Claudio Cataño, known for his role in Netflix's "One Hundred Years of Solitude." The project is a five-country co-production led by Colombia's Red Collision Studios and Chile's Afro Films, with Chilean filmmaker Sebastián Araya Serrano directing. The film also features Germany's Christine Neubauer and Chilean actor Tamara Acosta. This summary reflects the details provided in the source.
summary.en: Variety reports that filming has begun on "La Puta Vida," a new international feature film starring Colombian actor Claudio Cataño, known for his role in Netflix's "One Hundred Years of Solitude." The project is a five-country co-production led by Colombia's Red Collision Studios and Chile's Afro Films, with Chilean filmmaker Sebastián Araya Serrano directing. The film also features Germany's Christine Neubauer and Chilean actor Tamara Acosta. This summary reflects the details provided in the source.
summary.zh: 《综艺》报道，哥伦比亚演员克劳迪奥·卡塔诺主演的新国际影片《La Puta Vida》已在智利开拍。该片由五国联合制作，哥伦比亚Red Collision Studios和智利Afro Films牵头，导演为智利的塞巴斯蒂安·阿拉亚·塞拉诺。其他演员包括德国的克里斯汀·诺伊鲍尔和智利演员塔玛拉·阿科斯塔。总结基于报道内容。
summary.es: Variety informa que comenzó la filmación de "La Puta Vida", una nueva película internacional protagonizada por el actor colombiano Claudio Cataño, conocido por su papel en la serie de Netflix "One Hundred Years of Solitude". El proyecto es una coproducción de cinco países liderada por Red Collision Studios de Colombia y Afro Films de Chile, con el director chileno Sebastián Araya Serrano. También participan Christine Neubauer de Alemania y la actriz chilena Tamara Acosta. El resumen refleja los detalles de la fuente.

title.original: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
title.en: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
title.zh: 英国钢铁国有化以保护英国“关键”供应
title.es: British Steel pasa a propiedad pública para proteger el suministro 'vital' del Reino Unido

summary.original: The BBC reports that British Steel's Scunthorpe steelworks has been taken into public ownership as part of a government effort to protect jobs and maintain a vital national steel production capability. The plant employs about 2,700 people and supports many others in the supply chain. The nationalisation follows recent government legislation permitting public ownership under a public interest test. British Steel was previously owned by China's Jingye Group; Jingye is seeking compensation for the nationalisation. The government aims to keep the blast furnaces open because they produce the UK's last remaining source of virgin steel, essential for industries like Network Rail and construction. The furnaces are old, and stopping them could lead to costly and difficult restarts. The government acknowledges that running costs are high, and nationalisation is likely a temporary measure. Unite's general secretary called nationalisation a first step toward transforming the steel industry with green investments. This summary is based on the detailed information in the article.
summary.en: The BBC reports that British Steel's Scunthorpe steelworks has been taken into public ownership as part of a government effort to protect jobs and maintain a vital national steel production capability. The plant employs about 2,700 people and supports many others in the supply chain. The nationalisation follows recent government legislation permitting public ownership under a public interest test. British Steel was previously owned by China's Jingye Group; Jingye is seeking compensation for the nationalisation. The government aims to keep the blast furnaces open because they produce the UK's last remaining source of virgin steel, essential for industries like Network Rail and construction. The furnaces are old, and stopping them could lead to costly and difficult restarts. The government acknowledges that running costs are high, and nationalisation is likely a temporary measure. Unite's general secretary called nationalisation a first step toward transforming the steel industry with green investments. This summary is based on the detailed information in the article.
summary.zh: BBC报道，英国钢铁的斯肯索普钢铁厂已被政府收归国有，以保护就业和维护关键的国家钢铁生产能力。该厂约有2700名员工，并支持供应链中的许多其他岗位。国有化是依据近期允许公共利益测试下国有所有权的法规进行的。此前，英国钢铁由中国敬业集团拥有，敬业集团正在寻求赔偿。政府希望保持高炉运行，因为它们生产英国最后的原生钢，关键行业如铁路和建筑依赖这些钢材。高炉设备老化，停炉可能导致重启困难且成本高昂。政府承认运营成本高，国有化可能是暂时措施。工会领导将国有化视为通过绿色投资改造钢铁产业的第一步。此摘要基于文章详细信息。
summary.es: La BBC informa que la planta de acero British Steel en Scunthorpe ha sido nacionalizada como parte de un esfuerzo gubernamental para proteger empleos y mantener una capacidad vital de producción nacional de acero. La planta emplea a unas 2,700 personas y apoya a muchos más en la cadena de suministro. La nacionalización sigue una legislación reciente que permite la propiedad pública bajo una prueba de interés público. British Steel pertenecía anteriormente al grupo chino Jingye, que busca compensación por la nacionalización. El gobierno busca mantener los altos hornos abiertos porque producen la última fuente de acero virgen del Reino Unido, esencial para industrias como Network Rail y construcción. Los hornos son antiguos y detenerlos podría implicar reinicios costosos y difíciles. El gobierno reconoce que los costos operativos son altos y que la nacionalización probablemente sea temporal. El secretario general de Unite calificó la nacionalización como un primer paso para transformar la industria del acero con inversiones verdes. Este resumen se basa en la información detallada del artículo.

title.original: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
title.en: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
title.zh: 乌克兰多市抗议泽连斯基免去国防部长职位
title.es: Protestas en ciudades ucranianas contra el despido del ministro de Defensa por Zelensky

summary.original: The BBC reports that protests have arisen in multiple Ukrainian cities opposing President Volodymyr Zelensky's dismissal of Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Protesters in Kyiv held signs and chanted slogans critical of the decision. Zelensky has not explained the dismissal, which has caused upset among the military and civil society. Fedorov, who was appointed in January, was known for reform efforts, including anti-corruption measures, and modernizing the ministry with technology such as drones and cyber operations. There are reports of internal tensions between Fedorov and military leadership, specifically Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi. Fedorov indicated he declined an advisory position and expressed hope that Zelensky would resolve the situation. Significant figures including soldiers and government advisers have criticized the dismissal, and some have resigned in protest. The firing is considered by some as detrimental to Ukraine's defense efforts. This summary is drawn from the details in the article.
summary.en: The BBC reports that protests have arisen in multiple Ukrainian cities opposing President Volodymyr Zelensky's dismissal of Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Protesters in Kyiv held signs and chanted slogans critical of the decision. Zelensky has not explained the dismissal, which has caused upset among the military and civil society. Fedorov, who was appointed in January, was known for reform efforts, including anti-corruption measures, and modernizing the ministry with technology such as drones and cyber operations. There are reports of internal tensions between Fedorov and military leadership, specifically Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi. Fedorov indicated he declined an advisory position and expressed hope that Zelensky would resolve the situation. Significant figures including soldiers and government advisers have criticized the dismissal, and some have resigned in protest. The firing is considered by some as detrimental to Ukraine's defense efforts. This summary is drawn from the details in the article.
summary.zh: BBC报道，乌克兰多个城市爆发抗议活动，反对总统泽连斯基解除国防部长费多罗夫的职务。基辅的抗议者举牌并高呼反对口号。泽连斯基未公开说明解职原因，引发军方和社会不满。费多罗夫自今年一月起任职，推动反腐和技术现代化改革。报道指其与军方领导，尤其是总司令西尔斯基存在内部紧张。费多罗夫表示拒绝顾问职位，并希望泽连斯基解决局势。多位士兵和政府顾问批评该决定，其中一些人辞职抗议。部分人认为此举损害乌克兰防务。此摘要基于文章细节。
summary.es: La BBC informa que en varias ciudades de Ucrania se han producido protestas contra el despido del ministro de Defensa Mykhailo Fedorov por parte del presidente Volodymyr Zelensky. Los manifestantes en Kyiv sostenían carteles y coreaban consignas críticas a la decisión. Zelensky no ha explicado el despido, que ha generado malestar entre militares y sociedad civil. Fedorov, nombrado en enero, era conocido por sus reformas anticorrupción y la modernización del ministerio con tecnología como drones y operaciones cibernéticas. Se reportan tensiones internas entre Fedorov y el mando militar, especialmente con el comandante en jefe Oleksandr Syrskyi. Fedorov declinó un puesto asesor y espera que Zelensky resuelva la situación. Figuras destacadas, incluyendo soldados y asesores gubernamentales, han criticado el despido, y algunos han renunciado en protesta. Algunos consideran que el despido perjudica la defensa de Ucrania. Este resumen se basa en los detalles del artículo.

title.original: Sheikh Hasina’s return bid threatens to upend Bangladeshi politics
title.en: Sheikh Hasina’s return bid threatens to upend Bangladeshi politics
title.zh: 谢赫·哈西娜归国计划威胁颠覆孟加拉政治
title.es: La intención de regreso de Sheikh Hasina amenaza con alterar la política de Bangladesh

summary.original: The article from SCMP News reports that Sheikh Hasina, the ousted former prime minister of Bangladesh, plans to return to Bangladesh in December despite facing a death sentence. The tribunal sentenced her to death after finding her guilty of incitement and failure to stop atrocities linked to a student-led protest movement that toppled her government nearly two years ago. Hasina has been living in India since her ousting and has expressed willingness to return even if arrested or killed. Analysts suggest her return could dramatically revive the rivalry between her banned Awami League and the ruling Bangladesh Nationalist Party, while also limiting gains for Islamist political forces. Current Prime Minister Tarique Rahman's BNP won a landslide victory in February's general election, with Jamaat-e-Islami securing the second-most seats. This summary is source-limited to the details in the provided article text.
summary.en: The article from SCMP News reports that Sheikh Hasina, the ousted former prime minister of Bangladesh, plans to return to Bangladesh in December despite facing a death sentence. The tribunal sentenced her to death after finding her guilty of incitement and failure to stop atrocities linked to a student-led protest movement that toppled her government nearly two years ago. Hasina has been living in India since her ousting and has expressed willingness to return even if arrested or killed. Analysts suggest her return could dramatically revive the rivalry between her banned Awami League and the ruling Bangladesh Nationalist Party, while also limiting gains for Islamist political forces. Current Prime Minister Tarique Rahman's BNP won a landslide victory in February's general election, with Jamaat-e-Islami securing the second-most seats. This summary is source-limited to the details in the provided article text.
summary.zh: 南华早报报道，被罢黜的孟加拉前总理谢赫·哈西娜计划于12月回国，尽管面临死刑判决。法庭判处其死刑，罪名是煽动和未阻止与学生领导抗议运动相关的暴行，该运动近两年前推翻了她的政府。哈西娜自被罢黜后居住在印度，表示即使被逮捕或杀害也愿意返回。分析人士认为，她的回归可能激化被禁的阿瓦米联盟与执政的孟加拉民族党之间的竞争，同时限制伊斯兰政治力量的增长。现任总理塔里克·拉赫曼领导的孟加拉民族党在今年2月的大选中赢得压倒性胜利，伊斯兰阵线贾马特获得第二多席位。此摘要仅限于提供文章中的信息。
summary.es: El artículo de SCMP informa que Sheikh Hasina, ex primera ministra destituida de Bangladesh, planea regresar al país en diciembre a pesar de enfrentar una sentencia de muerte. El tribunal la condenó por incitación y por no detener las atrocidades vinculadas a un movimiento de protesta estudiantil que derrocó su gobierno hace casi dos años. Hasina ha vivido en India desde su destitución y ha expresado disposición a regresar incluso si la arrestan o matan. Analistas sugieren que su retorno podría reavivar dramáticamente la rivalidad entre la prohibida Liga Awami y el gobernante Partido Nacionalista de Bangladesh, además de limitar las ganancias de fuerzas políticas islamistas. El actual primer ministro Tarique Rahman y su BNP ganaron una victoria aplastante en las elecciones generales de febrero, con Jamaat-e-Islami obteniendo el segundo mayor número de escaños. Este resumen se limita a los detalles del artículo proporcionado.

title.original: The political risks from war in Iran. And, ICE's use of force is rising, report finds
title.en: The political risks from war in Iran. And, ICE's use of force is rising, report finds
title.zh: 伊朗战争带来的政治风险，以及ICE施暴行为升高，报告指出
title.es: Los riesgos políticos de la guerra en Irán y aumento del uso de fuerza por parte de ICE, según informe

summary.original: According to an NPR News report, the United States is engaged in military conflict with Iran, with President Trump notifying Congress of renewed war, triggering a 60-day period for continued military action without further congressional approval. The conflict's political implications may influence the November midterm elections, as changes in gas prices could affect voter sentiment. The GOP base largely supports Trump’s framing of the conflict despite general public opposition. Jay Clayton, Trump's nominee for director of national intelligence, underwent Senate questioning regarding his stance on the 2020 election and independence from the president. In a separate confirmation hearing, Todd Blanche faced questions about Justice Department controversies. Additionally, the American Civil Liberties Union released a report showing Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers used force in nearly one-third of over 1,200 enforcement operations examined, involving tactics like tackling, chemical irritants, rubber bullets, and tasers. This summary sticks to the information presented in the article and does not include external context.
summary.en: According to an NPR News report, the United States is engaged in military conflict with Iran, with President Trump notifying Congress of renewed war, triggering a 60-day period for continued military action without further congressional approval. The conflict's political implications may influence the November midterm elections, as changes in gas prices could affect voter sentiment. The GOP base largely supports Trump’s framing of the conflict despite general public opposition. Jay Clayton, Trump's nominee for director of national intelligence, underwent Senate questioning regarding his stance on the 2020 election and independence from the president. In a separate confirmation hearing, Todd Blanche faced questions about Justice Department controversies. Additionally, the American Civil Liberties Union released a report showing Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers used force in nearly one-third of over 1,200 enforcement operations examined, involving tactics like tackling, chemical irritants, rubber bullets, and tasers. This summary sticks to the information presented in the article and does not include external context.
summary.zh: 据NPR报道，美国与伊朗爆发军事冲突，特朗普总统已通知国会重新开启战争，触发60天的军事行动期，无需国会再次批准。冲突的政治影响可能左右11月中期选举，因油价变动或影响选民意向。共和党基底大体支持特朗普的冲突表述，尽管公众普遍反对。特朗普提名的国家情报总监候选人杰伊·克莱顿接受参议院质询，讨论其对2020年选举和总统独立性的立场。另一项任命听证中，托德·布兰奇接受司法部争议相关提问。此外，美国公民自由联盟发布报告显示，在超过1200次执法行动中，移民与海关执法局官员近三成使用武力，包括擒抱、化学刺激剂、橡胶子弹和电击枪。此摘要仅基于文章内容。
summary.es: Según un informe de NPR, Estados Unidos está en conflicto militar con Irán, y el presidente Trump notificó al Congreso sobre una renovación de la guerra, activando un periodo de 60 días para acciones militares sin aprobación adicional. Las implicaciones políticas del conflicto podrían influir en las elecciones legislativas de noviembre, ya que cambios en los precios del gas podrían afectar la opinión de los votantes. La base republicana apoya mayormente la narrativa de Trump, pese a la oposición general pública. Jay Clayton, nominado por Trump para director de inteligencia nacional, fue interrogado en el Senado sobre sus posturas respecto a las elecciones de 2020 y su independencia del presidente. En una audiencia separada, Todd Blanche enfrentó preguntas sobre controversias en el Departamento de Justicia. La Unión Estadounidense por las Libertades Civiles publicó un informe donde se muestra que agentes de ICE usaron fuerza en casi un tercio de más de 1,200 operaciones analizadas, usando tácticas como tackling, irritantes químicos, balas de goma y tasers. Este resumen se limita a la información del artículo.

title.original: Retail Traders’ Rise Upends the Established Stock Market Order
title.en: Retail Traders’ Rise Upends the Established Stock Market Order
title.zh: 散户交易者崛起颠覆传统股市秩序
title.es: El auge de los traders minoristas trastorna el orden establecido del mercado bursátil

summary.original: The Bloomberg Markets article states that retail traders have shifted from the margins of the stock market to become a central force, fundamentally altering the established stock market order. The evidence is limited to this description and does not provide additional details about the nature or implications of this shift. Therefore, this summary is source-limited to the information given about retail traders' rising prominence in the stock market.
summary.en: The Bloomberg Markets article states that retail traders have shifted from the margins of the stock market to become a central force, fundamentally altering the established stock market order. The evidence is limited to this description and does not provide additional details about the nature or implications of this shift. Therefore, this summary is source-limited to the information given about retail traders' rising prominence in the stock market.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，散户交易者已从股市边缘走向核心力量，彻底改变了传统的股市秩序。报道内容限于此描述，未提供更多细节。
summary.es: El artículo de Bloomberg Markets indica que los traders minoristas han pasado de estar en los márgenes del mercado bursátil a convertirse en una fuerza central, alterando fundamentalmente el orden establecido. La evidencia se limita a esta descripción sin más detalles sobre la naturaleza o implicaciones de este cambio.

title.original: Dismissal of Ukraine's defence chief sparks political crisis
title.en: Dismissal of Ukraine's defence chief sparks political crisis
title.zh: 乌克兰国防部长被免引发政治危机
title.es: El despido del jefe de defensa de Ucrania desata crisis política

summary.original: A Reuters news item reports that the dismissal of Ukraine's defence chief has triggered a political crisis. No further details are provided in the given evidence. This briefing is source-limited due to the lack of additional information in the supplied text.
summary.en: A Reuters news item reports that the dismissal of Ukraine's defence chief has triggered a political crisis. No further details are provided in the given evidence. This briefing is source-limited due to the lack of additional information in the supplied text.
summary.zh: 路透新闻报道，乌克兰国防部长被免职引发政治危机。所提供内容未包含更多细节，摘要仅基于此。
summary.es: Un reporte de Reuters indica que la destitución del jefe de defensa de Ucrania ha provocado una crisis política. No se proporcionan más detalles en el texto suministrado; este resumen se limita a dicha información.

title.original: Mass Protests Across Ukraine Oppose Ouster of Defense Minister
title.en: Mass Protests Across Ukraine Oppose Ouster of Defense Minister
title.zh: 乌克兰大规模抗议反对国防部长被免职
title.es: Masivas protestas en toda Ucrania se oponen al destierro del Ministro de Defensa

summary.original: The New York Times reports mass protests across Ukraine where demonstrators oppose the ouster of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. The article says protesters are demanding Fedorov's reinstatement, highlighting his symbolic role in Ukraine's success with drone strikes against Russia. The briefing is source-limited as the evidence mainly emphasizes public reaction to Fedorov's removal.
summary.en: The New York Times reports mass protests across Ukraine where demonstrators oppose the ouster of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. The article says protesters are demanding Fedorov's reinstatement, highlighting his symbolic role in Ukraine's success with drone strikes against Russia. The briefing is source-limited as the evidence mainly emphasizes public reaction to Fedorov's removal.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》报道，乌克兰各地爆发大规模抗议，反对国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫被免职。抗议者要求恢复费多罗夫职务，称其在乌克兰使用无人机打击俄罗斯中具有象征意义。报道主要关注公众对费多罗夫被撤职的反应。
summary.es: The New York Times informa sobre masivas protestas en Ucrania contra la destitución del Ministro de Defensa Mykhailo Fedorov. Los manifestantes exigen su reincorporación, resaltando su papel simbólico en el éxito de ataques con drones contra Rusia. El informe se centra en la reacción pública a su destitución.

title.original: Utility Warns Blast at South Africa Water Plant to Hit Supply
title.en: Utility Warns Blast at South Africa Water Plant to Hit Supply
title.zh: 南非水厂爆炸威胁供水，公用事业部门发出警告
title.es: Empresa de servicios advierte que explosión en planta de agua de Sudáfrica afectará el suministro

summary.original: Bloomberg Markets reports that an explosion on power lines feeding a key water-pumping hub in South Africa threatens to disrupt water supply to parts of Johannesburg, South Africa's commercial hub, and nearby platinum- and gold-mining towns. The supplier described is the continent's biggest bulk-water provider. This briefing is source-limited, reflecting the event's potential impact on water availability in affected regions.
summary.en: Bloomberg Markets reports that an explosion on power lines feeding a key water-pumping hub in South Africa threatens to disrupt water supply to parts of Johannesburg, South Africa's commercial hub, and nearby platinum- and gold-mining towns. The supplier described is the continent's biggest bulk-water provider. This briefing is source-limited, reflecting the event's potential impact on water availability in affected regions.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，南非关键供水枢纽的电力线路爆炸可能扰乱约翰内斯堡及附近采矿城镇的水供应。该供水商为非洲最大散装供水提供者。报道仅限于事件对相关地区水资源供应的潜在影响。
summary.es: Bloomberg Markets reporta que una explosión en líneas eléctricas que alimentan una planta clave de bombeo de agua en Sudáfrica podría interrumpir el suministro a partes de Johannesburgo y ciudades mineras cercanas. El proveedor es el mayor distribuidor de agua a granel en el continente. El informe se limita al impacto potencial en la disponibilidad hídrica.

title.original: Middle East Bond Spreads Hit 2022 High as Ceasefire Breaks Down
title.en: Middle East Bond Spreads Hit 2022 High as Ceasefire Breaks Down
title.zh: 中东债券利差创2022年以来新高，停火破裂
title.es: Diferenciales de bonos en Medio Oriente alcanzan máximo desde 2022 tras ruptura del alto el fuego

summary.original: According to Bloomberg Markets, bond investors are demanding the highest compensation since October 2022 to fund Middle Eastern governments amid renewed fighting between the United States and Iran following a ceasefire breakdown. The article highlights rising bond spreads as a financial market response to escalating regional conflict. The briefing is source-limited to these details provided.
summary.en: According to Bloomberg Markets, bond investors are demanding the highest compensation since October 2022 to fund Middle Eastern governments amid renewed fighting between the United States and Iran following a ceasefire breakdown. The article highlights rising bond spreads as a financial market response to escalating regional conflict. The briefing is source-limited to these details provided.
summary.zh: 彭博市场称，随着美伊冲突加剧，债券投资者要求自2022年10月以来最高回报，以资助中东政府。债券利差上升反映金融市场对区域冲突升级的反应，报道限于提供的相关细节。
summary.es: Según Bloomberg Markets, la ruptura del alto el fuego y el renovado conflicto entre EE.UU. e Irán llevaron a que inversores de bonos exijan la compensación más alta desde octubre de 2022 para financiar gobiernos de Medio Oriente. El aumento en los diferenciales refleja la reacción de los mercados financieros ante el conflicto regional. El informe se limita a estos detalles.

title.original: Fraud crackdown on Ghana ID cards makes digital checks compulsory - photocopies banned
title.en: Fraud crackdown on Ghana ID cards makes digital checks compulsory - photocopies banned
title.zh: 加纳打击欺诈，身份证数字验证强制实施——禁止复印
title.es: Represión contra fraudes en Ghana: verificaciones digitales de tarjetas de identidad obligatorias y prohibición de fotocopias

summary.original: BBC World describes new fraud crackdown measures in Ghana requiring all businesses and institutions to verify national identity cards digitally via a biometric app scanner. The Ghana Card contains biometric data including fingerprints and iris scans. Photocopying or visual inspection of the card for transactions is now banned and considered an offense, with fines imposed on organizations and individuals who do not comply. The National Identification Authority urges immediate adoption of the digital verification process to strengthen security and curb identity theft. This briefing is based directly on the provided article text.
summary.en: BBC World describes new fraud crackdown measures in Ghana requiring all businesses and institutions to verify national identity cards digitally via a biometric app scanner. The Ghana Card contains biometric data including fingerprints and iris scans. Photocopying or visual inspection of the card for transactions is now banned and considered an offense, with fines imposed on organizations and individuals who do not comply. The National Identification Authority urges immediate adoption of the digital verification process to strengthen security and curb identity theft. This briefing is based directly on the provided article text.
summary.zh: BBC报道，加纳推出新规，要求所有机构通过生物识别应用扫描器对国家身份证进行数字验证。加纳卡含指纹和虹膜等生物数据，复印或仅目视检查身份证的行为被禁止并属违法，违规者将被罚款。国家身份管理局敦促立刻采用数字验证以加强安全，防止身份盗用。
summary.es: BBC World describe que Ghana implementa nuevas medidas contra fraudes que obligan a todas las instituciones a verificar digitalmente las tarjetas de identidad nacional mediante una aplicación biométrica. La Ghana Card contiene datos biométricos como huellas digitales y escaneo de iris. Se prohíbe hacer fotocopias o inspecciones visuales para transacciones, con multas a quienes no cumplan. La Autoridad Nacional de Identificación insta a adoptar de inmediato el proceso digital para mejorar la seguridad y prevenir robos de identidad.

title.original: 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient
title.en: 'Moment of joy' as Uganda discharges last Ebola patient
title.zh: 乌干达最后一名埃博拉病人出院，迎来“喜悦时刻”
title.es: ‘Momento de alegría’ tras dado de alta último paciente con ébola en Uganda

summary.original: Uganda has discharged its last Ebola patient from hospital, leaving the country with no active confirmed cases of the disease. This outbreak in Uganda involved the Bundibugyo species and began in May when the first case was confirmed in a man who traveled from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo), the epicentre of the outbreak. Uganda recorded 20 confirmed cases, mostly among visitors from DR Congo, and two deaths. In contrast, DR Congo has had more than 2,000 confirmed infections and 796 deaths. The Health Minister, Dr Chris Baryomunsi, called this development "a moment of joy" and emphasized that early detection and treatment can defeat Ebola. However, the ministry urges continued vigilance and advises people experiencing symptoms like fever and bleeding to seek immediate medical care. Uganda has established protocols including isolation and contact tracing. Meanwhile, DR Congo continues to battle the outbreak, which may have been undetected in communities for months. The World Health Organization suggests actual infections may be underreported. Additionally, the US has implemented a 21-day quarantine abroad for citizens returning from DR Congo. The item says Ebola spreads via bodily fluids and usually infects animals such as fruit bats initially.
summary.en: Uganda has discharged its last Ebola patient from hospital, leaving the country with no active confirmed cases of the disease. This outbreak in Uganda involved the Bundibugyo species and began in May when the first case was confirmed in a man who traveled from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DR Congo), the epicentre of the outbreak. Uganda recorded 20 confirmed cases, mostly among visitors from DR Congo, and two deaths. In contrast, DR Congo has had more than 2,000 confirmed infections and 796 deaths. The Health Minister, Dr Chris Baryomunsi, called this development "a moment of joy" and emphasized that early detection and treatment can defeat Ebola. However, the ministry urges continued vigilance and advises people experiencing symptoms like fever and bleeding to seek immediate medical care. Uganda has established protocols including isolation and contact tracing. Meanwhile, DR Congo continues to battle the outbreak, which may have been undetected in communities for months. The World Health Organization suggests actual infections may be underreported. Additionally, the US has implemented a 21-day quarantine abroad for citizens returning from DR Congo. The item says Ebola spreads via bodily fluids and usually infects animals such as fruit bats initially.
summary.zh: 乌干达已出院最后一名埃博拉患者，国内无活跃病例。本次爆发由Bundibugyo病毒株引起，于5月由来自刚果（金）的首例患者确诊，乌国共计20确诊病例和2例死亡。卫生部长称这是‘喜悦时刻’，并强调早期诊断和治疗可战胜埃博拉。卫生部门敦促持续警惕，出现发热出血症状者应立即就医。刚果（金）疫情仍严峻，疑有未报告感染。世界卫生组织认实际病例可能被低估。美国对来自刚果的公民实施21天隔离。埃博拉经体液传播，最初一般感染水果蝙蝠等动物。
summary.es: Uganda ha dado de alta a su último paciente con ébola, quedando sin casos activos. El brote fue causado por la cepa Bundibugyo, identificado en mayo en un hombre que viajó desde la República Democrática del Congo (epicentro). Uganda registró 20 casos y 2 muertes. El Ministro de Salud calificó esto como ‘un momento de alegría’, subrayando que la detección y tratamiento tempranos vencen al ébola. El Ministerio recomienda vigilancia continua y acudir al médico ante síntomas. RDC continúa luchando contra el brote, probablemente con infradeclaración. OMS indica que infecciones reales pueden ser mayores. EE.UU. impuso cuarentena de 21 días para sus ciudadanos provenientes de RDC. El ébola se transmite por fluidos corporales y suele infectar inicialmente a animales como murciélagos frugívoros.

title.original: Investigation into parking charges for drivers queuing at petrol stations
title.en: Investigation into parking charges for drivers queuing at petrol stations
title.zh: 英国竞争监管机构调查加油站排队司机停车收费
title.es: Investigación sobre cargos por estacionamiento a conductores haciendo fila en estaciones de gasolina

summary.original: The UK's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is investigating Euro Car Parks, one of the largest private parking operators, over the fairness of parking charges imposed on drivers queuing at petrol stations. The inquiry also examines Euro Car Parks' broader appeals process related to petrol stations and other car parks to determine compliance with consumer protection law. This investigation is part of a wider CMA crackdown on potentially unfair practices by private parking firms. Research by the RAC indicates that parking ticket issuance in various locations like gyms and supermarkets has more than doubled over six years, reaching 14.4 million. Motorists have reported issues such as unclear signage, faulty apps, and broken ticket machines. The CMA highlighted concerns about operators' appeals handling and extra fees charged beyond parking charges. The regulator has sent warnings and an open letter to the sector urging review of terms and conditions to ensure legal compliance. The probe into Euro Car Parks will run until spring 2027. Euro Car Parks manages over 3,000 sites in the UK and Ireland, with more than two million vehicles daily. The CMA's executive director emphasized the need for a clear and consistent appeals process to treat motorists fairly.
summary.en: The UK's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is investigating Euro Car Parks, one of the largest private parking operators, over the fairness of parking charges imposed on drivers queuing at petrol stations. The inquiry also examines Euro Car Parks' broader appeals process related to petrol stations and other car parks to determine compliance with consumer protection law. This investigation is part of a wider CMA crackdown on potentially unfair practices by private parking firms. Research by the RAC indicates that parking ticket issuance in various locations like gyms and supermarkets has more than doubled over six years, reaching 14.4 million. Motorists have reported issues such as unclear signage, faulty apps, and broken ticket machines. The CMA highlighted concerns about operators' appeals handling and extra fees charged beyond parking charges. The regulator has sent warnings and an open letter to the sector urging review of terms and conditions to ensure legal compliance. The probe into Euro Car Parks will run until spring 2027. Euro Car Parks manages over 3,000 sites in the UK and Ireland, with more than two million vehicles daily. The CMA's executive director emphasized the need for a clear and consistent appeals process to treat motorists fairly.
summary.zh: 英国竞争与市场管理局调查欧洲停车场公司对加油站排队司机收费的公平性，并审查其对加油站及其他停车场的申诉程序，以评估是否符合法规。此举是监管机构对私营停车运营商潜在不公平行为的整治行动。RAC数据显示，近六年停车罚单数量翻倍，达1440万。司机反映标识不清、软件故障及出票机坏等问题。监管局关注申诉流程和额外费用，并向行业发出警告信，敦促修订条款确保合法。调查预计持续至2027年春，欧洲停车场公司每天管理逾200万辆车的3000多个场地。监管总监强调需统一透明的申诉机制，保障司机权益。
summary.es: La Autoridad de Competencia y Mercados del Reino Unido investiga a Euro Car Parks, uno de los mayores operadores privados, sobre la equidad de los cargos de estacionamiento para conductores que hacen fila en estaciones de gasolina. La investigación también analiza el proceso de apelaciones de Euro Car Parks en estaciones y otros aparcamientos para verificar el cumplimiento de la ley de protección al consumidor. Esto forma parte de una acción más amplia contra prácticas potencialmente injustas de empresas de estacionamiento privado. Datos de RAC indican que las multas se han duplicado en seis años, alcanzando 14.4 millones. Conductores han reportado señalización confusa, fallas en apps y máquinas rotas. El regulador advirtió sobre problemas en apelaciones y cargos extras, enviando una carta abierta al sector para revisar términos y condiciones. La pesquisa continuará hasta primavera de 2027. Euro Car Parks gestiona más de 3,000 sitios en Reino Unido e Irlanda, con más de dos millones de vehículos diarios. El director ejecutivo del regulador enfatizó la necesidad de un proceso claro y consistente de apelaciones para tratar justamente a los conductores.

title.original: Indonesian migrant fishers hooked by false promises, reeled into slavery on high seas
title.en: Indonesian migrant fishers hooked by false promises, reeled into slavery on high seas
title.zh: 印尼移民渔民被虚假承诺诱骗，高海上沦为奴工
title.es: Pescadores migrantes indonesios atrapados por falsas promesas, enganchados a la esclavitud en alta mar

summary.original: According to the item, Indonesian migrant fishers, such as Akhmad who left Cirebon in 2022, are recruited with promises of good pay to work on foreign fishing vessels but instead endure abuse and exploitation at sea. Many Indonesian workers are deployed on foreign-flagged ships, particularly Chinese vessels operating off West Africa, without being properly informed of their rights, making them vulnerable to mistreatment. Akhmad, age 25, describes working on a Chinese-flagged tuna fishing vessel where he gets as little as four hours of rest daily and faces continuous work with no breaks. Crew members suffer verbal and physical abuse, including incidents where captains physically punish crew accused of stealing fish. Communication with the outside world is very limited for the workers. The item says abuse and mismanagement are systemic issues on these vessels according to a nongovernmental organization.
summary.en: According to the item, Indonesian migrant fishers, such as Akhmad who left Cirebon in 2022, are recruited with promises of good pay to work on foreign fishing vessels but instead endure abuse and exploitation at sea. Many Indonesian workers are deployed on foreign-flagged ships, particularly Chinese vessels operating off West Africa, without being properly informed of their rights, making them vulnerable to mistreatment. Akhmad, age 25, describes working on a Chinese-flagged tuna fishing vessel where he gets as little as four hours of rest daily and faces continuous work with no breaks. Crew members suffer verbal and physical abuse, including incidents where captains physically punish crew accused of stealing fish. Communication with the outside world is very limited for the workers. The item says abuse and mismanagement are systemic issues on these vessels according to a nongovernmental organization.
summary.zh: 据报道，印尼移民渔民如阿赫马德（2022年离开錫雷邦）被承诺高薪前往外国渔船工作，实则在海上遭受虐待和剥削。许多印尼工人被派遣到外国旗帜船只，尤其是中国船只在西非海域作业，他们未被充分告知权利，容易受到不公待遇。25岁的阿赫马德描述他在一艘中国籍金枪鱼渔船上每天仅休息4小时，连续作业无休息，船员遭受语言和身体虐待，船长会惩罚被指偷鱼的船员。船员与外界沟通非常有限。非政府组织称，这种虐待和管理不善是系统性问题。
summary.es: Según el informe, pescadores migrantes indonesios como Akhmad, que dejó Cirebon en 2022, son reclutados con promesas de buen salario para trabajar en barcos pesqueros extranjeros, pero en cambio sufren abuso y explotación en el mar. Muchos trabajadores indonesios son asignados a barcos con bandera extranjera, especialmente chinos operando frente a África Occidental, sin recibir información adecuada sobre sus derechos, lo que los hace vulnerables al maltrato. Akhmad, de 25 años, describe trabajar en un barco chino de pesca de atún con solo cuatro horas diarias de descanso y trabajo continuo sin pausas. La tripulación sufre abusos verbales y físicos, incluyendo castigos físicos por parte de capitanes a quienes acusan de robar pescado. La comunicación con el exterior es muy limitada. Según una ONG, estos abusos y mala gestión son problemas sistémicos en estas embarcaciones.

title.original: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
title.en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
title.zh: TikTok面临Ofcom对儿童年龄验证的调查
title.es: TikTok enfrenta investigación de Ofcom por controles de edad infantil

summary.original: Ofcom, the UK media regulator, has launched an investigation into TikTok to assess whether the platform is doing enough to keep children off its service and protect them from harmful content. The probe follows a May review that found TikTok was not "safe enough" for children, highlighting concerns over its use of "age inference" technology, which estimates users' ages based on their platform activity. Ofcom has serious doubts about the effectiveness of such methods for age verification. TikTok defends its compliance with the UK's Online Safety Act, stating it uses advanced age inference technologies and places UK users under 18 into age-appropriate experiences by default. The regulator's investigation comes amid a broader clampdown on sites failing to prevent children from accessing adult content, with severe fines already imposed on some adult sites for non-compliance. The Online Safety Act requires platforms to employ highly effective age checks, including measures such as face scans for users over 18. Experts and child safety advocates welcome the investigation but call for stronger enforcement and penalties to ensure child protection online. TikTok has invested heavily in online safety since launching in the UK, according to the platform's spokesperson.
summary.en: Ofcom, the UK media regulator, has launched an investigation into TikTok to assess whether the platform is doing enough to keep children off its service and protect them from harmful content. The probe follows a May review that found TikTok was not "safe enough" for children, highlighting concerns over its use of "age inference" technology, which estimates users' ages based on their platform activity. Ofcom has serious doubts about the effectiveness of such methods for age verification. TikTok defends its compliance with the UK's Online Safety Act, stating it uses advanced age inference technologies and places UK users under 18 into age-appropriate experiences by default. The regulator's investigation comes amid a broader clampdown on sites failing to prevent children from accessing adult content, with severe fines already imposed on some adult sites for non-compliance. The Online Safety Act requires platforms to employ highly effective age checks, including measures such as face scans for users over 18. Experts and child safety advocates welcome the investigation but call for stronger enforcement and penalties to ensure child protection online. TikTok has invested heavily in online safety since launching in the UK, according to the platform's spokesperson.
summary.zh: 英国媒体监管机构Ofcom对TikTok展开调查，评估其是否充分阻止儿童使用平台并保护其免受有害内容影响。去年五月评审发现TikTok对儿童“不够安全”，质疑其基于平台活动推断年龄的技术效果。TikTok称遵守英国《在线安全法》，采用先进年龄推断技术，自动为18岁以下英国用户提供适龄体验。此次调查发生在加强防止儿童接触成人内容的行动中，法规要求平台实施包括18岁以上用户面部扫描的严格年龄验证。专家欢迎调查，同时呼吁更强执法与处罚。TikTok发言人称自英国上线以来在网络安全投入巨大。
summary.es: Ofcom, el regulador de medios del Reino Unido, ha iniciado una investigación sobre TikTok para evaluar si la plataforma protege adecuadamente a los niños y los mantiene alejados de contenido dañino. La revisión de mayo pasado encontró que TikTok no era "lo suficientemente seguro" para niños, cuestionando la eficacia de su tecnología de "inferencia de edad", que estima la edad según la actividad del usuario.
