TikTok defiende su cumplimiento con la Ley de Seguridad Online del Reino Unido, utilizando tecnologías avanzadas y asignando experiencias adecuadas a usuarios británicos menores de 18 años. La investigación ocurre en medio de una mayor regulación que exige controles efectivos de edad, incluyendo escaneos faciales para mayores de 18. Expertos aplauden la pesquisa pero piden mayor cumplimiento y sanciones. TikTok afirma haber invertido mucho en seguridad online desde su lanzamiento en Reino Unido.

title.original: Shanghai synergises computing centres with grid in power infrastructure upgrade
title.en: Shanghai synergises computing centres with grid in power infrastructure upgrade
title.zh: 上海协调计算中心与电网升级电力基础设施
title.es: Shanghai sincroniza centros de computación con red eléctrica en mejora de infraestructura

summary.original: Shanghai has pioneered a coordinated system linking computing centres with the power grid to manage peak electricity load, a first in China. The trial, led by the State Grid's Shanghai subsidiary, achieved a peak load reduction of 97.8 megawatts during a two-hour period, according to Jiefang Daily. This adjustment of computing power load is described as the largest at a city level in China. It involved 16 data centre operators including Alibaba, China Telecom Shanghai, and GDS Holdings. The approach involved modulating data centres' power use, switching to backup diesel generators if needed, and shifting computing tasks to other regions to reduce grid strain. This move is part of China's effort to view computing power as a national utility amid rising power demands during the global AI race. Shanghai's trial marked the first instance of completing the entire technical pipeline of computing-grid coordination simultaneously in a Chinese city.
summary.en: Shanghai has pioneered a coordinated system linking computing centres with the power grid to manage peak electricity load, a first in China. The trial, led by the State Grid's Shanghai subsidiary, achieved a peak load reduction of 97.8 megawatts during a two-hour period, according to Jiefang Daily. This adjustment of computing power load is described as the largest at a city level in China. It involved 16 data centre operators including Alibaba, China Telecom Shanghai, and GDS Holdings. The approach involved modulating data centres' power use, switching to backup diesel generators if needed, and shifting computing tasks to other regions to reduce grid strain. This move is part of China's effort to view computing power as a national utility amid rising power demands during the global AI race. Shanghai's trial marked the first instance of completing the entire technical pipeline of computing-grid coordination simultaneously in a Chinese city.
summary.zh: 上海首创将计算中心与电网协同管理峰值负载，成为中国首例。国网上海公司主导试点，在两小时内减少峰值负载97.8兆瓦，为中国城市级最大规模。参与者包括阿里巴巴、中国电信上海分公司及GDS控股等16家数据中心运营商。方案通过调节数据中心用电、启用柴油备用发电机及任务迁移，有效缓解电网压力。此举体现中国在全球人工智能竞赛用电需求激增背景下，将算力视为国家级公用事业的战略。上海试点首次实现城市级计算-电网协调全技术链条。
summary.es: Shanghai ha implementado un sistema coordinado que conecta centros de computación con la red eléctrica para gestionar la carga máxima, siendo la primera experiencia en China. Liderado por la subsidiaria de State Grid en Shanghai, la prueba logró una reducción de carga máxima de 97.8 megavatios en dos horas, la mayor a nivel de ciudad en China. Participaron 16 operadores de centros de datos, incluidos Alibaba, China Telecom Shanghai y GDS Holdings. El método moduló el consumo eléctrico de los centros, activó generadores diésel de respaldo y desplazó tareas computacionales a otras regiones para aliviar la red. Esta iniciativa forma parte de la visión china de considerar la computación como un servicio nacional frente al aumento de demanda durante la competencia global de IA. La prueba de Shanghai fue la primera en completar la cadena técnica completa de coordinación computación-red a nivel urbano.

title.original: Greek islands face drought as tourist season hits
title.en: Greek islands face drought as tourist season hits
title.zh: 希腊诸岛面临干旱，旅游季节来袭
title.es: Islas griegas enfrentan sequía con llegada de temporada turística

summary.original: The briefing is source-limited. The evidence only provides the headline 'Greek islands face drought as tourist season hits' without additional details, preventing a fuller summary.
summary.en: The briefing is source-limited. The evidence only provides the headline 'Greek islands face drought as tourist season hits' without additional details, preventing a fuller summary.
summary.zh: 信息有限，仅有标题“希腊诸岛面临干旱，旅游季节来袭”，无法提供更详细摘要。
summary.es: La información es limitada; solo se dispone del titular "Islas griegas enfrentan sequía con llegada de temporada turística" sin detalles adicionales para resumir.

title.original: Global Opinion Shifts Toward Favoring China Over the U.S., Poll Finds
title.en: Global Opinion Shifts Toward Favoring China Over the U.S., Poll Finds
title.zh: 民调显示全球舆论倾向支持中国胜过美国
title.es: Encuesta revela cambio global de opinión a favor de China sobre EE.UU.

summary.original: An annual survey conducted by the Pew Research Center found that more countries expressed positive views toward China than toward the United States. The evidence does not specify which countries or regions were surveyed or the extent of the opinion shift, so details are limited to this factual finding.
summary.en: An annual survey conducted by the Pew Research Center found that more countries expressed positive views toward China than toward the United States. The evidence does not specify which countries or regions were surveyed or the extent of the opinion shift, so details are limited to this factual finding.
summary.zh: 皮尤研究中心年度调查显示，更多国家对中国持积极看法，超过对美国的支持。报道未详述调查国家或地区及转变幅度，仅限于该事实。
summary.es: Una encuesta anual del Pew Research Center encontró que más países expresan opiniones positivas hacia China que hacia Estados Unidos. No se especifican los países o regiones encuestados ni el grado del cambio, solo este hallazgo factual.

title.original: U.K. Nationalizes British Steel, Its Last Major Steel Mill
title.en: U.K. Nationalizes British Steel, Its Last Major Steel Mill
title.zh: 英国国有化最后一家大型钢铁厂英国钢铁公司
title.es: Reino Unido nacionaliza British Steel, su última gran acería

summary.original: The United Kingdom government has nationalized British Steel, which is the country's last major steel mill. Previously, the government intervened last year to prevent the steel mill's then-owner, Jingye Group, a Chinese company, from shutting down the operation. No private buyers came forward to take over the mill, leading to the government's acquisition.
summary.en: The United Kingdom government has nationalized British Steel, which is the country's last major steel mill. Previously, the government intervened last year to prevent the steel mill's then-owner, Jingye Group, a Chinese company, from shutting down the operation. No private buyers came forward to take over the mill, leading to the government's acquisition.
summary.zh: 英国政府已国有化英国钢铁公司，这是该国最后一家大型钢铁厂。去年政府曾介入阻止该厂中国业主敬业集团关闭工厂，无私营买家接手，促使政府最终收购。
summary.es: El gobierno del Reino Unido ha nacionalizado British Steel, la última gran acería del país. El año pasado, intervino para evitar que su entonces propietario chino, Jingye Group, cerrara la planta. Al no surgir compradores privados, el gobierno adquirió la empresa.

title.original: Dollar near one-month low as concerns over oil prices remain subdued
title.en: Dollar near one-month low as concerns over oil prices remain subdued
title.zh: 油价担忧不足，美元接近一个月低点
title.es: Dólar cerca de un mínimo de un mes mientras persisten preocupaciones leves sobre los precios del petróleo

summary.original: The article from Reuters reports that the U.S. dollar is near a one-month low, influenced by subdued concerns over oil prices. It does not provide detailed context or data but indicates that current market sentiment reflects relatively limited worry about oil price fluctuations affecting the dollar's strength.
summary.en: The article from Reuters reports that the U.S. dollar is near a one-month low, influenced by subdued concerns over oil prices. It does not provide detailed context or data but indicates that current market sentiment reflects relatively limited worry about oil price fluctuations affecting the dollar's strength.
summary.zh: 路透社报道，受油价担忧不强影响，美元接近一个月低点，市场情绪显示对油价波动对美元强弱影响的担忧较为有限。
summary.es: Reuters informa que el dólar estadounidense está cerca de un mínimo de un mes, influenciado por preocupaciones moderadas sobre los precios del petróleo. El sentimiento del mercado refleja una inquietud relativamente limitada sobre fluctuaciones petroleras afectando la fortaleza del dólar.

title.original: German far-right activist sent to men’s prison despite gender change
title.en: German far-right activist sent to men’s prison despite gender change
title.zh: 德国极右翼活动者尽管变性仍被送入男性监狱
title.es: Activista de extrema derecha alemana enviado a prisión de hombres pese a cambio de género

summary.original: German far-right activist Marla-Svenja Liebich, who legally changed gender to a woman in 2024 following the enactment of Germany's Self-Determination Act, was extradited from the Czech Republic to Germany. Upon arrival, she was initially placed in a women's prison in Chemnitz but was transferred the same day to a men's prison in Saxony. Officials said the decision was made by experts and prison management without the justice minister's involvement. Liebich was sentenced as a male in 2023 to an 18-month term for offences including incitement to hatred, insult, trespass, and defamation. The legal gender change has raised controversy about prison assignments in Germany.
summary.en: German far-right activist Marla-Svenja Liebich, who legally changed gender to a woman in 2024 following the enactment of Germany's Self-Determination Act, was extradited from the Czech Republic to Germany. Upon arrival, she was initially placed in a women's prison in Chemnitz but was transferred the same day to a men's prison in Saxony. Officials said the decision was made by experts and prison management without the justice minister's involvement. Liebich was sentenced as a male in 2023 to an 18-month term for offences including incitement to hatred, insult, trespass, and defamation. The legal gender change has raised controversy about prison assignments in Germany.
summary.zh: 德国极右翼活动者马拉-斯文贾·利比希2024年合法变性为女性后，从捷克被引渡回德国，最初被关押在化尔尼茨女子监狱，但当天被转至萨克森男性监狱。官方称此决定由专家和监狱管理层作出，未获司法部长参与。利比希2023年被以男性身份判处18个月监禁，罪名包括煽动仇恨及诽谤。法律性别变更引发德国监狱分配争议。
summary.es: La activista alemana de extrema derecha Marla-Svenja Liebich, quien cambió legalmente su género a mujer en 2024 tras la Ley de Autodeterminación de Alemania, fue extraditada desde la República Checa a Alemania. Inicialmente fue ubicada en una prisión de mujeres en Chemnitz, pero fue trasladada el mismo día a una prisión masculina en Sajonia. Funcionarios indicaron que la decisión fue tomada por expertos y la administración penitenciaria sin la participación del ministro de justicia. Liebich fue condenada en 2023 como hombre a 18 meses por delitos incluyendo incitación al odio, insultos y difamación. El cambio legal de género ha generado controversia sobre las asignaciones carcelarias en Alemania.

title.original: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz is a 'red line' and will resist until the end
title.en: Iran warns Strait of Hormuz is a 'red line' and will resist until the end
title.zh: 伊朗警告霍尔木兹海峡为“红线”，将坚持抵抗到底
title.es: Irán advierte que el estrecho de Ormuz es una 'línea roja' y resistirá hasta el final

summary.original: Reuters reports that Iran has declared the Strait of Hormuz a 'red line' and stated it will resist any threats to it until the end. The article does not elaborate further on the context or specific circumstances behind this warning.
summary.en: Reuters reports that Iran has declared the Strait of Hormuz a 'red line' and stated it will resist any threats to it until the end. The article does not elaborate further on the context or specific circumstances behind this warning.
summary.zh: 路透报道称，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡为“红线”，表示将抵抗任何威胁到底。文章未进一步阐述背景或具体情况。
summary.es: Reuters reporta que Irán ha declarado el estrecho de Ormuz como una 'línea roja' y afirmó que resistirá cualquier amenaza hasta el final. El artículo no proporciona más detalles sobre el contexto o las circunstancias específicas de esta advertencia.

title.original: Eleven people die in fire at Algerian children's care home
title.en: Eleven people die in fire at Algerian children's care home
title.zh: 阿尔及利亚儿童寄养所火灾致十一人死亡
title.es: Once personas mueren en incendio en hogar de cuidado infantil en Argelia

summary.original: Eleven people died in a fire at a foster care facility in Mohammadia, an eastern suburb of Algiers, Algeria, officials said. The country's civil protection department reported that 19 others were injured in the blaze, which started around 03:30 local time and took over three hours to extinguish. The cause of the fire and ages of the victims were not specified. Ten fire engines and 16 ambulances responded. Algeria has been experiencing a heatwave with nearly 1,000 fires recorded over the past week. President Abdelmadjid Tebboune expressed condolences, calling it a 'tragic loss,' and Prime Minister Sifi Ghrieb visited injured individuals in hospitals. Five people with special needs were taken to safety during the incident.
summary.en: Eleven people died in a fire at a foster care facility in Mohammadia, an eastern suburb of Algiers, Algeria, officials said. The country's civil protection department reported that 19 others were injured in the blaze, which started around 03:30 local time and took over three hours to extinguish. The cause of the fire and ages of the victims were not specified. Ten fire engines and 16 ambulances responded. Algeria has been experiencing a heatwave with nearly 1,000 fires recorded over the past week. President Abdelmadjid Tebboune expressed condolences, calling it a 'tragic loss,' and Prime Minister Sifi Ghrieb visited injured individuals in hospitals. Five people with special needs were taken to safety during the incident.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚东部郊区穆罕默迪亚一寄养机构发生火灾，官方称导致11人死亡，19人受伤。火灾于当地时间凌晨3:30左右起火，持续扑灭超过三小时，具体起因和受害者年龄未披露。应急部门出动十辆消防车和十六辆救护车。近期阿尔及利亚遭遇热浪，过去一周记录近千起火灾。总统阿卜杜勒马吉德·特布布恩表达哀悼，称为“悲剧性损失”，总理锡菲·格里布探望伤员。事故中五名特殊需求儿童被安全转移。
summary.es: Once personas murieron en un incendio en un centro de acogida infantil en Mohammadia, suburbio oriental de Argel, Argelia, según autoridades. El fuego comenzó alrededor de las 03:30 hora local y tardó más de tres horas en ser extinguido; causó 19 heridos. No se especificaron causas ni edades de las víctimas. Se movilizaron diez camiones de bomberos y dieciséis ambulancias. Argelia atraviesa una ola de calor con casi 1,000 incendios registrados en la última semana. El presidente Abdelmadjid Tebboune expresó condolencias y calificó la tragedia como una “pérdida trágica”. El primer ministro Sifi Ghrieb visitó a los heridos. Cinco niños con necesidades especiales fueron puestos a salvo durante el incidente.

title.original: US fires first shots in new tariffs offensive with 25% tax on most Brazil imports
title.en: US fires first shots in new tariffs offensive with 25% tax on most Brazil imports
title.zh: 美国对大部分巴西进口商品征收25%新关税，开启新关税攻势
title.es: EE.UU. dispara primeros tiros en nueva ofensiva arancelaria con impuesto del 25% a mayoría de importaciones brasileñas

summary.original: According to Reuters, the US has initiated new tariffs by imposing a 25% tax on most imports from Brazil. The article notes this as the first move in a fresh tariff offensive. Further details on which products are affected or the broader implications are not provided in the given evidence. This briefing is source-limited.
summary.en: According to Reuters, the US has initiated new tariffs by imposing a 25% tax on most imports from Brazil. The article notes this as the first move in a fresh tariff offensive. Further details on which products are affected or the broader implications are not provided in the given evidence. This briefing is source-limited.
summary.zh: 路透社报道，美国对大部分来自巴西的进口商品加征25%关税，标志新一轮关税攻势的开始。文章未详细说明受影响产品或更广泛影响，信息有限。
summary.es: Reuters informa que EE.UU. ha impuesto un arancel del 25% sobre la mayoría de las importaciones provenientes de Brasil, marcando el inicio de una nueva ofensiva arancelaria. No se detallan los productos afectados ni las implicaciones más amplias con la información disponible.

title.original: TSMC pledges extra US$100 billion for Arizona fab expansion amid soaring AI chip demand
title.en: TSMC pledges extra US$100 billion for Arizona fab expansion amid soaring AI chip demand
title.zh: 台积电承诺额外投资1000亿美元扩大亚利桑那晶圆厂，应对激增的AI芯片需求
title.es: TSMC promete 100.000 millones USD adicionales para expansión de fábrica en Arizona ante creciente demanda de chips AI

summary.original: The South China Morning Post reports that Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (TSMC) has pledged an additional US$100 billion to expand its manufacturing facilities in Arizona, increasing its total US investment to US$265 billion. TSMC Chairman CC Wei said the company plans to proceed "as fast as possible" with the new Arizona investment, which targets 2-nanometre and below technologies and advanced packaging fabs to meet strong multi-year demand from leading US customers amid booming AI chip demand. This additional investment is on top of a previous US$165 billion commitment from March 2025 for further fabs, packaging facilities, and a research and development center in Phoenix. The firm is also accelerating plans for a new wafer fab in Japan. These developments come after TSMC posted record-high profits in the second quarter, driven by the AI boom.
summary.en: The South China Morning Post reports that Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (TSMC) has pledged an additional US$100 billion to expand its manufacturing facilities in Arizona, increasing its total US investment to US$265 billion. TSMC Chairman CC Wei said the company plans to proceed "as fast as possible" with the new Arizona investment, which targets 2-nanometre and below technologies and advanced packaging fabs to meet strong multi-year demand from leading US customers amid booming AI chip demand. This additional investment is on top of a previous US$165 billion commitment from March 2025 for further fabs, packaging facilities, and a research and development center in Phoenix. The firm is also accelerating plans for a new wafer fab in Japan. These developments come after TSMC posted record-high profits in the second quarter, driven by the AI boom.
summary.zh: 南华早报报道，台湾半导体制造公司(TSMC)承诺在亚利桑那扩建制造设施，额外投资1000亿美元，使其对美总投资增至2650亿美元。董事长魏哲家表示公司计划“尽快”推进此项投资，聚焦2纳米及以下工艺和先进封装厂，满足美国顶级客户多年的强劲需求，尤其是AI芯片激增。此投资基于此前2025年3月承诺的1650亿美元，包括更多晶圆厂、封装厂和凤凰城研发中心。公司也加速日本新晶圆厂计划。此举来自第二季度创纪录利润，受AI热潮推动。
summary.es: South China Morning Post informa que Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (TSMC) ha prometido una inversión adicional de 100.000 millones de dólares para expandir sus instalaciones en Arizona, elevando su inversión total en EE.UU. a 265.000 millones de dólares. El presidente CC Wei comentó que la empresa avanzará "lo más rápido posible" con esta inversión, enfocada en tecnologías de 2 nanómetros y menores y fábricas avanzadas de empaque para satisfacer la fuerte demanda de clientes estadounidenses líder en los próximos años, impulsada por el auge de chips de IA. Esta inversión se suma a un compromiso previo de 165.000 millones anunciado en marzo de 2025 para más fábricas y centros R&D en Phoenix. Además, aceleran planes para una nueva fábrica en Japón. La decisión sigue a ganancias récord en el segundo trimestre, propiciadas por el auge de la IA.

title.original: What to Know About Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister
title.en: What to Know About Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister
title.zh: 关于乌克兰被免职国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫的了解
title.es: Qué saber sobre Mykhailo Fedorov, el destituido ministro de Defensa de Ucrania

summary.original: The New York Times article discusses Mykhailo Fedorov, identified as Ukraine's ousted defense minister. It remarks that Mr. Fedorov was known as the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. His replacement has led to street protests. No further details on the circumstances or his successor are provided in the evidence. This summary is source-limited.
summary.en: The New York Times article discusses Mykhailo Fedorov, identified as Ukraine's ousted defense minister. It remarks that Mr. Fedorov was known as the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. His replacement has led to street protests. No further details on the circumstances or his successor are provided in the evidence. This summary is source-limited.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》报道称米哈伊洛·费多罗夫是乌克兰被免职的国防部长，曾被视为乌克兰成功的无人机战争项目的年轻代表。他的更替引发了街头抗议。报道未提供更多细节。
summary.es: El artículo de The New York Times discute a Mykhailo Fedorov, identificado como el destituido ministro de Defensa de Ucrania. Fue conocido como el rostro joven del exitoso programa de guerra con drones de Ucrania. Su reemplazo ha provocado protestas en las calles. No se dan más detalles.

title.original: Who is the frontrunner to be the UK's next chancellor?
title.en: Who is the frontrunner to be the UK's next chancellor?
title.zh: 谁将成为英国下一任财政大臣？
title.es: ¿Quién es el favorito para ser el próximo canciller del Reino Unido?

summary.original: The BBC reports that Andy Burnham is set to become the next UK prime minister on 20 July 2026, following Sir Keir Starmer's resignation. Speculation continues over who will be appointed as chancellor, a key Treasury role. While Burnham's team says no decisions have been made, several names are under consideration. Shabana Mahmood, currently home secretary, is reportedly a frontrunner with some sources suggesting certainty of her appointment, though she reportedly wishes to remain home secretary to oversee asylum system changes. Ed Miliband, former Labour leader and current energy secretary, was earlier a favourite but some reports indicate his chances have lessened. Other possible candidates include Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper, Wes Streeting, Pat McFadden, and former Chancellor Rachel Reeves, who is unlikely to continue in the role. The new chancellor will face significant challenges including high debt, low growth, welfare reform, defense spending, and economic impacts from the US-Israel war with Iran. Official announcements are expected on Monday following Burnham's move into Downing Street.
summary.en: The BBC reports that Andy Burnham is set to become the next UK prime minister on 20 July 2026, following Sir Keir Starmer's resignation. Speculation continues over who will be appointed as chancellor, a key Treasury role. While Burnham's team says no decisions have been made, several names are under consideration. Shabana Mahmood, currently home secretary, is reportedly a frontrunner with some sources suggesting certainty of her appointment, though she reportedly wishes to remain home secretary to oversee asylum system changes. Ed Miliband, former Labour leader and current energy secretary, was earlier a favourite but some reports indicate his chances have lessened. Other possible candidates include Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper, Wes Streeting, Pat McFadden, and former Chancellor Rachel Reeves, who is unlikely to continue in the role. The new chancellor will face significant challenges including high debt, low growth, welfare reform, defense spending, and economic impacts from the US-Israel war with Iran. Official announcements are expected on Monday following Burnham's move into Downing Street.
summary.zh: BBC报道安迪·伯纳姆将于2026年7月20日成为英国首相，接替基尔·斯塔默。财政大臣人选尚未确定，前居家大臣沙巴纳·马哈茂德被视为前锋，但她希望继续负责庇护体系改革。前工党领导人埃德·米利班德机会减少。其他候选人包括外交大臣伊薇特·库珀、韦斯·斯特里廷等。新财政大臣将面临债务、经济增长、福利改革和美以伊战争影响等挑战，官方宣布预计在伯纳姆就任后公布。
summary.es: La BBC informa que Andy Burnham será el próximo primer ministro del Reino Unido el 20 de julio de 2026 tras la renuncia de Sir Keir Starmer. Aún se especula quién será el canciller, un rol clave. Shabana Mahmood, actual secretaria del Interior, es favorita pero desea seguir supervisando cambios en el sistema de asilo. Ed Miliband, exlíder laborista, vio disminuir sus opciones. Otros candidatos incluyen a Yvette Cooper, Wes Streeting y otros. El nuevo canciller enfrentará desafíos como alta deuda, bajo crecimiento y efectos económicos del conflicto EE.UU.-Israel-Irán.

title.original: Wildfire Smoke Turns Skies Orange Across the U.S., and Democrats Make a Big Shift on Israel
title.en: Wildfire Smoke Turns Skies Orange Across the U.S., and Democrats Make a Big Shift on Israel

title.es: El humo de incendios forestales torna los cielos de EE.UU. naranjas, y los demócratas cambian drásticamente su postura sobre Israel

summary.original: The New York Times reports that wildfire smoke is turning skies orange across the U.S., highlighting a significant environmental event. Additionally, the piece notes a considerable shift among Democrats regarding Israel. The source also mentions that Generation Z is increasingly turning to trade schools. This summary is based on the podcast episode title and description, and the briefing is source-limited as the detailed article text is not provided.
summary.en: The New York Times reports that wildfire smoke is turning skies orange across the U.S., highlighting a significant environmental event. Additionally, the piece notes a considerable shift among Democrats regarding Israel. The source also mentions that Generation Z is increasingly turning to trade schools. This summary is based on the podcast episode title and description, and the briefing is source-limited as the detailed article text is not provided.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》报道野火烟雾使美国天空呈现橙色，显示重大环境事件。同时，民主党在以色列问题上发生显著转变。Z世代更多选择职业学校。内容基于播客标题和描述，文章全文未提供。
summary.es: The New York Times informa que el humo de incendios forestales torna los cielos naranjas en EE.UU., resaltando un evento ambiental significativo. Además, hay un cambio importante entre demócratas sobre Israel. La generación Z se inclina hacia escuelas técnicas. Resumen basado en el podcast sin texto completo.

title.original: US expands strikes into northern Iran and disables ship trying to run blockade
title.en: US expands strikes into northern Iran and disables ship trying to run blockade

title.es: EE.UU. amplía ataques en el norte de Irán y deshabilita barco que intentaba romper bloqueo

summary.original: According to AP News, the United States has expanded its military strikes into northern Iran and reportedly disabled a ship attempting to run a blockade. The report indicates escalation in military actions involving U.S. forces but does not provide further details beyond these key developments. This briefing is source-limited as the full article text is not included.
summary.en: According to AP News, the United States has expanded its military strikes into northern Iran and reportedly disabled a ship attempting to run a blockade. The report indicates escalation in military actions involving U.S. forces but does not provide further details beyond these key developments. This briefing is source-limited as the full article text is not included.
summary.zh: 美联社报道，美国将军事打击范围扩大至伊朗北部，并据称击沉一艘试图突破封锁的船只，表明军事行动升级。详尽信息未提供。
summary.es: Según AP News, Estados Unidos amplió sus ataques militares en el norte de Irán y deshabilitó un barco que intentaba romper un bloqueo. Esto indica una escalada militar. No se ofrecen más detalles.

title.original: Boutique Festival Agency Casa Leo PR Launched by Raindance Execs David Martínez and Jacky Orozco (EXCLUSIVE)
title.en: Boutique Festival Agency Casa Leo PR Launched by Raindance Execs David Martínez and Jacky Orozco (EXCLUSIVE)
title.zh: Raindance高管David Martínez与Jacky Orozco创办精品宣传机构Casa Leo PR（独家）
title.es: La agencia boutique Casa Leo PR lanzada por ejecutivos de Raindance David Martínez y Jacky Orozco (EXCLUSIVA)

summary.original: Variety reports that David Martínez and Jacky Orozco, executives from Raindance, have launched Casa Leo PR, a boutique publicity and strategy agency based in London. The agency focuses on providing bespoke public relations, strategic guidance, and in-house productions for select films and filmmakers primarily in Europe and Latin America, assisting them through film festivals and awards seasons from submission to screening. Early campaigns include working with Netflix on a London screening of Maite Alberdi's 'A Child of My Own' and supporting Humberto Busto with his Venice Biennale College film 'Tijuana Todavía.'
summary.en: Variety reports that David Martínez and Jacky Orozco, executives from Raindance, have launched Casa Leo PR, a boutique publicity and strategy agency based in London. The agency focuses on providing bespoke public relations, strategic guidance, and in-house productions for select films and filmmakers primarily in Europe and Latin America, assisting them through film festivals and awards seasons from submission to screening. Early campaigns include working with Netflix on a London screening of Maite Alberdi's 'A Child of My Own' and supporting Humberto Busto with his Venice Biennale College film 'Tijuana Todavía.'
summary.zh: 《综艺》报道Raindance高管David Martínez与Jacky Orozco在伦敦成立了Casa Leo PR，专注于为欧洲和拉美的电影及制片人提供量身定制的公关、战略和制作支持，协助他们参与影展和奖季。早期项目包括Netflix伦敦放映活动和支持温尼斯基亚双年展作品。
summary.es: Variety informa que David Martínez y Jacky Orozco, ejecutivos de Raindance, lanzaron Casa Leo PR en Londres, agencia boutique que ofrece relaciones públicas personalizadas, estrategia y producción para cineastas en Europa y América Latina, apoyándolos en festivales y temporadas de premios. Proyectos iniciales incluyen una proyección de Netflix y apoyo a un film en la Bienal de Venecia.

title.original: China vows helium-trade policy changes as global tightening squeezes gas supplies
title.en: China vows helium-trade policy changes as global tightening squeezes gas supplies
title.zh: 中国承诺调整氦气贸易政策，应对全球供应紧缩
title.es: China promete cambios en la política comercial del helio ante el ajuste global que aprieta el suministro de gas

summary.original: The South China Morning Post reports that China will adjust its export controls on helium following a recent temporary suspension of overseas shipments amid tightening global supply. The Ministry of Commerce stated that the export ban aligns with China's foreign trade laws and World Trade Organization rules and was implemented to safeguard domestic supply. China is identified as a major importer of helium, relying on imports for over 85% of its supply. Helium, a by-product of liquefied natural gas production, is critical for industries such as semiconductors, medical equipment, and aerospace. The ministry spokesman indicated that export policies will be adjusted in response to changes in domestic and global supply and demand.
summary.en: The South China Morning Post reports that China will adjust its export controls on helium following a recent temporary suspension of overseas shipments amid tightening global supply. The Ministry of Commerce stated that the export ban aligns with China's foreign trade laws and World Trade Organization rules and was implemented to safeguard domestic supply. China is identified as a major importer of helium, relying on imports for over 85% of its supply. Helium, a by-product of liquefied natural gas production, is critical for industries such as semiconductors, medical equipment, and aerospace. The ministry spokesman indicated that export policies will be adjusted in response to changes in domestic and global supply and demand.
summary.zh: 《南华早报》报道中国将调整氦气出口管制，此前临时暂停海外出口以保障国内供应。商务部称出口禁令符合中国外贸法与世贸组织规则。中国氦气85%以上依赖进口，氦气是半导体、医疗设备和航空航天等关键行业的副产品。出口政策将根据供需变化调整。
summary.es: South China Morning Post informa que China ajustará sus controles de exportación de helio tras suspender temporalmente envíos al exterior para proteger el suministro interno. El Ministerio de Comercio afirma que la prohibición cumple con leyes comerciales y normas de la OMC. China importa más del 85% del helio, usado en semiconductores, equipos médicos y aeroespacial. La política cambiará según oferta y demanda.

title.original: Thousands of Ukrainians protest against Zelenskyy’s firing of defence minister
title.en: Thousands of Ukrainians protest against Zelenskyy’s firing of defence minister
title.zh: 数千乌克兰人抗议泽连斯基解雇国防部长
title.es: Miles de ucranianos protestan contra el despido del ministro de defensa por Zelenskyy

summary.original: Thousands of Ukrainians have protested against President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s decision to fire the defence minister, according to the Financial Times. The episode title and existing summary indicate that this decision has caused backlash and led to the resignation of the deputy air force commander. The briefing is source-limited as the article content provided is minimal.
summary.en: Thousands of Ukrainians have protested against President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s decision to fire the defence minister, according to the Financial Times. The episode title and existing summary indicate that this decision has caused backlash and led to the resignation of the deputy air force commander. The briefing is source-limited as the article content provided is minimal.
summary.zh: 据《金融时报》报道，数千乌克兰人抗议总统泽连斯基解雇国防部长的决定。此次决定引发反弹，并导致空军副司令辞职。文章内容有限，信息来源有限。
summary.es: Miles de ucranianos protestaron contra la decisión del presidente Volodymyr Zelenskyy de despedir al ministro de defensa, según Financial Times. La medida generó reacciones negativas y la renuncia del subcomandante de la fuerza aérea. La información es limitada por el contenido disponible.

title.original: TSMC Adds $100 Billion to Its U.S. Spending Plan
title.en: TSMC Adds $100 Billion to Its U.S. Spending Plan
title.zh: 台积电将美国投资计划增加1000亿美元
title.es: TSMC añade 100 mil millones de dólares a su plan de gasto en EE.UU.

summary.original: The New York Times reports that Taiwanese chip-maker TSMC has added $100 billion to its U.S. spending plan, increasing its total investment commitment in Arizona to $265 billion. This expansion reflects the company's fast-growing operations in the state. Details beyond this financial commitment are not provided, making the briefing source-limited.
summary.en: The New York Times reports that Taiwanese chip-maker TSMC has added $100 billion to its U.S. spending plan, increasing its total investment commitment in Arizona to $265 billion. This expansion reflects the company's fast-growing operations in the state. Details beyond this financial commitment are not provided, making the briefing source-limited.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》报道，台湾芯片制造商台积电将其在美国亚利桑那州的投资计划增加了1000亿美元，总投资达到2650亿美元，反映公司在当地业务快速增长。详情有限。
summary.es: The New York Times informa que el fabricante taiwanés de chips TSMC añadió 100 mil millones de dólares a su plan de inversión en EE.UU., elevando su compromiso total en Arizona a 265 mil millones. Se trata de una expansión de sus operaciones en el estado. La información adicional no está disponible.

title.original: Cricket Rules India’s Streaming Viewership in New Ormax StreamView Report
title.en: Cricket Rules India’s Streaming Viewership in New Ormax StreamView Report
title.zh: 板球主导印度流媒体收视率，来自Ormax StreamView新报告
title.es: El cricket domina la audiencia en streaming de India según nuevo informe Ormax StreamView

summary.original: The Ormax StreamView report, shared by Variety, reveals that cricket dominates streaming viewership in India in early 2026. The ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026 attracted an estimated 246 million viewers on JioHotstar between January and June 2026, the highest for any title tracked. Following closely was the Indian Premier League 2026 with 228.4 million viewers. Non-sports content like “India’s Got Latent” Season 2 and “Dhurandhar” ranked third and fourth, respectively. The report tracks long-form content across various genres, expanding previous focus to include OTT originals, general entertainment, films, sports, and news.
summary.en: The Ormax StreamView report, shared by Variety, reveals that cricket dominates streaming viewership in India in early 2026. The ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026 attracted an estimated 246 million viewers on JioHotstar between January and June 2026, the highest for any title tracked. Following closely was the Indian Premier League 2026 with 228.4 million viewers. Non-sports content like “India’s Got Latent” Season 2 and “Dhurandhar” ranked third and fourth, respectively. The report tracks long-form content across various genres, expanding previous focus to include OTT originals, general entertainment, films, sports, and news.
summary.zh: 据Variety分享的Ormax StreamView报告显示，2026年初印度流媒体收视率被板球赛事主导。2026年ICC男子T20世界杯在JioHotstar平台吸引了约2.46亿观众，位居首位。印度超级联赛以2.284亿观众紧随其后。非体育内容如《India’s Got Latent》第2季和《Dhurandhar》分别排名第三和第四。该报告涵盖各种类型的长篇内容，包括OTT原创、影视、体育与新闻。
summary.es: El informe Ormax StreamView compartido por Variety revela que el cricket domina la audiencia en streaming en India a principios de 2026. La Copa Mundial ICC Masculina T20 2026 atrajo aproximadamente 246 millones de espectadores en JioHotstar entre enero y junio, la cifra más alta. Le sigue la Indian Premier League 2026 con 228.4 millones. Contenidos no deportivos como "India’s Got Latent" Temporada 2 y "Dhurandhar" ocuparon tercer y cuarto lugar respectivamente. El informe cubre contenido largo de varios géneros, incluyendo originales OTT, entretenimiento general, cine, deportes y noticias.

title.original: Maps Show Where Wildfire Smoke Will Darken Skies on Thursday
title.en: Maps Show Where Wildfire Smoke Will Darken Skies on Thursday
title.zh: 地图显示加拿大野火烟雾周四将笼罩何处天空
title.es: Mapas muestran dónde el humo de incendios canadienses oscurecerá los cielos el jueves

summary.original: The New York Times provides maps illustrating where wildfire smoke from Canada is expected to darken skies on Thursday across the United States. The report offers information on the presence of the smoke and provides an indication of when the smoky conditions might end. The article’s text provided is limited, so this summary is source-limited.
summary.en: The New York Times provides maps illustrating where wildfire smoke from Canada is expected to darken skies on Thursday across the United States. The report offers information on the presence of the smoke and provides an indication of when the smoky conditions might end. The article’s text provided is limited, so this summary is source-limited.
summary.zh: 《纽约时报》提供地图，展示加拿大野火烟雾预计周四在美国哪些区域将导致天空昏暗。报道介绍烟雾分布及其可能消散的时间。信息有限。
summary.es: The New York Times ofrece mapas que ilustran dónde se espera que el humo de incendios forestales en Canadá oscurezca los cielos en Estados Unidos el jueves. El informe indica la presencia del humo y estima cuándo podrían finalizar las condiciones. Información limitada.

title.original: Oil companies are making billions. In the U.S., calls to tax their windfall are growing
title.en: Oil companies are making billions. In the U.S., calls to tax their windfall are growing
title.zh: 石油公司赚取巨额利润。美国呼吁征收意外之财税
title.es: Las empresas petroleras ganan miles de millones; crecen los llamados en EE.UU. a gravar sus ganancias inesperadas

summary.original: The NPR article states that since the Iran war began, higher oil prices have led many oil companies in the U.S. to generate excess profits, described as windfall profits. In response, some U.S. lawmakers are calling for a tax on these windfall profits with the intention of redistributing the money to lower-income Americans. The coverage includes an audio segment from Morning Edition on this topic.
summary.en: The NPR article states that since the Iran war began, higher oil prices have led many oil companies in the U.S. to generate excess profits, described as windfall profits. In response, some U.S. lawmakers are calling for a tax on these windfall profits with the intention of redistributing the money to lower-income Americans. The coverage includes an audio segment from Morning Edition on this topic.
summary.zh: 据NPR报道，自伊朗战争爆发以来，美国多家石油公司因油价上涨获得大量超额利润，被称为意外之财。一些美国议员呼吁对这些利润征税，将资金重新分配给低收入人群。报道包含相关的Morning Edition音频。
summary.es: El artículo de NPR señala que desde el inicio de la guerra en Irán, el aumento de precios del petróleo ha generado ganancias extraordinarias para muchas empresas petroleras en EE.UU., denominadas ganancias inesperadas. En respuesta, algunos legisladores estadounidenses proponen un impuesto sobre estas ganancias para redistribuir recursos a personas de bajos ingresos. El contenido incluye un segmento de audio de Morning Edition.

title.original: DHS pledged body cams for all immigration agents. Months later, that hasn't happened
title.en: DHS pledged body cams for all immigration agents. Months later, that hasn't happened
title.zh: 国土安全部承诺为所有移民官配备执法记录仪，数月后尚未实现
title.es: DHS prometió cámaras corporales para todos los agentes de inmigración; meses después, no se ha cumplido

summary.original: According to the NPR news report, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) promised to equip all immigration agents with body cameras following the fatal shootings of two U.S. citizens by immigration agents in January 2026. However, nearly six months later, this has not been fulfilled. Recently, two immigrant fathers fatally shot by federal immigration agents were involved in incidents where none of the officers wore body cameras. The DHS attributes delays to government shutdowns, and claims half of ICE field offices now have body cameras, with plans to equip the rest within 60 days. Critics question DHS's prioritization and note the accountability value of body cameras. The article also notes that video evidence from witnesses has contradicted DHS narratives in recent shootings, complicating transparency and accountability efforts.
summary.en: According to the NPR news report, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) promised to equip all immigration agents with body cameras following the fatal shootings of two U.S. citizens by immigration agents in January 2026. However, nearly six months later, this has not been fulfilled. Recently, two immigrant fathers fatally shot by federal immigration agents were involved in incidents where none of the officers wore body cameras. The DHS attributes delays to government shutdowns, and claims half of ICE field offices now have body cameras, with plans to equip the rest within 60 days. Critics question DHS's prioritization and note the accountability value of body cameras. The article also notes that video evidence from witnesses has contradicted DHS narratives in recent shootings, complicating transparency and accountability efforts.
summary.zh: NPR报道，鉴于2026年1月两名美国公民被移民官枪杀事件，国土安全部承诺为所有移民官配备执法记录仪。但近六个月过去，该承诺尚未兑现。最近两名移民父亲被联邦移民官枪杀时，相关官员均未佩戴记录仪。DHS将延期归因于政府停摆，称已有半数ICE现场办公室配备记录仪，计划60天内完成余下配备。批评者质疑DHS优先级，并指出执法记录仪对问责的重要性。目击者视频曾多次与DHS叙述不符，增加透明度和问责难度。
summary.es: Según un informe de NPR, tras los tiroteos fatales de dos ciudadanos estadounidenses por agentes de inmigración en enero de 2026, el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional (DHS) prometió dotar a todos los agentes con cámaras corporales. Sin embargo, casi seis meses después, no se ha cumplido. Recientemente, dos padres inmigrantes fueron asesinados por agentes federales que no portaban cámaras. DHS atribuye el retraso a cierres gubernamentales y afirma que la mitad de las oficinas de campo de ICE ya tienen cámaras, planeando equipar el resto en 60 días. Críticos cuestionan las prioridades del DHS y la importancia de estas cámaras para la rendición de cuentas. Videos de testigos han desmentido narrativas oficiales, complicando la transparencia.

title.original: Bike lanes and speed cameras disappear from the DOT's list of proven safety measures
title.en: Bike lanes and speed cameras disappear from the DOT's list of proven safety measures
title.zh: DOT从认可的安全措施名单中移除了自行车道和测速摄像头
title.es: Carriles para bicicletas y cámaras de velocidad desaparecen de la lista de medidas de seguridad comprobadas del DOT

summary.original: The NPR article reports that the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) and Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) have removed bike lanes, speed cameras, and several other safety measures from their list of "Proven Safety Countermeasures," which is a set of strategies previously recognized for reducing crashes and saving lives. This removal was done quietly and is part of a broader policy review aligning with current DOT priorities. Critics, including former FHWA acting administrator Stephanie Pollack, criticize the move as arbitrary and undermining evidence-based safety practices. The changes follow a shift away from policies promoting bike lanes, which had previously received federal funding. Advocates warn these removals could jeopardize funding and implementation of proven safety projects at state and local levels. The article includes data that bike lanes and speed cameras have significantly reduced crashes and fatalities, based on previous FHWA research.
summary.en: The NPR article reports that the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) and Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) have removed bike lanes, speed cameras, and several other safety measures from their list of "Proven Safety Countermeasures," which is a set of strategies previously recognized for reducing crashes and saving lives. This removal was done quietly and is part of a broader policy review aligning with current DOT priorities. Critics, including former FHWA acting administrator Stephanie Pollack, criticize the move as arbitrary and undermining evidence-based safety practices. The changes follow a shift away from policies promoting bike lanes, which had previously received federal funding. Advocates warn these removals could jeopardize funding and implementation of proven safety projects at state and local levels. The article includes data that bike lanes and speed cameras have significantly reduced crashes and fatalities, based on previous FHWA research.
summary.zh: NPR报道，美国交通部及联邦公路管理局已悄然将自行车道、测速摄像头等多项安全措施从“经验证的安全对策”名单中移除，此名单原被视为减少事故和挽救生命的策略。批评者认为此举任意且削弱了基于证据的安全实践。此变动与停止推广联邦资助的自行车道政策相关，倡导者担忧这将危及州和地方的安全项目资金和执行。先前研究显示这两项措施显著降低了事故和死亡率。
summary.es: El artículo de NPR informa que el Departamento de Transporte de EE.UU. (DOT) y la Administración Federal de Carreteras (FHWA) han retirado los carriles para bicicletas, cámaras de velocidad y otras medidas de seguridad de su lista de "Medidas de Seguridad Comprobadas", antes reconocidas por reducir accidentes y salvar vidas. Esta eliminación se realizó discretamente como parte de una revisión de política alineada con prioridades actuales del DOT. Críticos, incluida la exadministradora interina de la FHWA Stephanie Pollack, califican el cambio de arbitrario y contrario a prácticas de seguridad basadas en evidencia. Los cambios siguen a un alejamiento de políticas que promovían carriles bici con financiación federal. Defensores advierten que esto podría poner en riesgo la financiación y ejecución de proyectos de seguridad comprobados a nivel estatal y local. Datos previos indican que carriles para bicicletas y cámaras han reducido significativamente accidentes y fatalidades.

title.original: TrumpRx promised a supermarket for cheaper drugs but delivered a boutique
title.en: TrumpRx promised a supermarket for cheaper drugs but delivered a boutique
title.zh: TrumpRx承诺打造廉价药品超市，却成了精品店
title.es: TrumpRx prometió un supermercado de medicamentos más baratos pero entregó una boutique

summary.original: This NPR report covers President Trump's healthcare initiative called TrumpRx, which he described as the biggest development in healthcare in decades. However, an NPR analysis reveals that drug manufacturers participating in TrumpRx are only offering discounted prices on a limited number of their brand-name medicines. The coverage includes an audio segment discussing how the TrumpRx website provides discounts but covers just a fraction of available brand-name drugs.
summary.en: This NPR report covers President Trump's healthcare initiative called TrumpRx, which he described as the biggest development in healthcare in decades. However, an NPR analysis reveals that drug manufacturers participating in TrumpRx are only offering discounted prices on a limited number of their brand-name medicines. The coverage includes an audio segment discussing how the TrumpRx website provides discounts but covers just a fraction of available brand-name drugs.
summary.zh: NPR报道特朗普总统的医疗保健计划TrumpRx被称为数十年来最大的医疗进展，但分析显示参与的制药商仅对部分品牌药品提供打折。报道含有音频段落，讨论TrumpRx网站虽提供折扣，但覆盖的品牌药物有限。
summary.es: Este informe de NPR cubre la iniciativa sanitaria TrumpRx del presidente Trump, calificada por él como el mayor desarrollo en atención médica en décadas. Sin embargo, un análisis de NPR revela que los fabricantes de medicamentos que participan en TrumpRx solo ofrecen descuentos en un número limitado de sus medicamentos de marca. La cobertura incluye un segmento de audio que discute cómo el sitio web TrumpRx ofrece descuentos pero cubre solo una fracción de los medicamentos de marca disponibles.

title.original: Trump earned billions last year. Some Pennsylvania swing voters say they don't care
title.en: Trump earned billions last year. Some Pennsylvania swing voters say they don't care
title.zh: 特朗普去年赚取数十亿美元。部分宾夕法尼亚摇摆选民表示无所谓
title.es: Trump ganó miles de millones el año pasado. Algunos votantes indecisos de Pensilvania dicen que no les importa

summary.original: NPR News observed two online focus groups composed of 12 Pennsylvania voters, revealing mixed views on President Trump earning billions last year, mainly through cryptocurrency-related business revenue of $2.2 billion. Half of the participants expressed being "troubled" by this financial windfall during his term, while the other half viewed it as typical behavior for wealthy politicians, reflecting a broader cynicism about corruption in politics. Some voters, like Bhavana G., viewed Trump's financial gains as an abuse of presidential power, while others, such as Betsy D. and Ken J., considered it standard business conduct. The groups also discussed transparency regarding the health of members of Congress and expressed limited awareness and confidence about U.S. involvement in the renewed conflict with Iran. NPR notes these focus groups are not scientific polling but provide insight into the sentiments of Pennsylvania voters who supported Trump in his recent election.
summary.en: NPR News observed two online focus groups composed of 12 Pennsylvania voters, revealing mixed views on President Trump earning billions last year, mainly through cryptocurrency-related business revenue of $2.2 billion. Half of the participants expressed being "troubled" by this financial windfall during his term, while the other half viewed it as typical behavior for wealthy politicians, reflecting a broader cynicism about corruption in politics. Some voters, like Bhavana G., viewed Trump's financial gains as an abuse of presidential power, while others, such as Betsy D. and Ken J., considered it standard business conduct. The groups also discussed transparency regarding the health of members of Congress and expressed limited awareness and confidence about U.S. involvement in the renewed conflict with Iran. NPR notes these focus groups are not scientific polling but provide insight into the sentiments of Pennsylvania voters who supported Trump in his recent election.
summary.zh: NPR观察了两组由12名宾夕法尼亚选民组成的线上焦点小组，反映对特朗普去年通过加密货币相关业务赚取22亿美元的看法分歧。半数参与者对此感忧虑，另一半视为富有政客的常规行为，体现政治腐败的普遍愤世嫉俗。部分选民视为滥用总统权力，有的则认为是正常商业行为。小组还讨论了国会成员健康透明度及对美国涉伊朗冲突的认知有限。NPR指这非科学民调，但提供支持特朗普宾州选民的感受见解。
summary.es: NPR observó dos grupos focales en línea compuestos por 12 votantes de Pensilvania, revelando opiniones divididas sobre que el presidente Trump ganó miles de millones el año pasado, principalmente mediante ingresos por negocios relacionados con criptomonedas por 2.2 mil millones de dólares. La mitad expresó estar "preocupada" por esta fortuna durante su mandato, mientras que la otra mitad lo ve como un comportamiento típico de políticos ricos, reflejando un cinismo generalizado sobre la corrupción política. Algunos votantes, como Bhavana G., consideraron las ganancias financieras de Trump un abuso del poder presidencial, mientras que otros, como Betsy D. y Ken J., lo vieron como conducta comercial normal. También discutieron la transparencia sobre la salud de miembros del Congreso y mostraron conocimiento y confianza limitados sobre la participación de EE.UU. en el renovado conflicto con Irán. NPR aclara que estos grupos no son encuestas científicas pero ofrecen una visión de los sentimientos de votantes de Pensilvania que apoyaron a Trump.

title.original: No Asian team managed to go far this World Cup (again). What's holding them back?
title.en: No Asian team managed to go far this World Cup (again). What's holding them back?
title.zh: 本届世界杯亚洲球队再次无缘深入，阻碍因素何在？
title.es: Ningún equipo asiático logró avanzar mucho en esta Copa del Mundo (otra vez). ¿Qué los frena?

summary.original: The 2026 World Cup marked the sixth consecutive tournament where no Asian Football Confederation (AFC) team advanced beyond the first knockout round, achieving only three wins out of 29 matches. Despite more Asian players participating in European clubs and increased investment in football across Asia, teams like South Korea, Iran, Japan, and others faced early eliminations. South Korea's early exit, following a strong start, led to scrutiny over coaching and management. Iran's preparation and performance were affected by the US-Iran conflict, including travel restrictions and league suspensions. Factors such as tough draws and organizational issues contributed to AFC teams' limited success. Observers note that while Asian football is competitive up to a point, there remains a gap to bridge compared to other top football confederations. This briefing is based solely on the provided NPR text.
summary.en: The 2026 World Cup marked the sixth consecutive tournament where no Asian Football Confederation (AFC) team advanced beyond the first knockout round, achieving only three wins out of 29 matches. Despite more Asian players participating in European clubs and increased investment in football across Asia, teams like South Korea, Iran, Japan, and others faced early eliminations. South Korea's early exit, following a strong start, led to scrutiny over coaching and management. Iran's preparation and performance were affected by the US-Iran conflict, including travel restrictions and league suspensions. Factors such as tough draws and organizational issues contributed to AFC teams' limited success. Observers note that while Asian football is competitive up to a point, there remains a gap to bridge compared to other top football confederations. This briefing is based solely on the provided NPR text.
summary.zh: 2026年世界杯连续第六届赛事中，亚洲足球联合会（AFC）球队均未进入淘汰赛第二轮，仅取得29场比赛中的3胜。尽管更多亚洲球员加入欧洲俱乐部，亚洲足球投入增加，韩国、伊朗、日本等队均早早出局。韩国开局强劲但早退引发对教练与管理的质疑。伊朗受美伊冲突影响准备与表现受限，包括旅行限制和联赛暂停。艰难抽签和组织问题亦是因素。观察人士指出，亚洲足球竞争力有局限，仍需提升以缩小与顶级足联差距。此简报基于NPR提供材料。
summary.es: La Copa Mundial 2026 marcó el sexto torneo consecutivo donde ningún equipo de la Confederación Asiática de Fútbol (AFC) avanzó más allá de la primera ronda de eliminación directa, con solo tres victorias en 29 partidos. A pesar de más jugadores asiáticos en clubes europeos y mayor inversión en fútbol en Asia, equipos como Corea del Sur, Irán y Japón fueron eliminados temprano. La salida temprana de Corea del Sur, tras un buen inicio, generó críticas a entrenadores y gestión. La preparación y rendimiento de Irán se vieron afectados por el conflicto entre EE.UU. e Irán, con restricciones de viaje y suspensión de liga. Factores como sorteos difíciles y problemas organizativos contribuyeron al éxito limitado de los equipos AFC. Observadores señalan que, aunque el fútbol asiático es competitivo hasta cierto punto, aún hay una brecha frente a otras confederaciones de élite. Este informe se basa únicamente en texto proporcionado por NPR.

title.original: UK economy returns to growth in May
title.en: UK economy returns to growth in May
title.zh: 英国经济5月恢复增长
title.es: La economía del Reino Unido vuelve a crecer en mayo

summary.original: The UK's economy grew modestly by 0.1% in May 2026, reversing a slight contraction seen in April, according to the Office for National Statistics (ONS). Growth was primarily driven by the service sector, including computer programming, advertising, and pharmaceuticals, while production and construction sectors declined. Over the three months to May, the economy expanded by 0.7%. However, the ongoing Iran war has impacted business activity, pushing up energy prices and disrupting supply chains, affecting various industries such as manufacturing, hospitality, and travel. Analysts describe the recovery as fragile, with calls for the incoming Prime Minister Andy Burnham to stabilize growth amid rising energy costs and financial tightening. Treasury officials claim the government's economic plan has strengthened the UK position despite these challenges. This summary is based on the BBC Business report.
summary.en: The UK's economy grew modestly by 0.1% in May 2026, reversing a slight contraction seen in April, according to the Office for National Statistics (ONS). Growth was primarily driven by the service sector, including computer programming, advertising, and pharmaceuticals, while production and construction sectors declined. Over the three months to May, the economy expanded by 0.7%. However, the ongoing Iran war has impacted business activity, pushing up energy prices and disrupting supply chains, affecting various industries such as manufacturing, hospitality, and travel. Analysts describe the recovery as fragile, with calls for the incoming Prime Minister Andy Burnham to stabilize growth amid rising energy costs and financial tightening. Treasury officials claim the government's economic plan has strengthened the UK position despite these challenges. This summary is based on the BBC Business report.
summary.zh: 据国家统计局（ONS），2026年5月英国经济环比增长0.1%，扭转了4月小幅收缩。增长由服务业推动，包括计算机编程、广告与制药，生产和建筑业下滑。三个月累计增长0.7%。然而，伊朗战争影响商业活动，推高能源价格并扰乱供应链，影响制造、酒店和旅游等行业。分析称复苏脆弱，呼吁新任首相安迪·伯纳姆稳定增长，面对能源成本上涨和金融紧缩。财政官员称政府经济计划增强英国地位。本文基于BBC商业报道。
summary.es: La economía del Reino Unido creció modestamente un 0.1% en mayo de 2026, revirtiendo una ligera contracción en abril, según la Oficina de Estadísticas Nacionales (ONS). El crecimiento fue impulsado principalmente por el sector servicios, incluyendo programación informática, publicidad y farmacéutica, mientras que producción y construcción disminuyeron. En los tres meses hasta mayo, la economía creció un 0.7%. Sin embargo, la guerra en Irán ha afectado la actividad empresarial, aumentando los precios de la energía y causando interrupciones en cadenas de suministro, afectando sectores como manufactura, hostelería y viajes. Los analistas describen la recuperación como frágil, con llamados al nuevo primer ministro Andy Burnham para estabilizar el crecimiento ante el alza de costos energéticos y el endurecimiento financiero. Funcionarios del Tesoro afirman que el plan económico del gobierno ha fortalecido la posición del Reino Unido a pesar de estos desafíos. Este resumen se basa en informes de BBC Business.

title.original: Dutch Prime Minister Rob Jetten set to visit China next spring: sources
title.en: Dutch Prime Minister Rob Jetten set to visit China next spring: sources
title.zh: 荷兰首相Rob Jetten预计明年春访华：消息人士称
title.es: El primer ministro holandés Rob Jetten tiene previsto visitar China la próxima primavera: fuentes

summary.original: According to two sources cited by the South China Morning Post, Dutch Prime Minister Rob Jetten is scheduled to visit China next spring. This would be Jetten's first trip to Beijing since assuming office in February 2026 and the first visit by a Dutch prime minister since a diplomatic crisis arose last year involving the Nexperia incident. The visit comes amid increasing pressure on the Netherlands due to the US-China technology conflict, notably with US efforts to restrict sales by Dutch semiconductor company ASML to China. Despite initial expectations of a tougher Dutch stance on China, the current government aims for stable relations. Prior visits by Dutch food security and trade ministers have occurred this year, and a visit by Economy Minister Heleen Herbert is under consideration. The Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs did not immediately respond to requests for comment.
summary.en: According to two sources cited by the South China Morning Post, Dutch Prime Minister Rob Jetten is scheduled to visit China next spring. This would be Jetten's first trip to Beijing since assuming office in February 2026 and the first visit by a Dutch prime minister since a diplomatic crisis arose last year involving the Nexperia incident. The visit comes amid increasing pressure on the Netherlands due to the US-China technology conflict, notably with US efforts to restrict sales by Dutch semiconductor company ASML to China. Despite initial expectations of a tougher Dutch stance on China, the current government aims for stable relations. Prior visits by Dutch food security and trade ministers have occurred this year, and a visit by Economy Minister Heleen Herbert is under consideration. The Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs did not immediately respond to requests for comment.
summary.zh: 南华早报援引两位消息人士称，荷兰首相Rob Jetten计划于明年春季访问中国。这是他自2026年2月上任以来首次访华，也是荷兰自去年Nexperia事件引发外交危机以来首位访华的首相。此次访问发生于美中技术冲突加剧之际，尤其涉及美国限制荷兰半导体企业ASML对华销售。尽管此前预计荷兰对华立场趋严，现政府倾向稳定关系。今年荷兰食品安全与贸易部长已访华，经济部长Heleen Herbert的访问也在考虑中。中国外交部未即时回应置评请求。
summary.es: Según dos fuentes citadas por el South China Morning Post, el primer ministro holandés Rob Jetten tiene programado visitar China la próxima primavera. Será su primer viaje a Pekín desde que asumió el cargo en febrero de 2026 y la primera visita de un primer ministro holandés desde la crisis diplomática del año pasado relacionada con el incidente Nexperia. La visita ocurre en medio de una creciente presión sobre los Países Bajos debido al conflicto tecnológico entre EE.UU. y China, especialmente con esfuerzos estadounidenses para restringir las ventas a China de la empresa holandesa de semiconductores ASML. A pesar de expectativas iniciales de una postura holandesa más dura hacia China, el gobierno actual busca relaciones estables. Ministros holandeses de seguridad alimentaria y comercio ya han visitado China este año, y se considera una visita de la ministra de Economía Heleen Herbert. El Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores de China no respondió de inmediato a solicitudes de comentario.

title.original: Celebrity influencers paid up to £1m to advertise deodorant on Instagram
title.en: Celebrity influencers paid up to £1m to advertise deodorant on Instagram
title.zh: 名人网红在Instagram上为除臭剂广告支付高达100万英镑
title.es: Influencers famosos reciben hasta £1 millón por anunciar desodorante en Instagram

summary.original: According to the BBC Business article, Wild, a refillable natural deodorant company co-founded by Charlie Bowes-Lyon, heavily relies on influencer marketing as a key component of its success, describing it as his "secret sauce." Wild, bought by Unilever last year, employs high-profile names like Stacey Solomon, Emma Raducanu, and Molly-Mae Hague to promote its products on Instagram. The company reportedly spends millions on partnerships with Raducanu and hundreds of thousands with other celebrities, maintaining an influencer marketing budget just under £10m, with plans to possibly double it next year. Payments for influencer posts vary widely, from £100,000 to over £1 million for top-tier celebrities, depending on campaign scope and relationship depth. The article emphasizes the importance of authenticity for these endorsements, noting that celebrities tend to promote products that fit their personal brand. It also highlights that audiences are increasingly savvy about paid advertisements, making genuine engagement crucial. Furthermore, influencer marketing involves complex arrangements including contracts and campaigns that generate multiple ad iterations tailored to different audiences. The piece points out that many influencers operate as sophisticated media businesses with teams, legal support, and multiple income streams, underlining the evolving scale of this marketing approach.
summary.en: According to the BBC Business article, Wild, a refillable natural deodorant company co-founded by Charlie Bowes-Lyon, heavily relies on influencer marketing as a key component of its success, describing it as his "secret sauce." Wild, bought by Unilever last year, employs high-profile names like Stacey Solomon, Emma Raducanu, and Molly-Mae Hague to promote its products on Instagram. The company reportedly spends millions on partnerships with Raducanu and hundreds of thousands with other celebrities, maintaining an influencer marketing budget just under £10m, with plans to possibly double it next year. Payments for influencer posts vary widely, from £100,000 to over £1 million for top-tier celebrities, depending on campaign scope and relationship depth. The article emphasizes the importance of authenticity for these endorsements, noting that celebrities tend to promote products that fit their personal brand. It also highlights that audiences are increasingly savvy about paid advertisements, making genuine engagement crucial. Furthermore, influencer marketing involves complex arrangements including contracts and campaigns that generate multiple ad iterations tailored to different audiences. The piece points out that many influencers operate as sophisticated media businesses with teams, legal support, and multiple income streams, underlining the evolving scale of this marketing approach.
summary.zh: 据BBC商业报道，由Charlie Bowes-Lyon共同创立的可补充天然除臭剂公司Wild，将影响者营销视为成功的关键，称其为“秘密武器”。Wild由联合利华去年收购，聘请了Stacey Solomon、Emma Raducanu和Molly-Mae Hague等名人在Instagram推广产品。公司在Raducanu上的合作费用达数百万英镑，其他名人则花费数十万，总预算接近1000万英镑，计划明年可能翻倍。支付费用从10万到超过100万英镑不等，视活动范围和关系深浅而定。文章强调真实性对代言的重要性，明星推广符合个人品牌的产品，并指出观众对付费广告日趋敏感，真诚互动至关重要。影响者营销涉及复杂合同和多版本广告，许多影响者已发展成拥有团队、法律支持和多收入来源的成熟媒体企业，展示此营销方式的演变规模。
summary.es: Según un artículo de BBC Business, Wild, una empresa de desodorantes naturales recargables cofundada por Charlie Bowes-Lyon, depende fuertemente del marketing de influencers como clave para su éxito, describiéndolo como su "salsa secreta". Wild, adquirida por Unilever el año pasado, emplea nombres destacados como Stacey Solomon, Emma Raducanu y Molly-Mae Hague para promocionar sus productos en Instagram. La empresa gasta millones en asociaciones con Raducanu y cientos de miles con otras celebridades, manteniendo un presupuesto de marketing de influencers justo por debajo de £10 millones, con planes de posiblemente duplicarlo el próximo año. Los pagos varían desde £100,000 hasta más de £1 millón para celebridades de primer nivel, según el alcance de la campaña y la relación. El artículo enfatiza la importancia de la autenticidad en estas promociones, señalando que las celebridades suelen promover productos que encajan con su marca personal. También destaca que las audiencias son cada vez más conscientes de los anuncios pagados, haciendo crucial un compromiso genuino. Además, el marketing de influencers implica acuerdos complejos, contratos y campañas con múltiples versiones de anuncios para diferentes públicos. Muchos influencers operan como negocios mediáticos sofisticados con equipos, apoyo legal y múltiples fuentes de ingresos, subrayando la evolución y escala de este enfoque.

title.original: Uber launches $15 billion bid for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
title.en: Uber launches $15 billion bid for Delivery Hero to create global takeout giant
title.zh: 优步发起150亿美元竞购Delivery Hero，欲打造全球外卖巨头
title.es: Uber lanza oferta de 15.000 millones de dólares por Delivery Hero para crear gigante mundial de comida a domicilio

summary.original: This briefing is source-limited as the provided evidence only includes the article headline and metadata without substantive text. It states that Uber has launched a $15 billion bid for Delivery Hero, signalling a move to create a global takeout giant. No further details or context about the bid, terms, or implications are available in the evidence.

title.original: India Is Moving Fast to Build A.I. Data Centers. A Coastal City May Pay the Price.
title.en: India Is Moving Fast to Build A.I. Data Centers. A Coastal City May Pay the Price.

title.es: India avanza rápido en construir centros de datos de IA. Una ciudad costera podría pagar el precio.

summary.original: The New York Times reports that India is rapidly developing large A.I. data centers to catch up in the technology sector. However, critics express concerns that these megaprojects could impose significant environmental costs, including substantial consumption of energy and water resources. They also say the projects might not generate long-term employment opportunities for the local population. The article suggests that while officials support the data centers to boost technological capacity, there is controversy over the sustainability and economic benefits of these facilities, especially in a coastal city where the environmental impact might be more pronounced.
summary.en: The New York Times reports that India is rapidly developing large A.I. data centers to catch up in the technology sector. However, critics express concerns that these megaprojects could impose significant environmental costs, including substantial consumption of energy and water resources. They also say the projects might not generate long-term employment opportunities for the local population. The article suggests that while officials support the data centers to boost technological capacity, there is controversy over the sustainability and economic benefits of these facilities, especially in a coastal city where the environmental impact might be more pronounced.
summary.zh: 纽约时报报道，印度迅速发展大型人工智能数据中心以赶超科技领域，但批评者担忧这些巨型项目将带来显著环境代价，包括大量能源和水资源消耗，同时可能缺乏长期就业机会。文章指出官员支持数据中心以提升技术能力，但围绕其可持续性和经济益处存在争议，尤其是一座沿海城市可能面临更大环境影响。
summary.es: The New York Times informa que India está desarrollando rápidamente grandes centros de datos de IA para ponerse al día en el sector tecnológico. Sin embargo, críticos expresan preocupaciones sobre los costos ambientales significativos, incluyendo alto consumo de energía y agua, y la posible falta de oportunidades laborales a largo plazo para la población local. El artículo sugiere que aunque funcionarios apoyan estos centros para potenciar capacidades tecnológicas, hay controversia sobre la sostenibilidad y beneficios económicos, especialmente en una ciudad costera donde el impacto ambiental podría ser mayor.

title.original: China’s imports from Africa surge after Beijing expands zero-tariff policy
title.en: China’s imports from Africa surge after Beijing expands zero-tariff policy
title.zh: 中国扩大非洲零关税政策后进口激增
title.es: Las importaciones de China desde África se disparan tras ampliar Pekín la política de cero aranceles

summary.original: According to the South China Morning Post, China’s imports from Africa soared by 21.1% in May and 40.2% in June 2026 compared to the previous year, outpacing overall growth in Chinese imports for the period. This surge followed Beijing’s expansion of a zero-tariff policy across Africa in May. The increase partly reflects China’s rising demand for critical minerals essential to its clean energy, semiconductor, and data center investments that support its AI industry. Imports of unwrought copper more than doubled year-on-year in May to $1.65 billion, while strategic minerals like platinum and spodumene also saw sharp growth. Additionally, rhodium powder imports nearly quintupled in May, exceeding $125 million. China’s crude oil imports from Africa rose 21% in May to $3.11 billion, remaining the largest import category amid disruptions in oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz due to the US-Israel-Iran conflict. The tariff expansion is also stimulating growth in other sectors, including agricultural exports from Africa.
summary.en: According to the South China Morning Post, China’s imports from Africa soared by 21.1% in May and 40.2% in June 2026 compared to the previous year, outpacing overall growth in Chinese imports for the period. This surge followed Beijing’s expansion of a zero-tariff policy across Africa in May. The increase partly reflects China’s rising demand for critical minerals essential to its clean energy, semiconductor, and data center investments that support its AI industry. Imports of unwrought copper more than doubled year-on-year in May to $1.65 billion, while strategic minerals like platinum and spodumene also saw sharp growth. Additionally, rhodium powder imports nearly quintupled in May, exceeding $125 million. China’s crude oil imports from Africa rose 21% in May to $3.11 billion, remaining the largest import category amid disruptions in oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz due to the US-Israel-Iran conflict. The tariff expansion is also stimulating growth in other sectors, including agricultural exports from Africa.
summary.zh: 据南华早报报道，2026年5月和6月中国从非洲的进口分别同比增长21.1%和40.2%，超出同期整体进口增长。此增势源于北京在5月扩大了非洲的零关税政策。增长部分反映了中国对其清洁能源、半导体及支持人工智能的数据中心所需关键矿产的需求提升。5月未精炼铜进口较去年同期翻倍，达16.5亿美元；铂金和锂辉石等战略矿产也大幅增长；5月铑粉进口几乎增长五倍，超1.25亿美元。非洲原油进口5月增长21%，达31.1亿美元，仍为最大进口品类，因美以伊冲突扰乱霍尔木兹海峡原油流。关税政策扩展也促使非洲农产品出口增长。
summary.es: Según South China Morning Post, las importaciones de China desde África aumentaron un 21.1% en mayo y un 40.2% en junio de 2026 en comparación con el año anterior, superando el crecimiento general de las importaciones chinas en ese periodo. Este aumento siguió a la expansión de la política de cero aranceles de Pekín en África en mayo. El crecimiento refleja en parte la creciente demanda china por minerales críticos esenciales para sus inversiones en energía limpia, semiconductores y centros de datos que respaldan su industria de IA. Las importaciones de cobre sin refinar más que se duplicaron interanualmente en mayo, alcanzando $1.65 mil millones, mientras que minerales estratégicos como platino y espodumena también crecieron significativamente. Además, las importaciones de polvo de rodio casi se quintuplicaron en mayo, superando los $125 millones. Las importaciones de petróleo crudo de África crecieron un 21% en mayo, hasta $3.11 mil millones, permaneciendo como la categoría de importación más grande amid las interrupciones en los flujos de petróleo a través del estrecho de Ormuz debido al conflicto entre EE.UU., Israel e Irán. La expansión arancelaria también estimula el crecimiento en otros sectores, incluyendo las exportaciones agrícolas africanas.

title.original: Nickel Hits Three-Week High on Indonesia Supply Risks, Fed View
title.en: Nickel Hits Three-Week High on Indonesia Supply Risks, Fed View
title.zh: 印尼供应风险与美联储前景推动镍价达到三周高点
title.es: El níquel alcanza un máximo de tres semanas debido a riesgos de suministro en Indonesia y perspectiva de la Fed

summary.original: Bloomberg reports that nickel prices have reached a three-week high driven by two main factors. First, expectations for upcoming Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes have diminished, easing market concerns. Second, there is ongoing uncertainty regarding mining policy in Indonesia, which is the world’s top nickel producer. These supply risks have contributed to a more bullish outlook on nickel. The combination of weaker prospects for monetary tightening in the US and potential constraints on Indonesian nickel supply has led to the recent price gains in the metal, which is important for various industrial applications.
summary.en: Bloomberg reports that nickel prices have reached a three-week high driven by two main factors. First, expectations for upcoming Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes have diminished, easing market concerns. Second, there is ongoing uncertainty regarding mining policy in Indonesia, which is the world’s top nickel producer. These supply risks have contributed to a more bullish outlook on nickel. The combination of weaker prospects for monetary tightening in the US and potential constraints on Indonesian nickel supply has led to the recent price gains in the metal, which is important for various industrial applications.
summary.zh: 据彭博社报道，镍价达到三周高点，原因主要有两点：美联储加息预期减弱，以及全球最大镍生产国印尼的采矿政策存在不确定性，供应风险推动了镍价上涨。
summary.es: Bloomberg informa que los precios del níquel alcanzaron un máximo de tres semanas impulsados por dos factores: la reducción de expectativas de alzas en las tasas de interés de la Reserva Federal y la incertidumbre sobre la política minera en Indonesia, el mayor productor mundial, generando riesgos en el suministro.

title.original: Why the West has an uphill task challenging China in pharmaceutical ingredients
title.en: Why the West has an uphill task challenging China in pharmaceutical ingredients
title.zh: 为何西方挑战中国医药原料面临重重困难
title.es: Por qué Occidente enfrenta un reto difícil al desafiar a China en ingredientes farmacéuticos

summary.original: The South China Morning Post reports that China has significantly increased its production of pharmaceutical ingredients in recent years, now supplying 40% of global active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), which provide medications their therapeutic effects. Additionally, almost 41% of key starting materials (KSMs) for drugs approved in the United States are sourced exclusively from China, according to data from Chinese government sources and the Brookings Institution. US think tanks, such as the Council on Foreign Relations and the Atlantic Council, are concerned that this dependency could give Beijing strategic leverage similar to its dominance in rare earth elements. They have urged the US and its partners to enhance medical trade cooperation and build more resilient supply chains to reduce reliance on Chinese pharmaceutical ingredients. This summary is based directly on the substantial text evidence provided.
summary.en: The South China Morning Post reports that China has significantly increased its production of pharmaceutical ingredients in recent years, now supplying 40% of global active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), which provide medications their therapeutic effects. Additionally, almost 41% of key starting materials (KSMs) for drugs approved in the United States are sourced exclusively from China, according to data from Chinese government sources and the Brookings Institution. US think tanks, such as the Council on Foreign Relations and the Atlantic Council, are concerned that this dependency could give Beijing strategic leverage similar to its dominance in rare earth elements. They have urged the US and its partners to enhance medical trade cooperation and build more resilient supply chains to reduce reliance on Chinese pharmaceutical ingredients. This summary is based directly on the substantial text evidence provided.
summary.zh: 据南华早报，近年来中国医药原料产量大增，现供应全球40%的活性药物成分，同时近41%美国批准药物的关键起始材料也仅自中国采购。美国智库担忧此依赖赋予中国战略杠杆，敦促加强医药贸易合作及供应链韧性，减少依赖。内容基于详实资料。
summary.es: Según South China Morning Post, China ha incrementado significativamente su producción de ingredientes farmacéuticos, suministrando el 40% de los ingredientes activos globales y casi el 41% de los materiales clave para fármacos aprobados en EE.UU. Think tanks estadounidenses temen que esta dependencia otorgue a Pekín levadura estratégica, instando a mejorar cooperación comercial y cadenas de suministro más resilientes para disminuir la dependencia. Resumen basado en evidencia detallada.

title.original: China’s consumption has a new, fast-growing driver: local tourists
