title.es: El consumo en China tiene un nuevo motor de rápido crecimiento: los turistas locales

summary.original: The article from SCMP China Economy states that domestic leisure travel within China surged in the first half of 2026. The period included the extended Chinese New Year holiday, during which domestic trips reached 596 million and consumer spending exceeded 803 billion yuan, both up nearly 20% from the previous year. The May Day holiday also saw significant increases with 325 million domestic trips and spending of 185.5 billion yuan. The government has actively extended public holidays since 2025 to encourage leisure spending, contributing to faster domestic travel recovery compared to cross-border travel. For example, during the recent Dragon Boat Festival holiday, domestic trips were 124 million, surpassing 2019 levels. Infrastructure such as high-speed rail, airports, expressways, and hotels built over two decades is effectively supporting this domestic demand, generating revenue without substantial new capital expenditure. The briefing is based directly on the provided article and refrains from outside inferences.

El gobierno ha extendido feriados para fomentar el gasto de ocio, apoyado por infraestructura desarrollada. Resumen basado en el artículo provisto.

title.original: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DR Congo forest
title.en: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DR Congo forest
title.zh: 刚果（金）森林中新发现带橙色嘴唇的猴子品种
title.es: Descubren nueva especie de mono con labios naranjas 'escondida' en bosque del Congo

summary.original: Scientists have confirmed a new monkey species, known locally as 'Likweli', living in the forests of the Democratic Republic of Congo. The primate is distinctive for its black fur and striking pinkish-orange lips. It was first spotted in Lomami National Park's dense canopy in 2008, though only a blurry image was captured then. A subsequent sighting and comprehensive study by an international team involving audio recordings, photography, and genetic analysis officially identified the monkey as a distinct species named Colobus congoensis. This marks the fifth new African monkey species discovered in 75 years. The animal is said to be shy and tends to stay high in the trees, with local villagers in only eight out of 52 surveyed villages having seen it. Researchers note its unique 'roaring' call and speculate the bright facial markings might serve as visual signals within the species. They believe the monkeys play an important ecological role by processing seeds and aiding forest regeneration. The species is rare, confined to habitats providing its specific dietary needs, and is hunted for meat. The team hopes the official recognition will support protective measures. Further studies are planned to assess the population and behavior of this secretive primate.
summary.en: Scientists have confirmed a new monkey species, known locally as 'Likweli', living in the forests of the Democratic Republic of Congo. The primate is distinctive for its black fur and striking pinkish-orange lips. It was first spotted in Lomami National Park's dense canopy in 2008, though only a blurry image was captured then. A subsequent sighting and comprehensive study by an international team involving audio recordings, photography, and genetic analysis officially identified the monkey as a distinct species named Colobus congoensis. This marks the fifth new African monkey species discovered in 75 years. The animal is said to be shy and tends to stay high in the trees, with local villagers in only eight out of 52 surveyed villages having seen it. Researchers note its unique 'roaring' call and speculate the bright facial markings might serve as visual signals within the species. They believe the monkeys play an important ecological role by processing seeds and aiding forest regeneration. The species is rare, confined to habitats providing its specific dietary needs, and is hunted for meat. The team hopes the official recognition will support protective measures. Further studies are planned to assess the population and behavior of this secretive primate.
summary.zh: 科学家确认刚果民主共和国森林中发现一种新猴种，当地称为“Likweli”，特征为黑色毛发和显眼的粉橙色嘴唇。该猴种2008年首次被模糊拍到，后经国际团队详细研究，包括录音、摄影与基因分析，正式命名为Colobus congoensis。这是非洲75年来发现的第五种新猴。该猴性格害羞，常栖息高树，声音独特，可能用鲜艳面部作物种间信号。它们在种子处理与森林再生中扮演重要生态角色，种群稀少且受到猎食。研究团队希望这一认定有助于保护措施，未来将继续评估其种群和行为。
summary.es: Científicos han confirmado una nueva especie de mono, llamada localmente 'Likweli', que habita en bosques de la República Democrática del Congo. Se distingue por su pelaje negro y labios naranjas llamativos. Fue avistado por primera vez en 2008 con imágenes borrosas y luego identificado oficialmente como Colobus congoensis tras estudios internacionales con grabaciones de audio, fotos y análisis genético. Esta es la quinta especie de mono descubierta en África en 75 años. Es tímida, vive en las copas altas, tiene un llamado distintivo y se cree que sus marcas faciales brillantes sirven como señales visuales dentro de la especie. Juegan un papel ecológico importante en el procesamiento de semillas y regeneración forestal. Son raros, cazados por su carne y limitados a hábitats con alimentos específicos. Se espera que el reconocimiento oficial apoye la protección y estudios futuros analizarán su población y comportamiento.

title.original: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
title.en: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
title.zh: 热那亚大桥灾难43名遇难者家属等待判决
title.es: Familias de 43 víctimas esperan veredicto en desastre del puente de Génova

summary.original: Nearly eight years after the Morandi bridge collapse in Genoa, families of 43 victims await a first-instance verdict in the ongoing trial over the disaster. The bridge failed on 14 August 2018 during a summer storm, causing vehicles, including the car carrying Claudia Possetti, her new husband Andrea, and their two children, to fall onto railway tracks below. The collapse led to investigations focused on the viaduct's maintenance and potential design flaws. Since July 2022, 57 individuals—including former executives of Autostrade per l'Italia and Atlantia, engineers, and former transport officials—have faced charges ranging from multiple manslaughter to falsifying documents, all of which defendants deny. The trial has lasted nearly four years with many hearings, and more time is expected before a final ruling. Autostrade per l'Italia's chief executive publicly apologized for the first time just before the verdict. The bridge's remains were demolished in 2019, replaced by a new viaduct opened in 2020, designed by Renzo Piano. Families hope the verdict will clarify responsibility and provide a sense of justice after years of uncertainty.
summary.en: Nearly eight years after the Morandi bridge collapse in Genoa, families of 43 victims await a first-instance verdict in the ongoing trial over the disaster. The bridge failed on 14 August 2018 during a summer storm, causing vehicles, including the car carrying Claudia Possetti, her new husband Andrea, and their two children, to fall onto railway tracks below. The collapse led to investigations focused on the viaduct's maintenance and potential design flaws. Since July 2022, 57 individuals—including former executives of Autostrade per l'Italia and Atlantia, engineers, and former transport officials—have faced charges ranging from multiple manslaughter to falsifying documents, all of which defendants deny. The trial has lasted nearly four years with many hearings, and more time is expected before a final ruling. Autostrade per l'Italia's chief executive publicly apologized for the first time just before the verdict. The bridge's remains were demolished in 2019, replaced by a new viaduct opened in 2020, designed by Renzo Piano. Families hope the verdict will clarify responsibility and provide a sense of justice after years of uncertainty.
summary.zh: 热那亚莫兰迪桥于2018年8月14日坍塌，造成包括克劳迪娅·波塞蒂一家在内的多辆车跌落铁路，导致43人遇难。近八年后，涉及桥梁维护和设计缺陷的审判仍在进行，57名被告包括多名前高管与工程师，否认指控。审理历时近四年，预计判决尚需时日。意大利高速公路公司CEO在判决前首次公开道歉。坍塌桥梁残骸已于2019年拆除，2020年由伦佐·皮亚诺设计的新桥投入使用。遇难者家属期望判决能厘清责任，实现正义。
summary.es: Casi ocho años después del colapso del puente Morandi en Génova, las familias de 43 víctimas esperan un veredicto en el juicio por el desastre de agosto de 2018, cuando el puente cayó durante una tormenta de verano, provocando que vehículos, incluida la familia de Claudia Possetti, cayeran sobre las vías férreas. El juicio involucra a 57 acusados, entre ellos exdirectivos y técnicos, acusados de homicidios múltiples y falsificación, todos negados. El proceso judicial lleva casi cuatro años y podría extenderse más. El director ejecutivo de Autostrade per l’Italia pidió disculpas públicamente por primera vez antes del veredicto. Los restos del puente fueron demolidos en 2019 y reemplazados en 2020 por un nuevo viaducto diseñado por Renzo Piano. Las familias buscan que el juicio aclare responsabilidades y otorgue justicia.

title.original: US Stocks Fall as AI Trade Faces Fresh Scrutiny: Markets Wrap

title.zh: 美国股市下跌，人工智能交易面临新审视：市场综述
title.es: Acciones de EE.UU. caen ante nuevo escrutinio del comercio de IA: resumen de mercado

summary.original: U.S. stocks declined amid cautious trading across asset classes as investors weighed whether corporate earnings justified recent gains in artificial intelligence-related stocks. Additionally, uncertainty surrounding developments in the Middle East contributed to market unease. The heightened scrutiny on the AI trade appears to have dampened enthusiasm, leading to widespread selling pressure. The market's reaction reflects investor concerns about the sustainability of the rally and geopolitical risks. Specific indices such as the Dow Jones and S&P 500 experienced losses as the situation evolved.
summary.en: U.S. stocks declined amid cautious trading across asset classes as investors weighed whether corporate earnings justified recent gains in artificial intelligence-related stocks. Additionally, uncertainty surrounding developments in the Middle East contributed to market unease. The heightened scrutiny on the AI trade appears to have dampened enthusiasm, leading to widespread selling pressure. The market's reaction reflects investor concerns about the sustainability of the rally and geopolitical risks. Specific indices such as the Dow Jones and S&P 500 experienced losses as the situation evolved.
summary.zh: 美国股市因投资者对人工智能相关股票的盈利能力表示谨慎，资产类别间交易小心，股指如道琼斯和标普500均呈下跌趋势。中东局势不确定性加剧市场紧张情绪。对人工智能交易的严格审视抑制了市场热情，引发广泛抛售，反映投资者对行情持续性和地缘政治风险的担忧。
summary.es: Las acciones estadounidenses cayeron en medio de un comercio cauto entre clases de activos mientras los inversionistas evaluaban si las ganancias empresariales justificaban las recientes alzas en acciones relacionadas con inteligencia artificial. La incertidumbre sobre eventos en Medio Oriente también afectó la confianza del mercado. El mayor escrutinio del sector de IA enfrió el entusiasmo, provocando ventas generalizadas y reflejando preocupaciones sobre la sostenibilidad del rally y riesgos geopolíticos. Índices como Dow Jones y S&P 500 registraron pérdidas.

title.original: China eyes broader global access to yuan assets, as panda bond demand surges
title.en: China eyes broader global access to yuan assets, as panda bond demand surges
title.zh: 中国谋求人民币资产更广泛的全球准入，熊猫债券需求激增
title.es: China busca un acceso global más amplio a los activos en yuan, mientras la demanda de bonos panda se dispara

summary.original: Officials from China’s central bank have pledged to introduce additional measures aimed at making it easier for global investors to access yuan-denominated assets. The People’s Bank of China highlighted the yuan’s appreciation by 3 percent against the US dollar and 4.7 percent against a basket of global currencies in the first half of 2026, signaling increased market confidence in China's macroeconomy. Furthermore, issuance of panda bonds—yuan-denominated bonds issued by foreign entities in China’s onshore market—rose 69 percent to exceed 160 billion yuan (US$23.6 billion) during this period. Countries such as Hungary and Kazakhstan have recently issued panda bonds, and reports indicate that Indonesia and Brazil are preparing their debut issuances. The number of institutions trading panda bonds also increased significantly in the first half of the year, according to central bank data. These developments reflect Beijing’s efforts to boost the yuan’s role as a global currency.
summary.en: Officials from China’s central bank have pledged to introduce additional measures aimed at making it easier for global investors to access yuan-denominated assets. The People’s Bank of China highlighted the yuan’s appreciation by 3 percent against the US dollar and 4.7 percent against a basket of global currencies in the first half of 2026, signaling increased market confidence in China's macroeconomy. Furthermore, issuance of panda bonds—yuan-denominated bonds issued by foreign entities in China’s onshore market—rose 69 percent to exceed 160 billion yuan (US$23.6 billion) during this period. Countries such as Hungary and Kazakhstan have recently issued panda bonds, and reports indicate that Indonesia and Brazil are preparing their debut issuances. The number of institutions trading panda bonds also increased significantly in the first half of the year, according to central bank data. These developments reflect Beijing’s efforts to boost the yuan’s role as a global currency.
summary.zh: 中国央行官员承诺将出台更多措施，便利全球投资者获取人民币资产。2026年上半年人民币对美元升值3%，对一篮子全球货币升值4.7%。同期熊猫债券发行额增长69%，超过1600亿元人民币（约236亿美元），匈牙利、哈萨克斯坦已发行，印尼和巴西拟首发。交易机构数量大增，反映北京推动人民币国际化的努力。
summary.es: Funcionarios del banco central chino prometen facilitar aún más el acceso global a activos denominados en yuan. En el primer semestre de 2026, el yuan se apreció un 3% frente al dólar y un 4.7% frente a una cesta de monedas globales. La emisión de bonos panda creció un 69%, superando los 160 mil millones de yuanes (23,6 mil millones de USD). Hungría y Kazajistán ya emitieron bonos panda; Indonesia y Brasil preparan sus primeras emisiones. El número de instituciones que negocian estos bonos también aumentó, reflejando los esfuerzos de Pekín por promover el yuan como moneda global.

summary.en: The Caixin Global article reports that China experienced a missed growth target recently but notes that developments in artificial intelligence and rising oil prices have ended a three-year deflation streak in the country. The briefing is source-limited as the evidence is focused on these medical observations without additional context.
summary.zh: 《华尔街日报》报道，部分被囚禁八个月的女性人质体内仍存弹片，部分还长时间单独被关。证据集中于医疗观察，无更多背景信息。
summary.es: El artículo indica que algunas mujeres israelíes liberadas tras ocho meses de cautiverio aún presentan esquirlas en sus cuerpos, y algunas estuvieron aisladas largos periodos. La información se limita a observaciones médicas sin contexto adicional.

title.original: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
title.en: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
title.zh: 深海电缆疑遭破坏引发北约首次主导应对
title.es: Sospecha de Sabotaje en Cable Submarino Provoca Primera Respuesta Liderada por la OTAN

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal article 'Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response' explains that NATO has initiated its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign targeting critical infrastructure. This reaction came after a deep-sea cable was severed in the Baltic Sea. The summary is source-limited as the evidence does not elaborate on the nature of the sabotage or further NATO measures.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal article 'Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response' explains that NATO has initiated its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign targeting critical infrastructure. This reaction came after a deep-sea cable was severed in the Baltic Sea. The summary is source-limited as the evidence does not elaborate on the nature of the sabotage or further NATO measures.
summary.zh: 《华尔街日报》报道，北约对波罗的海深海电缆被切断事件启动首个协调反应，针对疑似关键基础设施破坏。证据未详细说明破坏性质及后续措施。
summary.es: NATO ha lanzado su primera respuesta coordinada ante sospechas de sabotaje en un cable submarino en el Mar Báltico, afectando infraestructura crítica. No se amplían detalles sobre la sabotaje o acciones subsecuentes.

title.original: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.en: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.zh: 卢旺达支持的反叛武装进入刚果避难城市
title.es: Rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda entran en ciudad santuario del Congo

summary.original: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.en: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.zh: 刚果市民报告称，卢旺达支持的反叛武装击溃刚果军队后发生枪击和炮击。联合国估计该避难城市内有超过一百万流离失所者，该市亦为援助中心。
summary.es: Residentes de Goma reportaron disparos y bombardeos tras la llegada de rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda que superaron a las tropas congoleñas. La ONU estima más de un millón de desplazados en esta ciudad santuario y centro de ayuda.

title.original: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.en: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.zh: 瑞士法郎、日元走强，DeepSeek新闻推动避险货币
title.es: Franco suizo y yen japonés suben mientras DeepSeek impulsa refugios seguros

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.zh: 据华尔街日报报道，瑞郎和日元兑美元走强，因投资者寻求避险货币。此举源于中国初创企业DeepSeek发布AI新模型，影响美国科技股。
summary.es: El Wall Street Journal informa que el franco suizo y el yen japonés se fortalecieron frente al dólar debido a que inversores buscan monedas refugio tras el lanzamiento de un modelo de IA de la startup china DeepSeek, que afectó a las acciones tecnológicas de EE.UU.

title.original: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.en: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.zh: 可卡因资助的帮派震撼哥伦比亚协议签订多年后
title.es: Bandas financiadas por cocaína sacuden Colombia años después del pacto de paz

summary.original: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.en: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.zh: 华尔街日报世界报道描述哥伦比亚遭受由可卡因资助的民兵持续攻击。这些事件发生在和平协议解除一强大反叛组织后八年，反映出政府未采取有效行动。
summary.es: Un artículo del Wall Street Journal describe ataques continuos de milicias financiadas por cocaína contra civiles en Colombia, ocho años tras un acuerdo de paz que eliminó a un grupo rebelde fuerte, mostrando la inacción estatal.

sections.description: AI research, products, and infrastructure signals.

title.original: Google Must Give Gemini Rivals Equal Access to Android System, EU Says
title.en: Google Must Give Gemini Rivals Equal Access to Android System, EU Says
title.zh: 欧盟称谷歌必须给予Gemini竞争者平等访问安卓系统权限
title.es: La UE dice que Google debe dar a los rivales de Gemini acceso equitativo al sistema Android

summary.original: Google faces a European Union directive to open up its Android operating system to artificial intelligence rivals for certain features and give search data to competing online engine providers.
summary.en: Google faces a European Union directive to open up its Android operating system to artificial intelligence rivals for certain features and give search data to competing online engine providers.
summary.zh: 谷歌面临欧盟要求，将其安卓操作系统对人工智能竞争者开放并向竞争搜索引擎提供搜索数据的指令。
summary.es: Google enfrenta una directiva de la Unión Europea para abrir su sistema operativo Android a rivales de inteligencia artificial para ciertas funciones y compartir datos de búsqueda con motores competidores.

title.original: CXMT’s Blockbuster IPO 212 Times Covered for Retail Investors
title.en: CXMT’s Blockbuster IPO 212 Times Covered for Retail Investors
title.zh: 长鑫存储火爆IPO获零售投资者212倍超额认购
title.es: La oferta pública inicial de CXMT, un éxito rotundo con una cobertura 212 veces superior para inversores minoristas

summary.original: The marquee listing of CXMT Corp. ignited a rush among retail investors as China’s homegrown memory giant opened books for an initial public offering to raise $9.8 billion, the second-largest in the nation’s history.
summary.en: The marquee listing of CXMT Corp. ignited a rush among retail investors as China’s homegrown memory giant opened books for an initial public offering to raise $9.8 billion, the second-largest in the nation’s history.
summary.zh: 作为中国本土存储巨头，长鑫存储的重点上市引发大量零售投资者抢购，计划融资98亿美元，为全国第二大规模IPO。
summary.es: La destacada cotización de CXMT Corp. provocó una oleada entre inversores minoristas cuando la compañía local de memorias en China abrió libros para recaudar 9.8 mil millones de dólares, la segunda mayor en la historia del país.

title.original: Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
title.en: Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
title.zh: Ultrahuman前硬件副总裁筹资550万美元，开发控制AI代理的设备
title.es: El ex vicepresidente de hardware de Ultrahuman recauda $5.5M para dispositivos que controlan agentes de IA, no solo para grabar

summary.original: Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.
summary.en: Aina is going to pilot a new device in the coming weeks.
summary.zh: Aina将在未来几周试点一款新设备。
summary.es: Aina pilotará un nuevo dispositivo en las próximas semanas.

title.original: AI Companion Bots and Virtual Lovers Face China Crackdown
title.en: AI Companion Bots and Virtual Lovers Face China Crackdown
title.zh: 中国整治AI伴侣机器人和虚拟恋人
title.es: Bots acompañantes de IA y amantes virtuales enfrentan represalias en China

summary.original: Beijing is shunning virtual lovers, which had grown into a popular social substitute
summary.en: Beijing is shunning virtual lovers, which had grown into a popular social substitute
summary.zh: 北京对虚拟恋人表示排斥，这一曾风靡一时的社交替代品正受到打压。
summary.es: Beijing está rechazando a los amantes virtuales, que se habían convertido en un popular sustituto social.

title.original: Vital Signals Announces $399 Signal Ring That Gives Blood Pressure Readings
title.en: Vital Signals Announces $399 Signal Ring That Gives Blood Pressure Readings
title.zh: Vital Signals宣布售价399美元的信号戒指，可测量血压
title.es: Vital Signals anuncia anillo Signal de $399 que da lecturas de presión arterial

summary.original: A three-year-old startup says it has produced a smart ring that can track blood pressure as accurately as a traditional arm cuff and that — eventually — it could be able to make medical diagnoses. If the company, called Vital Signals, can successfully deliver on the promise, it would represent a significant breakthrough in consumer wearables.
summary.en: A three-year-old startup says it has produced a smart ring that can track blood pressure as accurately as a traditional arm cuff and that — eventually — it could be able to make medical diagnoses. If the company, called Vital Signals, can successfully deliver on the promise, it would represent a significant breakthrough in consumer wearables.
summary.zh: 这家成立三年的初创公司表示，他们制造了一款智能戒指，血压测量的准确度与传统臂带相当，未来甚至有望做出医学诊断。如果Vital Signals能兑现承诺，这将是消费穿戴设备的一大突破。
summary.es: Una startup de tres años dice que ha producido un anillo inteligente que puede medir la presión arterial con la misma precisión que un brazalete tradicional y que—eventualmente—podría hacer diagnósticos médicos. Si Vital Signals cumple su promesa, sería un avance significativo en dispositivos de consumo.

title.original: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
title.en: Meta now alerts parents if their teen discussed suicide or self-harm with its AI chatbot
title.zh: Meta现可提醒父母青少年是否与其AI聊天机器人讨论过自杀或自残
title.es: Meta ahora alerta a padres si su adolescente habló de suicidio o autolesión con su chatbot AI

summary.original: The updates come as Meta and other tech companies are facing scrutiny from regulators and parents around how AI chatbots respond to users in crisis, particularly teenagers.
summary.en: The updates come as Meta and other tech companies are facing scrutiny from regulators and parents around how AI chatbots respond to users in crisis, particularly teenagers.
summary.zh: 随着监管机构和家长对AI聊天机器人如何应对危机用户，特别是青少年，的关注增加，Meta和其他科技公司推出了此类更新。
summary.es: Las actualizaciones surgen mientras Meta y otras compañías tecnológicas enfrentan escrutinio de reguladores y padres sobre cómo los chatbots de IA responden a usuarios en crisis, especialmente a adolescentes.

title.original: Why heat pumps are still so hot in the US
title.en: Why heat pumps are still so hot in the US
title.zh: 为什么热泵在美国依然火热
title.es: Por qué las bombas de calor siguen siendo tan populares en EE. UU.

summary.original: It feels as if it should be illegal to even think about heating appliances during the height of summer—seriously, these heat waves in New York have been brutal—but we need to talk about heat pumps. The appliances use electricity for heating, they’re incredibly efficient, and they’re on the rise. (For what it’s worth, many heat…
summary.en: It feels as if it should be illegal to even think about heating appliances during the height of summer—seriously, these heat waves in New York have been brutal—but we need to talk about heat pumps. The appliances use electricity for heating, they’re incredibly efficient, and they’re on the rise. (For what it’s worth, many heat…
summary.zh: 尽管盛夏高温令人难以想象使用取暖设备，但我们必须关注热泵。这些电力驱动的取暖设备效率极高，且正在逐渐普及。
summary.es: Aunque pensar en aparatos de calefacción en pleno verano parezca imposible—las olas de calor en Nueva York han sido intensas—debemos hablar de las bombas de calor. Estos aparatos usan electricidad para calefacción, son muy eficientes y están en aumento.

title.original: China memory-chip maker CXMT set for mega IPO
title.en: China memory-chip maker CXMT set for mega IPO
title.zh: 中国存储芯片制造商长鑫存储筹划巨额IPO
title.es: Fabricante chino de chips de memoria CXMT prepara mega OPV

summary.original: Subscriptions began on Thursday for shares in memory-chip maker ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) ahead of its listing on Shanghai’s Star Market in what could be mainland China’s second biggest initial public offering. With pricing set at 8.66 yuan (US$1.28) per share, the IPO of nearly 6.7 billion shares will raise gross proceeds of 57.9 billion yuan (US$8.5 billion). If a 15 per cent overallotment option is full…
summary.en: Subscriptions began on Thursday for shares in memory-chip maker ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) ahead of its listing on Shanghai’s Star Market in what could be mainland China’s second biggest initial public offering. With pricing set at 8.66 yuan (US$1.28) per share, the IPO of nearly 6.7 billion shares will raise gross proceeds of 57.9 billion yuan (US$8.5 billion). If a 15 per cent overallotment option is full…
summary.zh: 长鑫存储（CXMT）将在上海科创板上市，股票认购已于周四开始，预计将成为中国大陆第二大规模首次公开募股。发行价定为每股8.66元人民币（约1.28美元），近67亿股股票募资总额达579亿元人民币（约85亿美元）。如行使15%的超额配售权，将进一步增加募资规模。
summary.es: Comenzaron las suscripciones para acciones de ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) previo a su salida a bolsa en el mercado STAR de Shanghái, en lo que podría ser la segunda OPV más grande del continente chino. El precio se fijó en 8.66 yuanes (1.28 USD) por acción, casi 6,700 millones de acciones, recaudando 57.9 mil millones de yuanes (8.5 mil millones USD). Con opción de sobreasignación del 15%, la cifra podría crecer.

title.original: Phone maker OnePlus says it won’t release new phones in the U.S. and Europe
title.en: Phone maker OnePlus says it won’t release new phones in the U.S. and Europe
title.zh: 手机厂商OnePlus表示将停止在美国和欧洲发布新机
title.es: Fabricante de teléfonos OnePlus dice que no lanzará nuevos teléfonos en EE. UU. y Europa

summary.original: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027.
summary.en: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027.
summary.zh: OnePlus可能在2027年前逐步关闭其印度业务。
summary.es: OnePlus podría también cerrar sus operaciones en India para 2027.

title.original: Europe Finds It Hard to Break Up With American and Chinese Technology
title.en: Europe Finds It Hard to Break Up With American and Chinese Technology
title.zh: 欧洲难以摆脱美国和中国技术依赖
title.es: Europa encuentra difícil romper con la tecnología estadounidense y china

summary.original: France and Germany want to quit relying on America and China for key technology like artificial intelligence, but they’re having to choose where to do it.
summary.en: France and Germany want to quit relying on America and China for key technology like artificial intelligence, but they’re having to choose where to do it.
summary.zh: 法国和德国希望停止依赖美国和中国的关键技术如人工智能，但他们在选择替代方案上面临挑战。
summary.es: Francia y Alemania quieren dejar de depender de EE. UU. y China para tecnologías clave como inteligencia artificial, pero enfrentan dificultades en elegir dónde desarrollarlas.

title.original: Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build an AI for Robots
title.en: Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build an AI for Robots
title.zh: 日本将购买Nvidia Rubin芯片以打造机器人专属AI
title.es: Japón comprará chips Nvidia Rubin para construir una IA para robots

summary.original: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.
summary.en: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.
summary.zh: 日本计划从Nvidia公司购买27,500枚下一代Rubin芯片，以打造本土基础的机器人AI模型。
summary.es: Japón planea comprar 27,500 chips Rubin de próxima generación de Nvidia Corp. para desarrollar un modelo de IA fundamental propio para robots.

title.original: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
title.en: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
title.zh: 优步同意以148亿美元收购Delivery Hero
title.es: Uber acuerda comprar Delivery Hero en un trato de 14.8 mil millones de dólares

summary.original: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and expands the US firm’s global operations.
summary.en: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and expands the US firm’s global operations.
summary.zh: 优步科技公司已同意收购德国食品配送企业Delivery Hero SE，此交易价值148亿美元，扩展了其全球业务。
summary.es: Uber Technologies Inc. ha acordado comprar Delivery Hero SE en un trato que valora a la empresa alemana de reparto de comida en 14.8 mil millones de dólares y expande las operaciones globales de la firma estadounidense.

title.original: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
title.en: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
title.zh: Lululemon支持尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica完成3000万美元A轮融资
title.es: Lululemon respalda a la startup de reciclaje de nylon Syntetica con $30M en Serie A

summary.original: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.
summary.en: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.
summary.zh: 法国初创公司Syntetica开发了创新的尼龙回收技术，已获得知名合作伙伴和投资者支持。
summary.es: Syntetica, una startup francesa que ha desarrollado un enfoque novedoso para reciclar nylon, ya cuenta con socios e inversores reconocidos.

title.original: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
title.en: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
title.zh: Applied Computing欲为油气运营商打造全厂AI模型
title.es: Applied Computing quiere ofrecer un modelo de IA para toda la planta a operadores de petróleo y gas

summary.original: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
summary.en: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
summary.zh: Applied Computing筹集了2000万美元A轮融资，旨在为石油、天然气及石化行业构建基础AI模型。
summary.es: Applied Computing ha recaudado $20M en Serie A para construir un modelo de IA fundamental para la industria del petróleo, gas y petroquímica.

title.original: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
title.en: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
title.zh: 为何Greylock将其新基金规模限制在15亿美元，尽管表示可筹集更多
title.es: Por qué Greylock limitó su nuevo fondo a $1.5B a pesar de decir que podía recaudar más

summary.original: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.
summary.en: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.
summary.zh: Greylock通过控制每基金投资约25个项目，力求成为创业者“最重要的合作伙伴”。
summary.es: Al mantener el número de inversiones en unos 25 por fondo, Greylock busca seguir siendo lo que llama "el socio más importante" para sus fundadores.

title.original: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
title.en: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
title.zh: 据报道微软训练销售人员贬低OpenAI和Anthropic
title.es: Microsoft supuestamente entrena a vendedores para desacreditar a OpenAI y Anthropic

summary.original: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.
summary.en: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.
summary.zh: 微软旨在推广其内部AI模型，强调其较竞争对手更高效且更具性价比。
summary.es: Microsoft busca vender sus modelos de IA internos como más eficientes y rentables que los modelos de la competencia.

title.original: China Sends Robots Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title.en: China Sends Robots Into the World to Learn How to Be Human
title.zh: 中国派机器人走向世界 学习如何做人
title.es: China envía robots al mundo para aprender a ser humanos

summary.original: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.
summary.en: In an industrial park on the outskirts of Beijing, a humanoid arm picks up a bag of Lay’s potato chips and places it neatly along a row of snacks on a shelf. Nearby, a worker films himself grabbing cushions off a sofa and folding sheets on a bed, recording videos that will be used to develop brains for robots.
summary.zh: 在北京郊区的一个工业园区，一只仿人机械臂整齐地将乐事薯片放在货架上。附近，一名工人录制自己拿取沙发靠垫和叠床单的视频，这些视频将用于开发机器人的“大脑”。
summary.es: En un parque industrial cerca de Beijing, un brazo humanoide coloca ordenadamente una bolsa de papas Lay’s en una fila de snacks. Cerca, un trabajador se graba mientras recoge cojines del sofá y dobla sábanas en una cama, grabaciones que se usarán para desarrollar cerebros para robots.

title.original: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
title.en: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
title.zh: 特斯拉司机致命德州车祸踩下100%加速器，美国家安全委员会证实
title.es: Conductor de Tesla en choque fatal en Texas pisó el acelerador al 100%, confirma NTSB

summary.original: The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.
summary.en: The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.
summary.zh: 安全委员会确认了特斯拉对上月发生事故的说法，该公司在事故发生数日后分享了相关信息。
summary.es: La junta de seguridad confirmó la versión del accidente dada por Tesla, que la compañía compartió días después de que ocurriera el mes pasado.

title.original: Judge Dismisses Suit Accusing Apple of Failing to Limit Child Sex Abuse Material

summary.original: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its most robust release yet. GPT-Red automates…
summary.en: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its most robust release yet. GPT-Red automates…
summary.zh: OpenAI开发了名为GPT-Red的语言模型“超级黑客”，作为对手帮助其其他模型增强防御网络攻击的能力。上周公司发布了旗舰LLM最新版本GPT-5.6，称通过与GPT-Red训练使其成为迄今最强健的版本。
summary.es: OpenAI creó un súper hacker LLM llamado GPT-Red que usa como sparring para ayudar a sus otros modelos a mejorar defensas contra ciberataques. La semana pasada lanzó GPT-5.6, su versión más robusta gracias al entrenamiento contra GPT-Red.

title.original: China completes world’s first commercial brain-computer interface implant
title.en: China completes world’s first commercial brain-computer interface implant
title.zh: 中国完成全球首例商业脑机接口植入手术
title.es: China completa el primer implante comercial de interfaz cerebro-computadora del mundo

summary.original: China has completed the world’s first commercial surgery using an invasive brain-computer interface (BCI) device approved in March, marking a leap in the country’s neurotechnology push to rival Elon Musk’s Neuralink. Chinese surgeons implanted a coin-sized brain chip on a patient with impaired hand mobility linked to a spinal cord injury from a car accident 10 years ago, according to a statement from the Science and…
summary.en: China has completed the world’s first commercial surgery using an invasive brain-computer interface (BCI) device approved in March, marking a leap in the country’s neurotechnology push to rival Elon Musk’s Neuralink. Chinese surgeons implanted a coin-sized brain chip on a patient with impaired hand mobility linked to a spinal cord injury from a car accident 10 years ago, according to a statement from the Science and…
summary.zh: 中国完成了世界首例使用3月批准的侵入式脑机接口设备的商业手术。这标志着中国在神经技术领域的进步，旨在与埃隆·马斯克的Neuralink竞争。外科医生为一位因车祸导致脊髓损伤、手部活动受限的患者植入了硬币大小的脑芯片。
summary.es: China realizó la primera cirugía comercial usando un dispositivo invasivo de interfaz cerebro-computadora aprobado en marzo. Es un avance en su tecnología neuro para competir con Neuralink. Cirujanos implantaron un chip cerebral del tamaño de una moneda a un paciente con movilidad de mano limitada tras un accidente de coche hace 10 años.

title.original: Sam Altman signals OpenAI price war as rivalry with Anthropic, China heats up

summary.original: OpenAI founder and CEO Sam Altman has signalled that the company was prepared to slash the price of its latest artificial intelligence models, as competition intensifies with US rival Anthropic and a growing wave of cheaper, rapidly advancing Chinese alternatives. In a social media post on Tuesday, Altman noted that OpenAI’s flagship GPT-5.6 Sol was already “half the price” of Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5, adding that…
summary.en: OpenAI founder and CEO Sam Altman has signalled that the company was prepared to slash the price of its latest artificial intelligence models, as competition intensifies with US rival Anthropic and a growing wave of cheaper, rapidly advancing Chinese alternatives. In a social media post on Tuesday, Altman noted that OpenAI’s flagship GPT-5.6 Sol was already “half the price” of Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5, adding that…
summary.zh: OpenAI创始人兼CEO萨姆·奥特曼表示公司准备大幅降价最新人工智能模型，随着与美国对手Anthropic及不断壮大的中国廉价先进产品竞争加剧。周二社交媒体帖子中提到，OpenAI旗舰GPT-5.6 Sol价格已是Anthropic Claude Fable 5的一半。
summary.es: El fundador y CEO de OpenAI, Sam Altman, indicó que la compañía está lista para bajar drásticamente el precio de sus últimos modelos de IA, en medio de la creciente competencia con Anthropic en EE.UU. y alternativas chinas más baratas y avanzadas. En una publicación el martes mencionó que GPT-5.6 Sol cuesta la mitad que Claude Fable 5 de Anthropic.

The plan comes on the heels of the Chinese AI darling’s recently closed Series A funding round in June – its first external funding round – which b…

This is one of the clearest public snapshots of how a seasoned AI practitioner treats planning, critique, generation, and review as distinct model-specialized stages — a concrete multi-model workflow that goes well beyond "just use the best model for everything." swyx分享了他当前正式项目的模型编排配置…
summary.en: swyx shared his current model orchestration stack for serious projects: Sol Ultra for planning, Fable 5 for critique, Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7 for the implementation ("ultracode/slop cannon"), and Devin for final code review. This is one of the clearest public snapshots of how a seasoned AI practitioner treats planning, critique, generation, and review as distinct model-specialized stages — a concrete multi-model workflow that goes well beyond "just use the best model for everything." swyx分享了他当前正式项目的模型编排配置…
summary.zh: swyx分享了他用于正式项目的模型编排栈，包括Sol Ultra用于规划，Fable 5用于批评，Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7用于实现（"ultracode/slop cannon"），Devin用于最终代码审核，体现了多模型协同的工作流程。
summary.es: swyx compartió su pila de orquestación de modelos para proyectos serios: Sol Ultra para planificación, Fable 5 para crítica, Sonnet 5 / Terra Ultra / SWE 1.7 para implementación ("ultracode/slop cannon"), y Devin para revisión final de código, mostrando un flujo de trabajo multi-modelo concreto.

Thariq described the core change: Artifacts are now more composable and expressive, and one of his personal showcases is a live project dashboard built in "Claude Tag" — editable by external collaborators or directly by a local Claude Code instance. This points toward Artifacts evolving from static code outputs into lightweight, AI-editable shared workspaces, narrowing the gap between an AI-generated artifact and a live collaborative document. Claud…
summary.en: A meaningful Artifacts upgrade shipped from the Claude Code team. Thariq described the core change: Artifacts are now more composable and expressive, and one of his personal showcases is a live project dashboard built in "Claude Tag" — editable by external collaborators or directly by a local Claude Code instance. This points toward Artifacts evolving from static code outputs into lightweight, AI-editable shared workspaces, narrowing the gap between an AI-generated artifact and a live collaborative document. Claud…
summary.zh: Claude Code团队发布了一项重要的Artifacts升级。Thariq介绍了核心变化：Artifacts 现在更具组合性和表现力，他的个人示例是一个用“Claude Tag”构建的实时项目仪表板——支持外部协作者或本地Claude Code实例直接编辑。此升级使Artifacts从静态代码输出演变为轻量级、AI可编辑的共享工作空间，缩小了AI生成产物和实时协作文档之间的差距。
summary.es: El equipo de Claude Code lanzó una actualización significativa de Artifacts. Thariq describió el cambio central: Artifacts ahora son más composables y expresivos; uno de sus ejemplos personales es un tablero de proyecto en vivo construido con "Claude Tag", editable por colaboradores externos o directamente por una instancia local de Claude Code. Esto apunta a que Artifacts evolucionen de salidas de código estático a espacios de trabajo ligeros, editables por IA y compartidos, cerrando la brecha entre un artefacto generado por IA y un documento colaborativo en vivo.

title.original: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.en: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.zh: Amjad Masad · @amasad · Replit首席执行官
title.es: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO de Replit

summary.original: Masad wrote: "Getting realtime progress updates on my model training runs. This feels like early vibe coding except it's making personal models." The parallel is apt — vibe coding abstracted implementation complexity so non-experts could ship software; the next frontier appears to be vibe training: iterating on personal or domain-specific models with real-time feedback, without needing to understand the full training stack. Replit is clearly positioning itself as the primary platform for this new modality. Masad写道…
summary.en: Masad wrote: "Getting realtime progress updates on my model training runs. This feels like early vibe coding except it's making personal models." The parallel is apt — vibe coding abstracted implementation complexity so non-experts could ship software; the next frontier appears to be vibe training: iterating on personal or domain-specific models with real-time feedback, without needing to understand the full training stack. Replit is clearly positioning itself as the primary platform for this new modality. Masad写道…
summary.zh: Masad写道：“实时获取我的模型训练进度更新。这感觉像早期的vibe编码，只不过现在是制作个人模型。”这比喻恰当——vibe编码简化了实现复杂度，使非专家也能发布软件；下一前沿似乎是vibe训练：通过实时反馈迭代个人或特定领域模型，无需全面了解训练堆栈。Replit显然正定位自身为此新模式的主要平台。
summary.es: Masad escribió: "Recibir actualizaciones de progreso en tiempo real durante mis ejecuciones de entrenamiento de modelos. Se siente como la codificación vibe temprana, pero ahora creando modelos personales." La analogía es acertada: la codificación vibe abstrajo la complejidad para que no expertos pudieran lanzar software; la próxima frontera parece ser el entrenamiento vibe: iterar sobre modelos personales o específicos con retroalimentación en tiempo real, sin necesidad de entender todo el stack de entrenamiento. Replit se posiciona claramente como la plataforma principal para esta nueva modalidad.

title.original: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO, Vercel
title.en: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO, Vercel
title.zh: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · Vercel首席执行官
title.es: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO de Vercel

summary.original: Rauch shared a striking quantitative signal: "Open-weight models ran 29% of gateway tokens, up from 11% in April." In roughly three months, open-weight models nearly tripled their share of inference traffic on the v0 / Vercel AI Gateway — the most concrete real-world data point corroborating today's Nemotron podcast thesis. In a companion post, Rauch also noted that v0's two most popular features are the filesystem API and observability tooling, with Vercel doubling down on both — pointing to where agentic workflo…
summary.en: Rauch shared a striking quantitative signal: "Open-weight models ran 29% of gateway tokens, up from 11% in April." In roughly three months, open-weight models nearly tripled their share of inference traffic on the v0 / Vercel AI Gateway — the most concrete real-world data point corroborating today's Nemotron podcast thesis. In a companion post, Rauch also noted that v0's two most popular features are the filesystem API and observability tooling, with Vercel doubling down on both — pointing to where agentic workflo…
summary.zh: Rauch分享了一个显著的量化信号：“开源权重模型消耗了29%的入口令牌，四月为11%。”三个月内，开源权重模型在v0 / Vercel AI Gateway的推理流量中几乎增长三倍，这支持了今日Nemotron播客的论点。在一篇配套文章中，Rauch指出v0的两项最流行功能是文件系统API和可观测性工具，Vercel正加大对两者投入，显示主动工作流的方向。
summary.es: Rauch compartió una señal cuantitativa impactante: "Los modelos de código abierto representaron el 29% de los tokens en el gateway, frente al 11% en abril." En aproximadamente tres meses, los modelos de peso abierto casi triplicaron su participación en el tráfico de inferencia en el v0 / Vercel AI Gateway, lo que corrobora la tesis del podcast Nemotron de hoy. En una publicación complementaria, Rauch también señaló que las dos características más populares de v0 son la API del sistema de archivos y las herramientas de observabilidad, con Vercel duplicando su apuesta en ambas, apuntando al trabajo fluido agentic.

In a companion post, he articulated the central challenge for enterprise private models: "Your most valuable information and insights are not only always changing, but they're often your most sensitive." This frames why static fine-tuning isn't enough — enterprise AI needs continuou…
summary.en: Levie laid out a structural view of the AI landscape: frontier intelligence continues unabated, with top labs perpetually raising the ceiling; smaller, cheaper models absorb "workhorse" tasks while frontier models act as orchestrators. In a companion post, he articulated the central challenge for enterprise private models: "Your most valuable information and insights are not only always changing, but they're often your most sensitive." This frames why static fine-tuning isn't enough — enterprise AI needs continuou…
summary.zh: Levie提出AI格局的结构性观点：前沿智能持续进步，顶尖实验室不断提升上限；小型且廉价模型承担“主力”任务，前沿模型则作为协调者。他在配套帖子中阐述企业私有模型的核心挑战：“最有价值的信息和洞察不断变化，且往往极为敏感。”这说明静态微调不够，企业AI需持续...
summary.es: Levie planteó una visión estructural del panorama de la IA: la inteligencia de frontera sigue sin pausa, con los principales laboratorios elevando continuamente el techo; modelos más pequeños y económicos absorben tareas 'fuerza de trabajo', mientras los de frontera actúan como orquestadores. En una publicación complementaria, articuló el desafío central para modelos privados empresariales: "Tu información y perspectivas más valiosas no solo cambian siempre, sino que suelen ser las más sensibles." Esto justifica por qué el ajuste fino estático no basta, las IA empresariales requieren continua...

title.original: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Design, Cursor AI
title.en: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Design, Cursor AI
title.zh: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Cursor AI设计师
title.es: Ryo Lu · @ryolu_ · Diseño, Cursor AI

summary.original: Ryo built a custom e-reader firmware entirely with Cursor — targeting beautiful CJK and Latin typography with vertical text layout (縱書・禁則), book syncing, and progress tracking on Xteink hardware. The project is technically complex embedded systems work that previously would have required deep C/C++ fluency; Cursor handled most of the implementation. "Hardware hacking is fun!" is the signal: AI coding tools have now expanded the builder identity beyond software into physical systems, and Cursor is the tool of choic…
summary.en: Ryo built a custom e-reader firmware entirely with Cursor — targeting beautiful CJK and Latin typography with vertical text layout (縱書・禁則), book syncing, and progress tracking on Xteink hardware. The project is technically complex embedded systems work that previously would have required deep C/C++ fluency; Cursor handled most of the implementation. "Hardware hacking is fun!" is the signal: AI coding tools have now expanded the builder identity beyond software into physical systems, and Cursor is the tool of choic…
summary.zh: Ryo用Cursor完全构建了一款定制电子阅读器固件，面向优美的中日韩和拉丁文字排版，支持竖排(縱書・禁則)、书籍同步及进度追踪，运行于Xteink硬件。这是技术复杂的嵌入式系统工作，过去需深厚C/C++功底；Cursor承担了大部分实现。“硬件黑客很有趣！”表明AI编码工具已将创造者的身份扩展至物理系统，Cursor成首选工具。
summary.es: Ryo construyó un firmware personalizado para lector electrónico completamente con Cursor, enfocado en tipografía hermosa CJK y latina con disposición vertical (縱書・禁則), sincronización de libros y seguimiento de progreso en hardware Xteink. Este proyecto técnicamente complejo de sistemas embebidos antes requeriría profundo dominio de C/C++; Cursor manejó la mayor parte de la implementación. "¡Hackear hardware es divertido!" es la señal: las herramientas de codificación IA han ampliado la identidad del creador más allá del software hacia sistemas físicos, y Cursor es la herramienta preferida.

title.original: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO, OpenAI

title.es: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO de OpenAI

summary.original: Altman reacted to what appeared to be a provocative Anthropic post — "i thought this was satire, kept looking for the handle to be spelled c1audeai or something" — garnering 8,294 likes, a rare moment of the OpenAI CEO publicly engaging with a competitor's move. In a separate post he wrote: "still sorta breaks my brain to see our models be good at design finally" — a candid acknowledgment that frontier-quality design capability is genuinely new territory even for GPT. Together the two posts sketch a competitive dy…
summary.en: Altman reacted to what appeared to be a provocative Anthropic post — "i thought this was satire, kept looking for the handle to be spelled c1audeai or something" — garnering 8,294 likes, a rare moment of the OpenAI CEO publicly engaging with a competitor's move. In a separate post he wrote: "still sorta breaks my brain to see our models be good at design finally" — a candid acknowledgment that frontier-quality design capability is genuinely new territory even for GPT. Together the two posts sketch a competitive dy…
summary.zh: Altman对似乎是挑衅性的Anthropic帖子做出反应——“我以为这是讽刺，一直找账户名拼成c1audeai之类”——获得8,294个点赞，这是OpenAI CEO罕见的公开回应竞争对手动作。另有帖子写道：“看到我们的模型终于擅长设计，仍让我有些难以置信”——坦率承认前沿设计能力对GPT来说是真正的新领域。两帖共同勾画了竞争态势。
summary.es: Altman reaccionó a lo que parecía un post provocativo de Anthropic — "pensé que era sátira, buscaba el handle que fuera c1audeai o algo así" — obteniendo 8,294 likes, un raro momento del CEO de OpenAI respondiendo públicamente a un movimiento de un competidor. En otra publicación escribió: "todavía me cuesta creer que nuestros modelos finalmente sean buenos en diseño" — un reconocimiento sincero de que la capacidad de diseño de punta es un territorio nuevo incluso para GPT. Juntas, las dos publicaciones esbozan una dinámica competitiva.

summary.en: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. Inside will be some 100 stainless-steel cabinets, each about six feet tall and connected to a supply of liquid helium that keeps them only a few degrees above absolute zero.…
summary.zh: 这台可能改变世界的机器将安置在一间既像数据中心又像冰激凌工厂的房间内，内有约100个六英尺高的不锈钢柜，连接液氦供应，将温度维持在接近绝对零度。
summary.es: La máquina que podría cambiar el mundo estará en una sala que parece un centro de datos combinado con una fábrica de helados. Dentro habrá unos 100 gabinetes de acero inoxidable, cada uno de aproximadamente seis pies de altura y conectados a un suministro de helio líquido que los mantiene a pocos grados sobre el cero absoluto…

title.original: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus
title.en: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus

title.es: Laboratorios de IA chinos desafían a Thinking Machines Lab con nuevo enfoque industrial

summary.original: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.en: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.zh: 两位中国前AI实验室领导者表示，退出激烈的前沿AI竞争后，他们将挑战由前OpenAI高管Mira Murati创立的美国初创公司Thinking Machines Lab，专注于构建行业特定的人工智能解决方案和模型。他们认为，“所有模型都一味追求通用智能的极限……但许多实际场景未必需要如此”。
summary.es: Dos exlíderes de laboratorios de IA chinos dijeron que tras salir de la feroz carrera de IA de punta, apuntan a desafiar a Thinking Machines Lab, una startup estadounidense fundada por la exejecutiva de OpenAI Mira Murati, y enfocarse en construir soluciones y modelos de inteligencia artificial específicos para la industria. "Todos los modelos persiguen incansablemente el techo de la inteligencia general... pero en muchos escenarios reales no es estrictamente necesario..."

summary.en: OpenAI's Codex and ChatGPT product lead committed publicly that GPT-5.6 Sol will remain in all paid ChatGPT subscriptions — Plus, Pro, Go, Team, and Edu — and is not being swapped for a weaker model. A follow-up update noted that inference optimizations have landed and cost savings are being passed to subscribers. At 10K+ likes, this was the day's most-engaged OpenAI communication: no nerfing, only better economics. OpenAI 的 Codex 和 ChatGPT 产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol 将继续包含在所有付费 ChatGPT 订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team 和 Edu——不会被更…
summary.zh: OpenAI的Codex和ChatGPT产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol将继续包含在所有付费ChatGPT订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team和Edu——不会被更弱模型替代。后续更新提到已优化推理并将成本节省转给订阅者。该消息获得超1万点赞，是当天关注度最高的OpenAI通告。
summary.es: El líder de producto de Codex y ChatGPT de OpenAI se comprometió públicamente a que GPT-5.6 Sol seguirá incluido en todas las suscripciones pagas de ChatGPT—Plus, Pro, Go, Team y Edu—y no será reemplazado por un modelo inferior. Una actualización posterior indicó que se implementaron optimizaciones de inferencia y que los ahorros se transfieren a los suscriptores. Con más de 10K likes, fue la comunicación de OpenAI con mayor interacción del día.

summary.original: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.en: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.zh: 有三位知情人士周一透露，Shein执行董事长Donald Tang将在带领公司完成上市任务后辞职，转为顾问角色。唐是开始从事银行业的华裔美国亿万富翁，曾是Shein创始人徐威的西方代表。
summary.es: Tres fuentes con conocimiento directo indicaron el lunes que Donald Tang, presidente ejecutivo de Shein, renunciará a medida que se complete la salida a bolsa, pasando a un rol asesor tras tres años como la cara pública de la marca mundial de moda rápida. Tang, un multimillonario chino-estadounidense que comenzó en la banca, ha actuado como representante occidental del reservado fundador de Shein, Sky Xu.

summary.en: Beijing’s recent cybersecurity warning against American artificial intelligence lab Anthropic is expected to accelerate a shift among Chinese developers towards domestic coding alternatives, according to analysts. China’s National Vulnerability Database (NVDB), overseen by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, issued an alert this week claiming multiple versions of Anthropic’s flagship Claude Code too…
summary.zh: 分析人士称，北京近期对美国人工智能实验室Anthropic的网络安全警告，预计将加速中国开发者转向国产编码替代品。中国工业和信息化部监管的国家漏洞库本周发出警报，指出Anthropic旗舰产品Claude Code的多个版本存在问题。
summary.es: Según analistas, la reciente advertencia de ciberseguridad en Pekín contra el laboratorio estadounidense de IA Anthropic acelerará el giro de desarrolladores chinos hacia alternativas nacionales. La Base Nacional de Vulnerabilidades de China, supervisada por el Ministerio de Industria y Tecnología de la Información, emitió una alerta esta semana sobre varias versiones del Claude Code de Anthropic.

summary.en: In Episode 13 of Behind the Craft, Jessi Miracle, BrandCraft's award-winning Web Director, discusses designing websites with the end user in mind. The episode reflects on a website redesign project, highlighting user-centered design principles. summary.zh: 在《Behind the Craft》第13集中，BrandCraft屡获殊荣的网页总监Jessi Miracle分享了以终端用户为核心的网站设计理念，回顾了一个网站重新设计项目，强调了以用户为中心的设计原则。这期内容对关注网页设计及用户体验如何塑造高效数字产品的观众非常有价值。

El episodio repasa un proyecto de rediseño de sitio web y resalta principios de diseño centrados en el usuario. Esta conversación será útil para quienes se interesan en el diseño web y cómo la experiencia del usuario impacta productos digitales efectivos.

summary.en: Episode 12 of Behind the Craft features web designer Jess Miracle, who explains that design goes beyond aesthetics to include functionality. Ofrece perspectivas útiles para quienes desean integrar diseño y experiencia de usuario para representar negocios en línea.

title.original: The Science & Treatment of Bipolar Disorder | Huberman Lab Essentials
title.en: The Science & Treatment of Bipolar Disorder | Huberman Lab Essentials
title.zh: 双相情感障碍的科学与治疗 | Huberman实验室精要
title.es: La ciencia y el tratamiento del trastorno bipolar | Huberman Lab Essentials

summary.original: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode explains the biology, symptoms, and types of bipolar disorder, highlighting the condition characterized by extreme mood and energy shifts. It covers topics such as diagnostic criteria, mood cycling patterns, and treatments including lithium therapy, talk therapies, and nutraceuticals. The episode aims to educate listeners on bipolar disorder's science and treatment approaches, valuable for those affected or interested in brain health and mood regulation.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode explains the biology, symptoms, and types of bipolar disorder, highlighting the condition characterized by extreme mood and energy shifts. It covers topics such as diagnostic criteria, mood cycling patterns, and treatments including lithium therapy, talk therapies, and nutraceuticals. The episode aims to educate listeners on bipolar disorder's science and treatment approaches, valuable for those affected or interested in brain health and mood regulation.
summary.zh: 本期Huberman实验室精要介绍了双相情感障碍的生物学、症状及类型，强调其极端情绪与能量波动特征，涵盖诊断标准、情绪周期模式以及锂治疗、谈话疗法与营养补充品等治疗方法。旨在为受影响者及关注脑健康与情绪调节的听众普及相关科学与治疗知识。
summary.es: Este episodio de Huberman Lab Essentials explica la biología, síntomas y tipos del trastorno bipolar, destacando los cambios extremos de ánimo y energía. Cubre criterios diagnósticos, patrones de ciclos de ánimo y tratamientos como terapia con litio, terapias habladas y nutracéuticos. El episodio busca educar a los oyentes sobre la ciencia y tratamientos del trastorno bipolar, valioso para afectados o interesados en la salud cerebral y regulación del ánimo.

title.original: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Bipolar Disorder
title.en: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Bipolar Disorder
title.zh: 基础知识：双相情感障碍的科学与治疗
title.es: Fundamentos: La ciencia y el tratamiento del trastorno bipolar

summary.original: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, Dr. Andrew Huberman explains the biology, symptoms, and types of bipolar disorder. He discusses how bipolar I and II differ in diagnostic criteria, including mania and hypomania, and covers various treatment options such as lithium, talk therapy, electroconvulsive therapy, and nutraceuticals like omega-3 fatty acids. The episode also explores the relationship between mood disorders and creativity. It targets those with bipolar disorder, their acquaintances, and listeners interested in mood, energy, and brain function balance.
summary.en: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, Dr. Andrew Huberman explains the biology, symptoms, and types of bipolar disorder. He discusses how bipolar I and II differ in diagnostic criteria, including mania and hypomania, and covers various treatment options such as lithium, talk therapy, electroconvulsive therapy, and nutraceuticals like omega-3 fatty acids. The episode also explores the relationship between mood disorders and creativity. It targets those with bipolar disorder, their acquaintances, and listeners interested in mood, energy, and brain function balance.
summary.zh: 本集Huberman实验室基础知识中，Dr. Andrew Huberman讲解了双相情感障碍的生物学、症状及类型，解释了双相I型和II型在诊断标准上的区别，包括躁狂和轻躁狂，并介绍了锂剂、谈话治疗、电休克治疗及ω-3脂肪酸等营养制剂的多种治疗方案。节目还探讨了情绪障碍与创造力的关系，适合双相障碍患者、其亲友及关注情绪、能量与大脑功能平衡的听众。
summary.es: En este episodio esencial de Huberman Lab, el Dr. Andrew Huberman explica la biología, síntomas y tipos del trastorno bipolar. Discute las diferencias diagnósticas entre bipolar I y II, incluyendo manía e hipomanía, y aborda opciones de tratamiento como litio, terapia hablada, terapia electroconvulsiva y nutracéuticos como ácidos grasos omega-3. También explora la relación entre trastornos del ánimo y creatividad. Dirigido a personas con trastorno bipolar, sus allegados y oyentes interesados en el equilibrio del ánimo, energía y función cerebral.

title.original: Anthropic's Katelyn Lesse & Angela Jiang: Building an Ecosystem, not a Walled Garden

summary.original: This episode from Training Data features Katelyn Lesse and Angela Jiang of Anthropic discussing the development of Anthropic's developer platform. They emphasize their approach to creating an ecosystem that supports both external builders and their own products, rather than a closed, walled garden model. The conversation offers insights into building flexible platforms in AI and technology, which could be valuable for listeners interested in development ecosystems and AI integration.
summary.en: This episode from Training Data features Katelyn Lesse and Angela Jiang of Anthropic discussing the development of Anthropic's developer platform. They emphasize their approach to creating an ecosystem that supports both external builders and their own products, rather than a closed, walled garden model. La charla ofrece perspectivas sobre cómo construir plataformas flexibles en IA y tecnología, útiles para quienes se interesan en ecosistemas de desarrollo e integración de IA.

The conversation takes place in a casual setting while cooking Mediterranean meatballs, blending technical discussion with approachable dialogue. This episode is likely insightful for listeners interested in AI memory limitations and innovations in AI technology.

This episode is likely insightful for listeners interested in AI memory limitations and innovations in AI technology.

title.en: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel

As an expert on human memory, Dr. Castel provides evidence-based insights and practical advice that could benefit anyone looking to enhance their mental performance. The episode is recommended for listeners aiming to understand cognitive science and apply techniques to boost memory.

title.original: The AI honeymoon phase is over (and tech workers are feeling it) | Noam Segal
title.en: The AI honeymoon phase is over (and tech workers are feeling it) | Noam Segal
title.zh: AI蜜月期已结束（科技工作者感受显著） | Noam Segal
title.es: La fase de luna de miel de la IA terminó (y los trabajadores tecnológicos lo sienten) | Noam Segal

summary.original: Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at companies like Airbnb, Meta, and Twitter, appears on Lenny's Podcast to discuss the end of the 'AI honeymoon phase' and its impact on tech workers. The episode explores current sentiments in the tech industry regarding AI, blending perspectives from AI building and community research. This conversation may interest listeners who want to understand evolving attitudes towards AI in the workplace.
summary.en: Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at companies like Airbnb, Meta, and Twitter, appears on Lenny's Podcast to discuss the end of the 'AI honeymoon phase' and its impact on tech workers. The episode explores current sentiments in the tech industry regarding AI, blending perspectives from AI building and community research. This conversation may interest listeners who want to understand evolving attitudes towards AI in the workplace.
summary.zh: Noam Segal，在Airbnb、Meta、Twitter等公司有研究领导经验，出现在Lenny的播客中探讨AI“蜜月期”结束及其对科技工作者的影响。节目融合AI开发与社区研究视角，适合想了解职场中对AI态度变化的听众。
summary.es: Noam Segal, líder de investigación con experiencia en Airbnb, Meta y Twitter, participa en el Podcast de Lenny para discutir el fin de la 'fase de luna de miel' de la IA y su impacto en trabajadores tecnológicos. El episodio explora sentimientos actuales en la industria tech respecto a la IA, combinando perspectivas de construcción y comunidad de IA. Interesante para quienes desean entender actitudes cambiantes hacia la IA en el trabajo.

title.original: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.en: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.zh: 如何在任何年龄提升记忆与认知功能 | Dr. Alan Castel
title.es: Cómo mejorar la memoria y función cognitiva a cualquier edad | Dr. Alan Castel

summary.original: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.zh: Huberman Lab播客邀请UCLA心理学教授Alan Castel博士，探讨如何在任何年龄提升学习能力与记忆，解析假记忆、好奇心与自我测试等记忆强化策略，并介绍“超级老人”认知能力提升特征，提供科学洞见与实用工具。
summary.es: El episodio del podcast Huberman Lab presenta al Dr. Alan Castel, profesor de psicología en UCLA y experto en memoria y envejecimiento, quien analiza cómo mejorar el aprendizaje y la memoria a cualquier edad, explicando funciones de la memoria, falsos recuerdos, estrategias como la curiosidad y autoevaluación para fortalecerla, además de características de los "superagers" que mejoran la capacidad cognitiva.

title.original: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.en: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.zh: 阿尔茨海默病与痴呆护理的演变：早期检测、个性化治疗、新疗法及多模式策略改变格局 | Gayatri Devi医生
title.es: La evolución del cuidado del Alzheimer y demencia: detección precoz, tratamiento personalizado, nuevas terapias y enfoque multimodal que cambian el panorama | Dra. Gayatri Devi

summary.original: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.en: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.zh: Peter Attia Drive节目邀请神经科专家Gayatri Devi医生，讨论痴呆作为连续体的观点、个性化治疗进展、生物标志物、早期检测、抗淀粉样蛋白疗法及更年期与认知关联，介绍多模式治疗方法及未来AI与精准医疗在痴呆护理中的作用，深入解析阿尔茨海默病护理新趋势。
summary.es: En este episodio de The Peter Attia Drive, la neuróloga Gayatri Devi, especialista en trastornos de la memoria como Alzheimer y demencias, aborda la demencia como un espectro, avances en tratamientos personalizados, biomarcadores, detección temprana, terapias anti-amiloides y el papel de la menopausia en la cognición. También explora un enfoque multimodal y el futuro de la IA y la medicina de precisión en el cuidado de demencias, ofreciendo una mirada profunda a las tendencias cambiantes en el cuidado del Alzheimer.

title.original: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.en: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.zh: 科技工作者对2026年AI的真实感受 | 年度AI情绪调查（Noam Segal）
title.es: Cómo se sienten realmente los trabajadores tecnológicos sobre la IA en 2026 | Encuesta anual de sentimiento AI (Noam Segal)

summary.original: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at Airbnb, Meta, Twitter, Zapier, Intercom, and Figma, who co-leads the annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey. The discussion explores the sentiments of tech workers in 2026 regarding their jobs, AI, burnout, and career futures, based on a large quantitative study involving thousands across multiple tech roles. Key insights include a divide among tech workers between those thriving and those struggling, a significant rise in burnout, the four emotional archetypes shaping tech workers' experiences, and the role of managers in employee well-being. It offers concrete advice for employees and leaders navigating these challenges.
summary.en: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at Airbnb, Meta, Twitter, Zapier, Intercom, and Figma, who co-leads the annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey. The discussion explores the sentiments of tech workers in 2026 regarding their jobs, AI, burnout, and career futures, based on a large quantitative study involving thousands across multiple tech roles. Key insights include a divide among tech workers between those thriving and those struggling, a significant rise in burnout, the four emotional archetypes shaping tech workers' experiences, and the role of managers in employee well-being. It offers concrete advice for employees and leaders navigating these challenges.
summary.zh: 本期Lenny播客请来Noam Segal，他领导年度科技工作者情绪调查，基于数千名从业者数据，探讨2026年科技员工对工作、AI、倦怠与职业未来的看法。洞察包括技术人员之间的差异化体验、倦怠大幅上升、四类情感原型及管理者在员工福祉中的作用，并提供实用建议，适合员工和领导者收听。
summary.es: Este episodio del Podcast de Lenny presenta a Noam Segal, quien codirige la Encuesta Anual de Sentimiento de Trabajadores Tecnológicos. Basándose en una gran muestra, exploran las opiniones de los trabajadores tecnológicos en 2026 sobre empleo, IA, burnout y futuro profesional. Destacan la división entre quienes prosperan y sufren, el aumento del agotamiento, cuatro arquetipos emocionales que moldean experiencias y el papel de líderes en el bienestar. Ofrece consejos prácticos para empleados y dirigentes.
