title.original: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.en: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.zh: Adam Brown — 深入浅出的广义相对论介绍
title.es: Adam Brown – Una introducción profunda pero accesible a la relatividad general

summary.original: This episode of the Dwarkesh Podcast features Adam Brown, who previously taught a graduate course on general relativity at Stanford. Adam offers an accessible introduction to the core insights of Einstein's general relativity, explaining concepts such as the equivalence of inertial and gravitational mass and how gravity arises from curved spacetime. He also discusses black holes, including their role as energy sources and differing observations of them from various perspectives. Adam currently leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, which works on scientific reasoning in AI. The episode closes with philosophical reflections on science and the prospects for AI rediscovering general relativity.
summary.en: This episode of the Dwarkesh Podcast features Adam Brown, who previously taught a graduate course on general relativity at Stanford. Adam offers an accessible introduction to the core insights of Einstein's general relativity, explaining concepts such as the equivalence of inertial and gravitational mass and how gravity arises from curved spacetime. He also discusses black holes, including their role as energy sources and differing observations of them from various perspectives. Adam currently leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, which works on scientific reasoning in AI. The episode closes with philosophical reflections on science and the prospects for AI rediscovering general relativity.
summary.zh: Dwarkesh播客本期邀请Adam Brown（曾在斯坦福授课）介绍爱因斯坦广义相对论核心见解。讲解惯性质量与引力质量等效、引力起因于时空弯曲，并讨论黑洞及不同视角下的观测。Brown现领导Google DeepMind的BlueShift，专注AI科学推理。节目末探讨科学哲学及AI重发现广义相对论的可能性。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast Dwarkesh, Adam Brown, exprofesor de un curso de posgrado en relatividad general en Stanford, ofrece una introducción accesible a los conceptos clave de la relatividad general de Einstein, explicando la equivalencia de masas inerciales y gravitacionales, cómo la gravedad surge de la curvatura del espacio-tiempo, y discutiendo agujeros negros desde varias perspectivas. Actualmente lidera BlueShift en Google DeepMind, centrado en razonamiento científico con IA. El episodio concluye con reflexiones filosóficas sobre la ciencia y las posibilidades de que la IA redescubra la relatividad general.

title.original: The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)
title.en: The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)

While the evidence provides limited detail on specific discussion points, the episode suggests a focus on how these human qualities interact with AI developments, especially given Mosseri's leadership over apps used by billions, including Instagram and Threads.

While the evidence provides limited detail on specific discussion points, the episode suggests a focus on how these human qualities interact with AI developments, especially given Mosseri's leadership over apps used by billions, including Instagram and Threads.

title.original: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity
title.en: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity
title.zh: Adam Mosseri：人工智能助力真实性发展
title.es: Adam Mosseri: La IA es un impulso para la autenticidad

summary.original: In this Lenny's Podcast episode, Adam Mosseri, Head of Instagram, talks about how AI supports and enhances authenticity. He discusses changes in product team structures in 2026, the emergence of hybrid 'product staff' roles, and the importance of designers amid shifting functional boundaries. Mosseri also addresses algorithmic knowledge about users and Instagram's approach to creator identity amidst growing AI-generated content. He shares reflections on career setbacks such as Facebook Home and early Reels versions. The conversation provides insight into product leadership under Mosseri, who has led Instagram since 2018 and oversees the Threads app team.
summary.en: In this Lenny's Podcast episode, Adam Mosseri, Head of Instagram, talks about how AI supports and enhances authenticity. He discusses changes in product team structures in 2026, the emergence of hybrid 'product staff' roles, and the importance of designers amid shifting functional boundaries. Mosseri also addresses algorithmic knowledge about users and Instagram's approach to creator identity amidst growing AI-generated content. He shares reflections on career setbacks such as Facebook Home and early Reels versions. The conversation provides insight into product leadership under Mosseri, who has led Instagram since 2018 and oversees the Threads app team.
summary.zh: Lenny播客本期访谈了Instagram负责人Adam Mosseri，他谈及AI如何支持并增强真实性。讨论了2026年产品团队结构变化、新型混合“产品员工”角色的出现，以及在功能边界变化中的设计师重要性。Mosseri还谈及算法对用户的认知和Instagram在AI生成内容增多背景下的创作者身份管理。他分享了Facebook Home和早期Reels版本的职业反思。内容提供了Mosseri自2018年领导Instagram及Threads团队以来的产品领导见解。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast Lenny, Adam Mosseri, jefe de Instagram, habla sobre cómo la IA apoya y mejora la autenticidad. Discute cambios en la estructura de equipos de producto en 2026, la emergencia de roles híbridos de 'personal de producto' y la importancia de los diseñadores dentro de límites funcionales cambiantes. También aborda el conocimiento algorítmico sobre los usuarios y cómo Instagram maneja la identidad de creadores frente al aumento de contenido generado por IA. Comparte reflexiones sobre contratiempos en su carrera, como Facebook Home y las primeras versiones de Reels. La conversación ofrece perspectivas de liderazgo de producto bajo Mosseri, quien lidera Instagram desde 2018 y supervisa el equipo de Threads.

title.original: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
title.en: Essentials: The Science & Treatment of Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
title.zh: 必听：强迫症（OCD）的科学与治疗
title.es: Esenciales: La ciencia y tratamiento del Trastorno Obsesivo Compulsivo (TOC)

summary.original: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode focuses on the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), explaining the neural circuitry behind repetitive thought-action loops. It discusses why compulsive actions can strengthen obsessions instead of relieving them. The episode covers effective treatments for OCD such as exposure-based cognitive behavioral therapy and SSRIs, including how they compare alone and combined. It also describes a clinical protocol where patients learn to suppress compulsive responses by entering anxiety states, aiming to retrain the brain and break the OCD cycle. The episode includes insights from Dr. Helen Blair Simpson, an expert on OCD.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab Essentials episode focuses on the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD), explaining the neural circuitry behind repetitive thought-action loops. It discusses why compulsive actions can strengthen obsessions instead of relieving them. The episode covers effective treatments for OCD such as exposure-based cognitive behavioral therapy and SSRIs, including how they compare alone and combined. It also describes a clinical protocol where patients learn to suppress compulsive responses by entering anxiety states, aiming to retrain the brain and break the OCD cycle. The episode includes insights from Dr. Helen Blair Simpson, an expert on OCD.
summary.zh: Huberman Lab必听节目聚焦强迫症的生物学和心理学，解释神经回路如何导致重复的思维和行为循环。讨论强迫行为为何加剧执念而非缓解症状。介绍了暴露认知行为疗法和选择性5-羟色胺再摄取抑制剂（SSRIs）等有效治疗方法及其单独和联合应用。描述临床方案中患者通过进入焦虑状态抑制强迫反应，重新训练大脑打破强迫循环。本集包含OCD专家Helen Blair Simpson博士的见解。
summary.es: Este episodio esencial de Huberman Lab se centra en la biología y psicología del trastorno obsesivo-compulsivo (TOC), explicando la circuitería neuronal detrás de los ciclos repetitivos de pensamiento y acción. Discute por qué las compulsiones pueden reforzar las obsesiones en lugar de aliviarlas. Cubre tratamientos efectivos como la terapia cognitivo-conductual basada en la exposición y los ISRS, incluyendo comparaciones de uso individual y combinado. Describe un protocolo clínico donde los pacientes aprenden a suprimir respuestas compulsivas entrando en estados de ansiedad, buscando reentrenar el cerebro y romper el ciclo del TOC. Incluye perspectivas de la experta en TOC, la Dra. Helen Blair Simpson.

title.original: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.en: Why AI Infrastructure must evolve for Agent Experience — Akshat Bubna, Modal CTO
title.zh: 为何AI基础设施必须为代理体验进化 — Akshat Bubna，Modal首席技术官
title.es: Por qué la infraestructura de IA debe evolucionar para la experiencia de agentes — Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal

summary.original: In this Latent Space podcast episode, Modal CTO Akshat Bubna discusses why AI infrastructure must evolve to support agent experiences. The episode covers Modal's growth and its focus shift from developer experience to agent experience, emphasizing challenges with traditional cloud infrastructure in handling bursty, compute-heavy AI workloads. Topics include the need for sandboxes, elastic inference, GPU snapshotting, and other innovations enabling AI agents to operate efficiently. The discussion also touches on Modal's strategy across multiple cloud providers and the technological complexity behind modern AI infrastructure.
summary.en: In this Latent Space podcast episode, Modal CTO Akshat Bubna discusses why AI infrastructure must evolve to support agent experiences. The episode covers Modal's growth and its focus shift from developer experience to agent experience, emphasizing challenges with traditional cloud infrastructure in handling bursty, compute-heavy AI workloads. Topics include the need for sandboxes, elastic inference, GPU snapshotting, and other innovations enabling AI agents to operate efficiently. The discussion also touches on Modal's strategy across multiple cloud providers and the technological complexity behind modern AI infrastructure.
summary.zh: 本期Latent Space播客中，Modal CTO Akshat Bubna探讨AI基础设施为何需要进化以支持代理体验。内容涵盖Modal的成长及其重点从开发者体验转向代理体验，强调传统云基础设施在处理突发且计算密集的AI工作负载时的挑战，及沙箱、弹性推理、GPU快照等创新。还讨论了Modal在多云环境下的战略及现代AI基础设施背后的技术复杂性。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast Latent Space, Akshat Bubna, CTO de Modal, explica por qué la infraestructura de IA debe evolucionar para apoyar la experiencia de agentes. Se aborda el crecimiento de Modal y su cambio de enfoque de la experiencia del desarrollador a la del agente, destacando los retos de la infraestructura cloud tradicional ante cargas de trabajo de IA intensivas y erráticas, así como innovaciones como sandboxes, inferencia elástica y snapshots de GPU. También se discuten las estrategias de Modal en múltiples proveedores cloud y la complejidad tecnológica detrás de la infraestructura moderna de IA.

title.en: Raising a Dog & Mastering Calm Assertive Energy | Cesar Millan

summary.en: In this Huberman Lab episode, dog behavior expert Cesar Millan discusses how to adjust human energy and behavior to ensure dogs remain calm, happy, and responsive. summary.es: En este episodio de Huberman Lab, el experto en comportamiento canino Cesar Millan discute cómo ajustar la energía y comportamiento humanos para que los perros se mantengan calmados, felices y receptivos. title.original: Building strength and muscle mass: how to optimize training, nutrition, and more for longevity (AMA #71 rebroadcast)
title.en: Building strength and muscle mass: how to optimize training, nutrition, and more for longevity (AMA #71 rebroadcast)
title.zh: 打造力量与肌肉：如何优化训练、营养及更多以延长寿命（AMA#71重播）
title.es: Construcción de fuerza y masa muscular: cómo optimizar entrenamiento, nutrición y más para la longevidad (Repetición AMA #71)

summary.original: This "Ask Me Anything" episode of The Peter Attia Drive focuses on building muscle mass and strength, emphasizing their roles in lifespan and healthspan. Peter Attia synthesizes insights from over 30 hours of prior discussions with experts such as Layne Norton, Andy Galpin, and Mike Israetel. The episode covers why muscle matters for longevity, metabolic health, injury prevention, and clarifies distinctions between muscle mass and strength. It provides practical training strategies, nutrition guidance including protein timing and creatine supplementation, and advice tailored for beginners and experienced lifters alike, aiming to promote safe and sustainable muscle development and maintenance.
summary.en: This "Ask Me Anything" episode of The Peter Attia Drive focuses on building muscle mass and strength, emphasizing their roles in lifespan and healthspan. Peter Attia synthesizes insights from over 30 hours of prior discussions with experts such as Layne Norton, Andy Galpin, and Mike Israetel. The episode covers why muscle matters for longevity, metabolic health, injury prevention, and clarifies distinctions between muscle mass and strength. It provides practical training strategies, nutrition guidance including protein timing and creatine supplementation, and advice tailored for beginners and experienced lifters alike, aiming to promote safe and sustainable muscle development and maintenance.
summary.zh: Peter Attia Drive的“问我任何事”节目聚焦肌肉质量与力量的建立，强调其在寿命与健康寿命中的重要性。Peter汇总了与多位专家的30小时讨论内容，介绍肌肉对长寿、新陈代谢健康和预防伤害的作用，区分肌肉质量与力量。提供实用训练策略、营养建议（包括蛋白质时机和肌酸补充），帮助初学者和有经验者安全且持续地增肌维持。
summary.es: Este episodio "Ask Me Anything" de The Peter Attia Drive se centra en construir masa muscular y fuerza, destacando su rol en la longevidad y salud. Peter Attia sintetiza más de 30 horas de charlas con expertos como Layne Norton, Andy Galpin y Mike Israetel. Explica por qué el músculo es vital para la longevidad, salud metabólica y prevención de lesiones, y aclara diferencias entre masa muscular y fuerza. Proporciona estrategias prácticas de entrenamiento, consejos nutricionales (incluyendo el tiempo de proteínas y suplementos de creatina), dirigidos a principiantes y levantadores avanzados para un desarrollo seguro y sostenible.

title.original: How Nuclear Will Unlock Energy Abundance with Valar Atomics Founder Isaiah Taylor
title.en: How Nuclear Will Unlock Energy Abundance with Valar Atomics Founder Isaiah Taylor
title.zh: 核能如何实现能源充裕——访Valar Atomics创始人Isaiah Taylor
title.es: Cómo la energía nuclear desbloqueará la abundancia energética con Isaiah Taylor, fundador de Valar Atomics

summary.original: In this No Priors podcast episode, Isaiah Taylor, founder of Valar Atomics, discusses nuclear energy. The episode highlights that Valar Atomics is actively involved in splitting atoms and recently powered a device, contrasting with the broader nuclear industry which relies more on simulations and paper designs. Those interested in advancements in nuclear technology and energy abundance might find this episode informative.
summary.en: In this No Priors podcast episode, Isaiah Taylor, founder of Valar Atomics, discusses nuclear energy. The episode highlights that Valar Atomics is actively involved in splitting atoms and recently powered a device, contrasting with the broader nuclear industry which relies more on simulations and paper designs. Those interested in advancements in nuclear technology and energy abundance might find this episode informative.
summary.zh: 在这期No Priors播客中，Valar Atomics创始人Isaiah Taylor讨论了核能。Valar Atomics积极参与原子裂变并近期驱动了一台设备，与依赖模拟和图纸设计的传统核能行业形成对比。对核技术进展和能源充裕感兴趣的听众会发现这期内容有价值。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast No Priors, Isaiah Taylor, fundador de Valar Atomics, habla sobre energía nuclear. Valar Atomics está activamente dividido átomos y recientemente impulsó un dispositivo, en contraste con la industria nuclear más amplia que depende de simulaciones y diseños en papel. Aquellos interesados en avances en tecnología nuclear y abundancia energética pueden encontrar este episodio informativo.

title.original: How Nuclear Will Unlock Energy Abundance with Valar Atomics Founder Isaiah Taylor
title.en: How Nuclear Will Unlock Energy Abundance with Valar Atomics Founder Isaiah Taylor
title.zh: 核能如何释放能源丰裕：Valar Atomics创始人Isaiah Taylor谈核能潜力
title.es: Cómo la energía nuclear desbloqueará la abundancia energética con Isaiah Taylor, fundador de Valar Atomics

summary.original: This No Priors podcast episode features Isaiah Taylor, founder and CEO of Valar Atomics, discussing how their company is advancing nuclear technology to unlock energy abundance. Unlike much of the nuclear industry relying on simulations and designs, Valar Atomics operates an active nuclear reactor used to power digital devices, exemplified by powering an NVIDIA Blackwell chip and the world's first nuclear-powered website. The episode includes Sarah Guo joining Taylor on-site at their Utah reactor, offering insight into practical nuclear energy deployment and its potential influence on energy infrastructure.
summary.en: This No Priors podcast episode features Isaiah Taylor, founder and CEO of Valar Atomics, discussing how their company is advancing nuclear technology to unlock energy abundance. Unlike much of the nuclear industry relying on simulations and designs, Valar Atomics operates an active nuclear reactor used to power digital devices, exemplified by powering an NVIDIA Blackwell chip and the world's first nuclear-powered website. The episode includes Sarah Guo joining Taylor on-site at their Utah reactor, offering insight into practical nuclear energy deployment and its potential influence on energy infrastructure.
summary.zh: 本期No Priors播客邀请Valar Atomics创始人兼CEO Isaiah Taylor，讨论他们如何通过先进核技术实现能源丰裕。与依赖模拟设计的核能行业不同，Valar Atomics运营活核反应堆，实测为数字设备供电，如NVIDIA Blackwell芯片及首个核能驱动网站。Sarah Guo现场参与，详解实际核能部署及其对能源基础设施的潜在影响。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast No Priors, Isaiah Taylor, fundador y CEO de Valar Atomics, habla sobre cómo su empresa está avanzando en tecnología nuclear para desbloquear la abundancia energética. A diferencia de gran parte de la industria nuclear que depende de simulaciones y diseños, Valar Atomics opera un reactor nuclear activo para alimentar dispositivos digitales, ejemplificado por un chip NVIDIA Blackwell y el primer sitio web impulsado por energía nuclear. Sarah Guo se une a Taylor en su reactor en Utah, ofreciendo perspectivas sobre el despliegue práctico de energía nuclear y su posible influencia en la infraestructura energética.

This focus suggests a reevaluation of benchmark approaches in AI testing. The episode may be valuable for listeners interested in AI evaluation metrics, safety, and research, though detailed guest context is not provided in the evidence.

The episode may be valuable for listeners interested in AI evaluation metrics, safety, and research, though detailed guest context is not provided in the evidence.
summary.zh: 本集讨论AI模型通常依赖静态评测网格而忽视计算时间对表现的影响，提示需重新评估基准测试方法。适合对AI评估指标、安全和研究感兴趣的听众。

title.original: 🔬 The Coolest Diffusion Research Isn't in LLMs — Evan Feinberg & Sergey Edunov, Genesis Molecular AI
title.en: 🔬 The Coolest Diffusion Research Isn't in LLMs — Evan Feinberg & Sergey Edunov, Genesis Molecular AI
title.zh: 🔬 最酷的扩散研究不在大型语言模型 — Evan Feinberg与Sergey Edunov，Genesis Molecular AI
title.es: 🔬 La investigación de difusión más innovadora no está en los LLMs — Evan Feinberg y Sergey Edunov, Genesis Molecular AI

summary.original: This Latent Space Podcast episode features Evan Feinberg and Sergey Edunov from Genesis Molecular AI discussing how diffusion research in drug discovery is leading innovation beyond language models. Sergey, previously leading Llama training at Meta, shares insights on the novel architectures developed at Genesis. They highlight how their flagship model, PEARL, advances 3D protein-ligand structure prediction by modeling protein flexibility, improving drug binding predictions. The episode explores challenges in small molecule drug discovery, agentic AI workflows for iterative drug design, and critiques current academic benchmarks. It’s valuable for those interested in AI’s impact on molecular drug discovery and breakthroughs enabling practical real-world applications.
summary.en: This Latent Space Podcast episode features Evan Feinberg and Sergey Edunov from Genesis Molecular AI discussing how diffusion research in drug discovery is leading innovation beyond language models. Sergey, previously leading Llama training at Meta, shares insights on the novel architectures developed at Genesis. They highlight how their flagship model, PEARL, advances 3D protein-ligand structure prediction by modeling protein flexibility, improving drug binding predictions. The episode explores challenges in small molecule drug discovery, agentic AI workflows for iterative drug design, and critiques current academic benchmarks. It’s valuable for those interested in AI’s impact on molecular drug discovery and breakthroughs enabling practical real-world applications.
summary.zh: 本期Latent Space播客邀请Genesis Molecular AI的Evan Feinberg与Sergey Edunov，探讨扩散技术在药物发现领域的创新，超越语言模型。Sergey曾主导Meta Llama训练，分享Genesis的新型架构。重点介绍旗舰模型PEARL如何通过模拟蛋白质柔性提升3D蛋白-配体结构预测和药物结合精度。节目涵盖小分子药物开发难题、迭代药物设计的智能AI流程及对现有学术基准的批评。对关注AI在分子药物研发实用突破者极具价值。
summary.es: En este episodio del podcast Latent Space, Evan Feinberg y Sergey Edunov de Genesis Molecular AI discuten cómo la investigación en difusión para el descubrimiento de fármacos está liderando la innovación más allá de los modelos de lenguaje. Sergey, exlíder del entrenamiento de Llama en Meta, comparte información sobre las nuevas arquitecturas desarrolladas en Genesis. Destacan cómo su modelo principal, PEARL, mejora la predicción de estructuras 3D de proteínas y ligandos modelando la flexibilidad proteica, mejorando la precisión de la unión farmacológica. El episodio explora desafíos en descubrimiento de fármacos de pequeñas moléculas, flujos de trabajo de IA para diseño iterativo de fármacos y críticas a los estándares académicos actuales. Es valioso para quienes interesan en el impacto de la IA en el descubrimiento molecular de fármacos y avances prácticos.

As author of "The New Roman Empire," Kaldellis provides a comprehensive look at Eastern Roman history. The episode covers over two millennia of Roman history, significant political and cultural events, and lessons from the empire's longevity and transformations. It offers detailed historical insights for listeners interested in the complexities of empire rise and fall as analyzed by a subject-matter expert.

summary.es: En el episodio #498 del Podcast de Lex Fridman, el historiador Anthony Kaldellis analiza los Imperios Romano y Bizantino, cubriendo más de dos milenios de historia, eventos políticos y culturales relevantes, y lecciones sobre la permanencia y transformaciones imperiales, ideal para quienes buscan análisis expertos sobre imperios.

title.original: Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math
title.en: Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math
title.zh: Grant Sanderson —— 人工智能与数学的未来
title.es: Grant Sanderson – IA y el futuro de las matemáticas

summary.original: In this Dwarkesh podcast, Grant Sanderson of 3Blue1Brown explores AI's rapid progress in mathematics and what it might mean for the future of the field and AI's broader capabilities. The conversation touches on how AI is solving math problems, including those akin to competition-level geometry and combinatorics, and discusses the ongoing challenges and conceptual breakthroughs in math facilitated by AI. The episode offers valuable perspectives on AI's impact on math and advice for those interested in AI-driven transformations in various fields.
summary.en: In this Dwarkesh podcast, Grant Sanderson of 3Blue1Brown explores AI's rapid progress in mathematics and what it might mean for the future of the field and AI's broader capabilities. The conversation touches on how AI is solving math problems, including those akin to competition-level geometry and combinatorics, and discusses the ongoing challenges and conceptual breakthroughs in math facilitated by AI. The episode offers valuable perspectives on AI's impact on math and advice for those interested in AI-driven transformations in various fields.
summary.zh: 在这期Dwarkesh播客中，3Blue1Brown的Grant Sanderson探讨了AI在数学领域的快速进展及其未来意义。讨论涵盖了AI如何解决比赛级别的几何和组合数学问题，以及AI推动数学领域的突破和挑战。本集为关注AI对数学影响及各领域AI变革者提供了宝贵见解。
summary.es: En este podcast de Dwarkesh, Grant Sanderson de 3Blue1Brown explora el rápido avance de la IA en matemáticas y lo que podría significar para el futuro del campo y las capacidades más amplias de la IA. La conversación aborda cómo la IA resuelve problemas matemáticos, incluidos problemas de geometría y combinatoria a nivel competitivo, y discute los desafíos y avances conceptuales facilitados por la IA. El episodio ofrece perspectivas valiosas sobre el impacto de la IA en las matemáticas y consejos para quienes buscan transformaciones impulsadas por IA en diversos campos.

title.original: #398 ‒ AMA #86: GLP-1 RAs and muscle loss: new data, better questions, and how to preserve muscle during weight loss
title.en: #398 ‒ AMA #86: GLP-1 RAs and muscle loss: new data, better questions, and how to preserve muscle during weight loss
title.zh: #398 ‒ AMA #86：GLP-1受体激动剂与肌肉流失——新数据、更好问题及如何在减重时保护肌肉
title.es: #398 ‒ AMA #86: Agonistas GLP-1 y pérdida muscular: nuevos datos, mejores preguntas y cómo preservar el músculo durante la pérdida de peso

summary.original: In this Ask Me Anything episode (#398) of The Peter Attia Drive, Peter explores the effects of GLP-1 receptor agonists—including drugs like Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound—particularly focusing on their impact on muscle. He examines lean mass loss during treatment, compares it to other weight-loss approaches, and explains why DEXA scans can misrepresent muscle loss. The episode also covers effects on bone health, fracture risk, and functional outcomes, practical strategies to preserve muscle and bone health during weight loss, and early insights into retatrutide. The episode offers a deep dive for listeners interested in the nuanced effects of these medications and ways to mitigate muscle loss.
summary.en: In this Ask Me Anything episode (#398) of The Peter Attia Drive, Peter explores the effects of GLP-1 receptor agonists—including drugs like Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound—particularly focusing on their impact on muscle. He examines lean mass loss during treatment, compares it to other weight-loss approaches, and explains why DEXA scans can misrepresent muscle loss. The episode also covers effects on bone health, fracture risk, and functional outcomes, practical strategies to preserve muscle and bone health during weight loss, and early insights into retatrutide. The episode offers a deep dive for listeners interested in the nuanced effects of these medications and ways to mitigate muscle loss.
summary.zh: Peter Attia的AMA节目探讨GLP-1受体激动剂（如Ozempic、Wegovy、Zepbound）对肌肉和骨骼健康的影响，讨论肌肉流失误判和保护策略，以及早期retatrutide洞见。
summary.es: En este episodio AMA de The Peter Attia Drive, se abordan los efectos de los agonistas GLP-1 (como Ozempic, Wegovy y Zepbound) sobre la masa muscular, riesgos óseos, estrategias para preservar músculo y hueso durante la pérdida de peso y primeros datos sobre retatrutide.
